Benefits: When dealing damage to undead with your channel energy, you can reroll any damage die that shows a natural 1.
BvoaFffwjmeXnLFq.name: Cleansing Light (Sarenrae)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on damage rolls made with unarmed attacks.

Bw67YegF2jNCVz9g.description:
You have trained in martial arts under the banner of Mizu Ki Hikari rebels.

Requirements: Chu Ye

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on damage rolls made with unarmed attacks.
Bw67YegF2jNCVz9g.name: Mizu Ki Hikari Rebel (Chu Ye)

contextNotes.text: -[[2]] penalty on checks made while speaking Abyssal. Becomes +[[2]] Trait bonus once you learn Abyssal.
-[[2]] penalty on checks made while speaking Abyssal. Becomes +[[2]] Trait bonus once you learn Abyssal.
-[[2]] penalty on checks made while speaking Abyssal. Becomes +[[2]] Trait bonus once you learn Abyssal.
-[[2]] penalty to read Abyssal text. Becomes +[[2]] Trait bonus once you learn Abyssal.

BxcpYNK85bHTolAn.description:
Having grown up near the Worldwound, you have a rough understanding of the demons’ guttural babble.

Requirements: Sarkoris or the Worldwound

Benefits: You add Abyssal to your list of languages known, though you take a –2 penalty on Diplomacy, Intimidate, and Bluff checks made while speaking Abyssal, as well as a –2 penalty on Linguistics checks made to read Abyssal text. If you gain Abyssal as a language again at a later time (such as by taking a rank in Linguistics and selecting Abyssal as a learned language), these skill check penalties become +2 trait bonuses instead.
BxcpYNK85bHTolAn.name: Abyssal Eavesdropper (Sarkoris, Worldwound)

ByCw1feEKg0UfrDC.description:
Though your light pink scales made you the subject of ridicule by your tribe, you can adapt to more environments than they can.

Requirements: Kobold

Benefits: You gain a +1 bonus on Survival checks, and Survival is always a class skill for you. Most kobolds with carnation scales also have the day raider alternate racial trait (see page 7).
ByCw1feEKg0UfrDC.name: Carnation Scales (Kobold)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus when you make a check as part of a bardic performance. (This trait already provides a +1 trait bonus to all checks, simply add 1))

BzPMPtnn0DK2cnQJ.description:
Your ancestor was a lillend, a being of exceptional grace and singular musical talent.

Requirements: Musetouched Aasimar Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Perform (string) checks. This bonus increases to +2 when you make a Perform check as part of a bardic performance.
BzPMPtnn0DK2cnQJ.name: Lillend's Harp (Aasimar; Musetouched)

C12WB3TIg6teTZtL.description:
You have learned to incorporate fey enchantments into your hexes to snare victims that shake off your curses.

Requirements: Irrisen

Benefits: Once per day as a free action, when a creature succeeds at its saving throw against your hex that cannot target the same creature more than once per day, you can declare that creature to be subject to your fey hex. You can attempt the failed hex against the creature a second time, so long as you do so within 1 minute.
C12WB3TIg6teTZtL.name: Fey Hex (Irrisen)

C36gPFjWdVvBubNm.description:
In a nation overcrowded with faith, you often worry that your message is drowned out, but nonetheless important. The souls in Roslar’s Coffer needed comfort and charity once upon a time, but have bounced back so fully—in part thanks to your hard work—that you worry you’ve made yourself unnecessary.

Benefits: You are accustomed to long hours, granting you a +1 trait bonus on Fortitude saving throws. Your faith is invigorating, and once per day you can lay on hands as a paladin of half your character level (minimum 1). If you gain the lay on hands ability from a class, you instead gain one additional use of lay on hands each day.
C36gPFjWdVvBubNm.name: The Word (Tyrant's Grasp)

contextNotes.text: Once per day, when you fail a check, you can immediately reroll that check as a free action. You must take the second result, even if it’s worse. ([[@resources.skillfulRuinsOfAzlant.value]] remaining uses)

Once per day, when you fail a check, you can immediately reroll that check as a free action. You must take the second result, even if it’s worse. ([[@resources.skillfulRuinsOfAzlant.value]] remaining uses)

Once per day, when you fail a check, you can immediately reroll that check as a free action. You must take the second result, even if it’s worse. ([[@resources.skillfulRuinsOfAzlant.value]] remaining uses)

Once per day, when you fail a check, you can immediately reroll that check as a free action. You must take the second result, even if it’s worse. ([[@resources.skillfulRuinsOfAzlant.value]] remaining uses)

Once per day, when you fail a check, you can immediately reroll that check as a free action. You must take the second result, even if it’s worse. ([[@resources.skillfulRuinsOfAzlant.value]] remaining uses)

CBi1q69ddEKv0Cps.description:
You’ve always been interested in a wide array of things, and growing up you’ve spent time honing some of these talents, which has helped you in life. Some have attributed your successes to luck, but others have recognized what you truly have— skill. This interest in and practice of a diverse array of skills and abilities has served you well in a number of different jobs, and following in your varied interests you learned of the expedition to the ruins of Azlant. After your application, the Bountiful Venture Company selected you for the expedition because your skillful approach to matters would be helpful for a growing colony.

Benefits: Once per day when you fail an Acrobatics, Climb, Spellcraft, Stealth, or Use Magic Device check, you can immediately reroll that check as a free action. You must take the second result, even if it’s worse.
CBi1q69ddEKv0Cps.name: Skillful (Ruins of Azlant)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait against robots.
+[[1]] Dodge bonus against attacks of robots.

CJ5f4OIW2xAEJzA9.description:
The strange automatons that plague the wilds of Numeria are a blight upon the world, and the idea that there could be countless more of these creatures lying in wait in the unknown ruins scattered throughout the region chills your blood. Khonnir’s recovery of a deactivated robot from the caves below Torch worries you—not only could that thing wake up and run amok in town, but there may well be more lurking below!

Benefits: You want to explore the caves under Torch to determine if there is indeed a lurking robot threat below town. You gain a +1 trait bonus on attack rolls against robots and a +1 dodge bonus to AC against attacks made by robots.
CJ5f4OIW2xAEJzA9.name: Robot Slayer (Iron Gods)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus in areas in which you have used the Diplomacy skill to gather information. This bonus increases to +[[2]] when dealing with government officials.
+[[1]] Trait bonus in areas in which you have used the Diplomacy skill to gather information. This bonus increases to +[[2]] when dealing with government officials.

CKj2F6l8JVggrva1.description:
You have often seen lawbreakers go free when they demonstrate they have friends in high places, and so you put special effort into befriending powerful people yourself.

Benefits: Whenever you are in an area in which you have used the Diplomacy skill to gather information, you gain a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy and Intimidate checks. This bonus increases to +2 when dealing with government officials.

Suggested Characters

Absalom natives, Aspis Consortium agents, Taldans.
CKj2F6l8JVggrva1.name: Friends in High Places

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against death effects while you are under the effects of any spell.
If you are reduced to negative hit points, while you are under the effects of any spell, you automatically confirm stabilization checks to stop bleeding.

CO3T7oTPXx95wKzs.description:
Your faith in magic allows you to reflexively use the energy of any spell effect on you to save you from death.

Requirements: Nethys

Benefits: As long as you are under the effects of any spell, you gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against death effects. If you are reduced to negative hit points while you are under the effects of any spell, you automatically confirm stabilization checks to stop bleeding.
CO3T7oTPXx95wKzs.name: Magic is Life (Nethys)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] to the save DCs of all language-dependent spells and effects you create.

CPeVws9xK3wmRPcr.description:
The opera is perhaps the most important and prestigious form of entertainment offered in Kintargo, and the Kintargo Opera House is among the most famous of its kind. You’re hardly a superstar among the performers who’ve graced the stage there, but you have performed several times before in small parts. Just recently, you got your big break—you’d won a role in the infamous opera Huntress of Heroes, and had been studying for the role furiously before the onset of martial law dashed your plans to the dirt. Now that the Kintargo Opera House has been claimed by Barzillai Thrune, all shows have been canceled and your chance at success seems to have been lost. Yet you can’t lose hope. You still practice your skills, and some day, perhaps the Kintargo Opera House will open its doors again, at which point you intend to be center stage!

Benefits: Choose one type of Perform skill. You gain a +1 trait bonus in that specific Perform skill, and all Perform skills are class skills for you. You also increase the save DCs of all language-dependent spells and effects you create by 1.
CPeVws9xK3wmRPcr.name: Diva in Training (Hell's Rebels)

CQiPw7OXjdkNZw21.description:
Even when the chips are down, you keep on shooting.

Benefits: If your hit point total drops to 0 or lower but you are not dead, you may act as if disabled rather than dying (as if you possessed the Diehard feat). However, you can use your actions only to draw a firearm, reload a firearm, or attack with a firearm. If you have the Diehard feat, this trait also allows you to substitute your Wisdom score for your Constitution score for the purpose of determining the negative hit point total at which you die.
CQiPw7OXjdkNZw21.name: Never Stop Shooting

contextNotes.text: You can attempt checks as if you were trained.
You can attempt checks as if you were trained.

CTIqs3FF5NDy5ZL4.description:
You study the outdoors, and leave books for dusty libraries.

Requirements: Gozreh

Benefits: You can attempt Knowledge (geography) and Knowledge (nature) checks as if you were trained.
CTIqs3FF5NDy5ZL4.name: Natural Philosopher (Gozreh)

CUMJtpZHx0TS6SLO.description:
You grew up as a slave in Cheliax and know the ins and outs of Chelish nobility better than most.

Requirements: Bellflower Network, Halfling

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy and Knowledge (nobility) checks and Knowledge (nobility) is a class skill for you.
CUMJtpZHx0TS6SLO.name: Freed Slave (Bellflower Network, Halfling)

contextNotes.text: As a move action you can climb 5 feet without provoking an attack of opportunity, even without a climb speed.

CVTOWjdGyYh3jI6Z.description:
You grew up along the Grinding Coast of Arcadia, scaling perilous cliffs and dealing with the dangerous creatures that live on these rocky surfaces.

Requirements: Arcadia native

Benefits: As a move action while climbing, you can climb 5 feet without provoking an attack of opportunity, even if you don’t have a climb speed.
CVTOWjdGyYh3jI6Z.name: Cliff Strider (Arcadia native)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on both your attack and damage rolls, once per day when you make a charge attack. Any allies who make a charge attack before the beginning of your next turn gain the same benefit.

CWhAo6YzP0e6d7Kk.description:
Your charge inspires nearby companions to new heights of daring.

Benefits: Once per day when you make a charge attack, you gain a +1 trait bonus on both your attack and damage rolls, as do any allies who make a charge attack before the beginning of your next turn.
CWhAo6YzP0e6d7Kk.name: Inspiring Rush

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus to your caster level when casting (or using as a spell-like ability)  spells that move objects through sheer will.

CYmeezRcKCJw8dzv.description:
Your body is so ancient you fear damaging it with exertion.

Requirements: Nosferatu Vampire Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus to your caster level when casting (or using as a spell-like ability) Fly, Levitate, Mage Hand, Telekinesis, and similar spells that move objects through sheer will.
CYmeezRcKCJw8dzv.name: Telekinetic Dependence (Vampire; Nosferatu)

CaAgahPQ875KkzY5.description:
You were once faced with a grave injustice committed by an ignorant or delusional person, and righteous indignation moved you to correct the mistaken party.

Requirements: Andoletta

Benefits: Once per day, when you confirm a critical hit against, successfully use a smite attack on, or use lay on hands on a creature that is affected by a charm or compulsion effect, you can invoke Andoletta to open the target’s eyes. If the effect originally allowed a saving throw to resist it, the target can attempt a new saving throw against the charm or compulsion; if she’s successful, the effect ends immediately.
CaAgahPQ875KkzY5.name: Enemy of Delusion (Andoletta)

contextNotes.text: After successfully completing a charge attack, you gain a +[[2]] Trait bonus on Will saves for a full round.

CaK93az4NyofR0xu.description:
Somewhere in your family line, the mystic power of red dragons was infused into one of your relatives.

Benefits: If you ever take a class that requires you to select a draconic heritage, you must select a red dragon as your type. After successfully completing a charge attack, you gain a +2 trait bonus on Will saves for a full round.
CaK93az4NyofR0xu.name: Fury of the Red

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against spells and effects with the chaos descriptor.

CbLYC95RZ3DTRBUc.description: Benefits: If you are an inquisitor, you can select any inquisition associated with your preferred Hellknight order (see below), as long as you and your patron deity are of a lawful alignment. Additionally, you gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against spells and effects with the chaos descriptor.
CbLYC95RZ3DTRBUc.name: Hellknight Inquisitor

CbX5iMc8v5obzSO5.description:
Your meditation on the nature of strength and speed allows you to focus your thoughts to achieve things your body might not be able to do on its own.

Requirements: Irori

Benefits: Select any Strength, Constitution, or Dexterity-based skill. You make checks with that skill using your Wisdom modifier instead of its normal ability score. That skill is always a class skill for you.
CbX5iMc8v5obzSO5.name: Wisdom in the Flesh (Irori)

CcPTQN8nBjXib6xQ.description:
You were raised in the south of Brevoy, a land of dense forests and rolling plains, of crystalline rivers and endless sapphire skies. You come from hearty stock and were raised with simple sensibilities of hard work winning well-deserved gains, the importance of charity and compassion, and the value of personal and familial honor. Yours is the country of the Aldori swordlords and the heroes who refused to bend before the armies of a violent conqueror. You care little for matters of politics and nobles or of deception and schemes. As you are thoroughly Brevic, the call for champions willing to expand your land's influence into the Stolen Lands has inflamed your sense of patriotism and honor, and so you have joined an expedition to quest southward.

Benefits: Your hardy nature grants you a +1 trait bonus on all Fortitude saves.
CcPTQN8nBjXib6xQ.name: Rostlander (Kingmaker)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against dragons.

When you encounter a dragon for the first time, you can attempt to improve its attitude toward you, by a maximum of one step, as a full-round action as long as you have not acted in a hostile manner toward it.

CdxYxXeTa5GRnORC.description:
You know how dragons move and how they perceive body language.

Requirements: Triaxian

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus to your CMD against dragons, and whenever you encounter a particular dragon for the first time, you can make a Diplomacy check to improve its attitude toward you by a maximum of one step as a full-round action as long as you have not acted in a hostile manner toward it.
CdxYxXeTa5GRnORC.name: Dragon Friend (Triaxian)

contextNotes.text: You can attempt untrained checks with this skill as long as the DC is lower than 15.

Cf7yAVwagJQ4Xsic.description:
Since you were young, you’ve always been interested in the process of lichdom and what drives people to desire such a fate. Nexian officials marked you as a traitor and exiled you when they discovered your morbid fascination with the consummate undead, but you still benefit from your forbidden studies.

Requirements: Nex

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (arcana) and (religion) checks. In addition, choose one Knowledge skill; you can attempt untrained checks with this skill as long as the DC is lower than 15.
Cf7yAVwagJQ4Xsic.name: Exiled Scholar (Nex)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against poison.  In addition, you are immune to <chosen poison>.

CgEWJ0bSx2W4XACb.description:
Your travels have brought you to the Jenivere through the dangerous port of Ilizmagorti, home to both pirates and assassins. Perhaps you're fleeing a price on your head, perhaps you've jumped ship from another vessel, or perhaps you're merely looking for a new start in a land where the dangers make themselves more obvious.

Benefits: Your familiarity with subtle slayings and toxins grants you a +2 trait bonus on all saves against poison. In addition, you can pick one type of poison listed below to be immune to, having undergone a long and painful process of building up an immunity to its effects: blue whinnis, giant wasp poison, medium spider venom, small centipede poison, or spider vine poison (a poison derived from a toxic plant native to the Mwangi Expanse).
CgEWJ0bSx2W4XACb.name: Boarded in Mediogalti (Serpent's Skull)

Cgy7N875ONR14Zh9.description:
You bear a strange birthmark on your body—something you’ve learned is the Sign of the Seeker’s Spiral, a rune associated with the secret society known as the Riftwardens. You have researched this rune, and have learned that the mark sometimes appears on the children of Riftwardens who have been exposed to particularly strange planar energies. Unfortunately, you never knew your parents, for you were raised by a foster family in Kenabres. Your foster family has conf irmed that both of your parents were Riftwardens, and has further conf irmed that your parents went missing on a secret mission into the Worldwound less than a month after you were born. You’re not sure what happened to them, but you’re certain they’re dead—and your gut tells you that the one who murdered them yet lives! In any event, you’ve long felt magic in your blood, and casting spells comes easily to you.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on all concentration checks.

Associated Mythic Path

Archmage

Multiple Characters

You should be siblings with any other character that takes this trait, so that you share the same missing parents. Your parents could even be foster parents.
Cgy7N875ONR14Zh9.name: Riftwarden Orphan (Wrath of the Righteous)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against spells with the pain descriptor.

Ch5hlZ7Z2CSBwnwj.description:
Your inhumanity extends to your very core.

Requirements: Android

Benefits: Pain receptors were omitted during your construction, so you gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against spells with the pain descriptor.

Additionally, once per day when you are healed by a spell that targets constructs (such as a make whole spell), you heal 1 extra hit point per level of the spell.
Ch5hlZ7Z2CSBwnwj.name: Blood Algorithm (Android)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on all rolls to confirm critical hits with ranged weapons.

ChuPvueB81g5GbE7.description:
You have lived in Alkenstar and served in its militia. You know just where to aim to do the most damage.

Requirements: Mana Wastes

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all rolls to confirm critical hits with ranged weapons.
ChuPvueB81g5GbE7.name: Alkenstar Defender (Mana Wastes)

contextNotes.text: -[[1]] penalty to AC while adjacent to allies or when taking the aid another action.
-[[1]] penalty on attack rolls while adjacent to allies or when taking the aid another action.

Cj6A6Oxf8cX6QlU8.description:
Raised by pirates, bandits, or other troublemakers unwilling to stick out their necks for you, you are accustomed to operating on your own. The presence of allies can easily become a distraction to you, and you do your best to keep them out of your space.

Effects: You take a –1 penalty to AC and on attack rolls while adjacent to allies or when taking the aid another action.
Cj6A6Oxf8cX6QlU8.name: Loner

ClHv7nLXZViVvbeb.description:
You have worked for a crime lord, either as a low- level enforcer or as a guard, and are adept at frightening away people.    

Requirements: Half-Orc

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate checks and Intimidate is always a class skill for you.
ClHv7nLXZViVvbeb.name: Brute (Half-Orc)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against divine spells.

CqSZ7nVsQPObKjpK.description:
Your god's own hatred of other deities is reflected in your ability to withstand the attacks of their followers.

Requirements: Rovagug

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all saves against divine spells.
CqSZ7nVsQPObKjpK.name: Hatred of the Gods (Rovagug)

Crtbm1TOp9QJSLLD.description:
You managed to uncover some lesser secrets of the Technic League, and have mastered a minor bit of magic.

Requirements: Numeria

Benefits: Choose a 0-level spell. You may cast that spell once per day as a spell-like ability. This is cast at your highest caster level gained; if you have no caster level, it functions at CL 1st.
Crtbm1TOp9QJSLLD.name: Technic Tinkerer (Numeria)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus on checks made to break things.
+[[2]] Trait bonus on checks made to sunder.

CsHbZg9XL94mnVNN.description:
You call on your faith to destroy.

Requirements: Rovagug

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Strength checks made to break things, as well as on combat maneuver checks to sunder.
CsHbZg9XL94mnVNN.name: Destructive Blows (Rovagug)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus when dealing with people of high social standing.
+[[2]] Trait bonus when dealing with people of high social standing.

CvXyQAcP2AbqEc6y.description:
You hail from the fringes of civilization or the bottommost strata of society, but something in your character makes that seem endearing.

Requirements: Ulfen Guard

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy and Perform checks when dealing with people of high social standing.
CvXyQAcP2AbqEc6y.name: Noble Savage (Ulfen Guard)

contextNotes.text: Whenever you are under the effect of a luck bonus of any kind, that bonus increases by [[1]].

Cvgd7Dehxxj6Muup.description:
The fates watch over you.

Benefits: Whenever you are under the effect of a luck bonus of any kind, that bonus increases by 1.
Cvgd7Dehxxj6Muup.name: Fate's Favored

contextNotes.text: You are considered to have 5 cold resistance when taking damage for the first time each day.
+[[2]] Bonus against fear effects of creatures with the cold subtype.

CwpzQe1xNRSAZyUj.description:
You narrowly escaped death when a Winter Witch punished you for supporting the Heralds.

Benefits: You gain cold resistance 5 against the first cold damage you take each day, and gain a +2 bonus on saving throws against the fear effects of creatures with the cold subtype.
CwpzQe1xNRSAZyUj.name: Winter Witchcraft Survivor

contextNotes.text:
+[[1]] Trait bonus to damage when flanking. 
 (This damage is multiplied on a critical hit).

Cx7zhRUItBbKqquy.description:
Pledging your faith to Norgorber's lethal shadow gives you the skill to make a brutal attack against an opponent who cannot fully fend you off.

Requirements: Thamir Gixx

Benefits: When you hit a foe you are flanking, you deal an additional 1 point of damage (this damage is added to your base damage, and is multiplied on a critical hit). This additional damage is a trait bonus.
Cx7zhRUItBbKqquy.name: Backstabber (Thamir Gixx)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on damage rolls against undead creatures.

Cz6pjXtEzfK0ZqXt.description:
You have dedicated your life to eradicating the scourge of the undead from Golarion. You have spent countless hours studying the different types of undead and have trained endlessly to learn the best ways to defeat them. If any undead creatures come out of the tombs of Wati’s necropolis, you’ll be ready for them!

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on damage rolls against undead creatures. In addition, you gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (religion) checks, and that skill is always a class skill for you.
Cz6pjXtEzfK0ZqXt.name: Undead Crusader (Mummy's Mask)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against chosen humanoid subtype.

D3QMDBocgbpsKTSf.description:
You were brutally betrayed, and you have dedicated yourself to pursuing revenge.

Benefits: Choose a humanoid subtype that is not your own from the following list: dwarf, elf, gnome, halfling, or human. You gain a +2 trait bonus on Intimidate checks against creatures with that subtype.
D3QMDBocgbpsKTSf.name: Vengeful (AH)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus damage when flanking (it is multiplied on a critical hit).

D7arK8uRynr5q7TA.description:
You wouldn't have lived to make it out of childhood without the aid of a sibling, friend, or companion on whom you could always count to distract your enemies long enough to do a little bit more damage than normal. That companion may be another PC or an NPC (who may even be recently departed from your side).

Benefits: When you hit a foe you are flanking, you deal an additional 1 point of damage (this damage is added to your base damage, and is multiplied on a critical hit). This additional damage is a trait bonus.
D7arK8uRynr5q7TA.name: Dirty Fighter

DBDfAL1mRWINLudC.description:
As a minor Ustalavic noble, you have friends linked to Karcau’s fiendish cults. Your observations give you a keen insight into the blasphemies of the idle rich.

Requirements: Ustalav

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nobility) and Knowledge (planes) checks.
DBDfAL1mRWINLudC.name: Dreadful Forethought (Ustalav)

DBdwI4VZjsH4yOv3.description:
Your travels in the wildlands gave you insight into how to survive their dangers and communicate with their inhabitants.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all Linguistics and Survival checks, and Linguistics is always a class skill for you.
DBdwI4VZjsH4yOv3.name: Weathered Emissary

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus vs evil creatures

DJI3AyJ8mzsfZTDa.description: Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Charisma checks against evil creatures. If you select the Leadership feat or the Vile Leadership feat at any point when you meet the prerequisites for that feat, you can recruit a cohort who is up to 1 level lower than you (instead of the normal requirement that your cohort must be 2 or more levels lower than you are) as long as your cohort is evil.
DJI3AyJ8mzsfZTDa.name: Wicked Leader

DL5ZOB38uykt2QoK.description:
You’ve always held the strong belief that morality is everyone’s choice, and that those who act in wicked ways have simply never been shown how their actions truly affect others. If they could be shown their errors, then they would accept a more positive course of action—and you have just enough patience to see this through.

Benefits: When acting as a sponsor for an evil creature seeking redemption, your patience and kindness grant the creature a +3 bonus on its save rather than a +1 bonus.
DL5ZOB38uykt2QoK.name: Redeemer

contextNotes.text: Once per day as an immediate action, you can cause yourself to forget a single event or fact for a period of 10 minutes. Enemies reading your mind cannot learn the information. Until the memory returns, you gain a +[[10]] Trait bonus on Bluff checks to convince others that you do not know the information.

DPK3zdJvDC0F7qEA.description:
You can suppress your own memories to help tell more convincing lies.

Requirements: Gillman

Benefits: Once per day as an immediate action, you can cause yourself to forget a single event or fact for a period of 10 minutes. Enemies reading your mind cannot learn the information. Until the memory returns, you gain a +10 trait bonus on Bluff checks to convince others that you do not know the information.
DPK3zdJvDC0F7qEA.name: Memory Mastery (Gillman)

DRZiHmSmvNwKM2p4.description:
While you belong to a noble family, hailing from the outlying prefectures means you lack the pull and wealth needed to rub shoulders with the stars of Oppara’s social scene. Your life has been quiet, isolated from the thrum of fashion and pop culture, but you see this as a source of insight and aim to help people by someday joining the senate. It’ll be a long journey, but you’ve already begun learning which hands to shake and how to listen carefully when others tell you what they want.

Benefits: You gain a +1 bonus on Diplomacy and Knowledge (local) checks, and both of these skills are always class skills for you. Once each week you can call on family connections to obtain a single piece of equipment or consumable magic item (such as a potion or scroll) worth up to your character level × 25 gp. Delivery of the goods you request takes 1d4 days. At 10th level, the potential value of a magical item increases to your character level × 50 gp, and your requests can also include spellcasting services and wands.
DRZiHmSmvNwKM2p4.name: Senatorial Hopeful (War for the Crown)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] to caster level when you cast a divination spell,  If you use your heirloom harrow deck as an additional focus component.

DV7X8XwG2LtJ9heH.description:
All your life you’ve been drawn to the mysteries surrounding your family’s harrow deck.

Requirements: Varisian Human Heritage

Benefits: You begin play with your family’s heirloom harrow deck. If you use this specific harrow deck as an additional focus component when you cast a divination spell, your caster level is treated as being 2 levels higher.

Additionally, twice per week, you can spend 10 minutes consulting this harrow deck on a particular action to gain the effects of the spell Augury as a spellcaster of your character level. No one other than you gains these benefits from this harrow deck.

If your harrow deck is destroyed, it cannot be replaced. However, by returning to your family, paying 300 gp on materials, and spending 1 week immersed in the songs and stories of your people, you can create a new harrow deck that grants half the benefits of the lost heirloom.
DV7X8XwG2LtJ9heH.name: Harrow Chosen (Human; Varisian)

contextNotes.text: If you take 10, you gain an additional +[[2]] bonus.

DWgmQjRRmUmf7HYM.description:
As a child, you struggled to suppress a sharp temper, but the care and patient respect of a trusted community leader rubbed off on you. As you grew older, you developed a remarkable ability to keep calm and collected when performing a task you are familiar with.

Benefits: Choose one Craft or Profession skill. Whenever you take 10 with that skill, determine the result as if you had rolled a 12 instead of a 10.

Suggested Characters

Asmodeans, Drumans, Irorans.
DWgmQjRRmUmf7HYM.name: Patient Calm

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against charm and compulsion effects.

DZpEwPJbhnCwXAxX.description:
You were born with a strange birthmark that looks very similar to the holy symbol of the god you chose to worship later in life.

Benefits: This birthmark can serve you as a divine focus for casting spells, and you gain a +2 trait bonus on all saving throws against charm and compulsion effects.
DZpEwPJbhnCwXAxX.name: Birthmark

DcrOjrqC08GxzJqS.description:
You’re a master of dominating slaves through body language and inflection, and this ability carries over into other lines of work as well.

Requirements: Okeno

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate checks, and it becomes a class skill for you.
DcrOjrqC08GxzJqS.name: Cruel Master (Okeno)

contextNotes.text: Once per day, you can apply an alternate ability modifier to a skill check instead of its usual ability modifier,  exchanging between the following pairings: Strength with Intelligence, Dexterity with Wisdom, and Constitution with Charisma. ([[@resources.balancedEducationAnuli.value]] remaining uses)

DezcDkdnDs5jDN4b.description:
Your upbringing focused on strengthening mind and body in equal measure.

Requirements: Anuli

Benefits: Once per day, you can draw on this training to apply a physical ability modifier to a skill check instead of its usual mental ability modifier, or apply a mental ability modifier to a skill check instead of its usual physical ability modifier. You can only exchange ability modifiers between the following pairings: Strength with Intelligence, Dexterity with Wisdom, and Constitution with Charisma.
DezcDkdnDs5jDN4b.name: Balanced Education (Anuli)

DiPPiCbdKeA56VIE.description:
You don’t trust witches. They deal with otherworldly beings, consort with beasts, and brew vile poisons in their cauldrons. As a child, perhaps you barely escaped some horrid fate at the hands of an evil witch, or maybe a loved one was stolen from you by a witch’s charms. Perhaps you wanted to be a witch yourself, but the local witch refused to take you on as an apprentice. Whatever the reason, you now hate witches, and have dedicated your life to ferreting them out and exposing their wickedness for all to see. You know that the North is full of winter witches, and should you ever find yourself there, you’ll relish bringing your justice to them as well.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks, and Sense Motive is a class skill for you. In addition, you begin the campaign with 1d4 Hex Nails.
DiPPiCbdKeA56VIE.name: Vigilante Witch Hunter (Reign of Winter)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on weapon damage rolls against opponents you have witnessed dealing damage to one of your allies.

DlXAFse5nhcX9bKa.description:
You protect your own.

Requirements: Ratfolk

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on weapon damage rolls against opponents you have witnessed dealing damage to one of your allies.
DlXAFse5nhcX9bKa.name: Ratfolk Avenger (Ratfolk)

contextNotes.text: You don’t suffer the effects of failing checks by 5 or more.

Dm9t7aVWV06aAzk7.description:
Your deity has granted you an uncanny ability to find the true worth of items.

Requirements: Abadar

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Appraise checks, you don’t suffer the effects of failing such checks by 5 or more, and Appraise is a class skill for you.
Dm9t7aVWV06aAzk7.name: Eye for Quality (Abadar)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus in dim light.

Dnk8zlgndsSaf4fF.description:
You were raised in the Shadow district of Magnimar beneath the Irespan, a veiled place the light of the sun touches for only 3 hours per day.

Requirements: Magnimar in Varisia

Benefits: Your well-founded suspicions grant you a +2 trait bonus on Perception checks in dim light, and Perception is always a class skill for you.
Dnk8zlgndsSaf4fF.name: Underbridge Dweller (Varisia; Magnimar)

DpS5tEgLOE78wmnQ.description:
You excel at maximizing mercantile contacts and convincing merchants to dig just a bit deeper into their pockets for you.

Requirements: Katapesh

Benefits: Whenever you buy from or sell to a merchant, you treat a settlement’s Base Value and Purchase Limit (Pathfinder RPG GameMastery Guide 204) as 10% higher.
DpS5tEgLOE78wmnQ.name: Commercial Savvy (Katapesh)

DtixN9Xqmhblr83C.description:
You were raised with defiance, fear, or hatred of a particular sort of foe.

Benefits: To make you ready to resist such foes, you were trained for long hours in the proper ways to defeat them. Choose a foe from the ranger’s list of favored enemies. You gain a +1 trait bonus on attacks of opportunity against the chosen foe.

Suggested Characters

Dwarves, Isgeri, Mendevian crusaders.
DtixN9Xqmhblr83C.name: Sworn Enemy

DtvKrBnTexwkHBF2.description:
You are unusually perceptive when dealing with others.

Requirements: Sivanah

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks, and Sense Motive becomes a class skill for you.
DtvKrBnTexwkHBF2.name: Strip the Veils (Sivanah)

contextNotes.text: The amount of hit points restored by your Heal checks to treat deadly wounds is increased by 1.
The amount of hit points restored by your extracts of the healing subschool is increased by 1.

DueRdn68KT3RRj2n.description:
After witnessing a terrible disaster result from an attempt at magical healing in the Mana Wastes, you are careful and methodical when crafting your own healing tinctures.

Requirements: Alchemist healers who hail from the Mana Wastes or who have lived there for at least 1 year

Benefits: The amount of hit points restored by your Heal checks to treat deadly wounds and your extracts of the healing subschool is increased by 1.
DueRdn68KT3RRj2n.name: Mana Wastes Medic (Mana Wastes; Alchemist)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus to settle disputes or arbitrate laws.
+[[1]] Trait bonus to settle disputes or arbitrate laws.

Once per day if you succeed at an Intimidate check to demoralize a foe who has repudiated or ignored a pronounced judgment you’ve made, you may choose to cause the creature to be sickened instead of shaken. ([[@resources.justiciarRahadoum.value]] remaining uses)

DuosH4UCo6Qs2IWh.description:
You are experienced in interpreting and applying legal doctrine, notably the Laws of Man, independent of any divine mandates.

Requirements: Rahadoum

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy and Knowledge (local) checks to settle disputes or arbitrate laws. Once per day if you succeed at an Intimidate check to demoralize a foe who has repudiated or ignored a pronounced judgment you’ve made, you may choose to cause the creature to be sickened instead of shaken. The duration of the effect remains the same.
DuosH4UCo6Qs2IWh.name: Justiciar (Rahadoum)

contextNotes.text: Once per day, when you would gain a bonus on a skill check from reading a book, you can increase that bonus by 1. ([[@resources.librarianDarkArchive.value]] remaining uses)

DvDOCRNLk3zHSOht.description:
You are trained to manage and maintain books, and you find it easy to procure information from tomes.

Requirements: Dark Archive

Benefits: You gain a +1 bonus on Linguistics or Profession (librarian) checks, and one of these skills (your choice) becomes a class skill for you. Once per day when you would gain a bonus on a skill check from reading a book, you can increase that bonus by 1.
DvDOCRNLk3zHSOht.name: Librarian (Dark Archive)

contextNotes.text: Once per day +[[2]] to Caster level when determining a Conjuration school spell’s duration.  ([[@resources.masterOfPentaclesDarkArchive.value]] remaining uses)

DwYh8hWBn8USNV2R.description:
Your many years spent studying the art of summoning have given you a unique knowledge of this subtle and complicated discipline.

Requirements: Dark Archive

Benefits: Once per day, when casting a spell of the Conjuration school, treat your caster level as two higher when determining the spell’s duration.
DwYh8hWBn8USNV2R.name: Master of Pentacles (Dark Archive)

Dwyt8oIwtzEn0Wbw.description:
Requirements: Half-Orc

Benefits: Increase the number of rounds you can act as disabled from your orc ferocity racial trait to 2 rounds.
Dwyt8oIwtzEn0Wbw.name: Lasting Ferociousness (Half-Orc)

DxlmHHCnF3io3V5q.description:
You feel compelled to correct every action and argument that contradicts your worldview.

Effects: Whenever you witness an action or hear an argument that contradicts your alignment, you must attempt to stop or correct that action or argument. If you either don’t try to stop it or fail in your attempt to stop it (as adjudicated by the GM), you are shaken for 1 hour.
DxlmHHCnF3io3V5q.name: Headstrong

E32ytIb2LTeamPAo.description:
You were either born or sold into slavery, but were freed by Andoren abolitionists. Your strong will helped you persevere in captivity, and gave you strength to start again from nothing in your new life in Andoran.

Requirements: Andoran

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Will saves.
E32ytIb2LTeamPAo.name: Freed Slave (Andoran)

contextNotes.text: The first time each day that you fail a saving throw against a charm or compulsion effect, you can reroll that saving throw. If you do so, you gain a +2 trait bonus on this roll and use this result as the actual result for that saving throw.

E38Ya3UMxlDeZGbv.description:
You come from an especially esteemed family, religious order, school, or other group that worships Shizuru, and draw upon that tradition to maintain your identity.

Requirements: Shizuru

Benefits: The first time each day that you fail a saving throw against a charm or compulsion effect, you can reroll that saving throw. If you do so, you gain a +2 trait bonus on this roll and use this result as the actual result for that saving throw.
E38Ya3UMxlDeZGbv.name: Pristine Reputation (Shizuru)

E3IE0WxN8cuD6zg3.description:
Your facility with contracts makes you good at understanding dense text and obfuscating your intent.

Requirements: Asmodeus

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Linguistics checks, and it becomes a class skill for you.
E3IE0WxN8cuD6zg3.name: Contract Master (Asmodeus)

contextNotes.text: +[[4]] Trait bonus on checks related to megafauna.

E3aJ19DMXh4Jtr5D.description:
You have experience trapping and training large creatures such as mammoths, mastodons, woolly rhinoceroses, and other megafauna.

Requirements: Realm of the Mammoth Lords

Benefits: You gain a +4 trait bonus on Handle Animal checks related to these creatures.
E3aJ19DMXh4Jtr5D.name: Mammoth Master (Realm of the Mammoth Lords)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to disguise yourself as a statue made of your chosen specific type of stone.

E5BnaRSFcRTBEXac.description:
You inherited the statuesque physical features of your shaitan parent.

Requirements: Oread

Benefits: Disguise becomes a class skill for you, and you gain a +2 trait bonus on Disguise checks to disguise yourself as a statue made of a specific type of stone, such as marble, sandstone, or alabaster. Furthermore, you take none of the penalties normally associated with disguising yourself as a different type of creature. You must choose the type of stone you resemble when you take this trait; once chosen, it cannot be changed.
E5BnaRSFcRTBEXac.name: Statuesque (Oread)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on damage rolls against the last creature that damaged you in the past 24 hours.

E6SuobtuRc6iNeIG.description:
During your childhood, you suffered occasional or frequent abuse from those too powerful for you to resist. Now you thrill at the chance to get back at those who wronged you.

Benefits: Whenever you strike the last creature that damaged you in the past 24 hours, you gain a +1 trait bonus on damage rolls against that creature.

Suggested Characters

Calistrians, Galtan refugees, Gyronna worshipers
E6SuobtuRc6iNeIG.name: Vengeful (QC)

contextNotes.text:
Once per day when you hit a foe with a melee attack, you can attempt an aid another action as a free action to increase an adjacent ally’s AC against that foe.
 If you succeed, you grant the ally a +4 bonus to AC instead of a +2 bonus for that round.

E7m7OGYpJeMyV1I7.description:
When you were too young to fight, you witnessed a great tragedy befall an innocent and you swore to Trudd you’d become strong enough to prevent something like that from happening again.

Requirements: Trudd

Benefits: Once per day when you hit a foe with a melee attack, you can attempt an aid another action as a free action to increase an adjacent ally’s AC against that foe. If you succeed, you grant the ally a +4 bonus to AC instead of a +2 bonus for that round.
E7m7OGYpJeMyV1I7.name: Mighty Protector (Trudd)

E9L1u8r9usirhmOu.description:
You can call forth a surge of elemental energy to strike against your foes.

Requirements: The Concordance

Benefits: Once per day, you can target a distant foe with an elemental attack. This functions as one of the following cleric domain powers, chosen whenever you activate this ability: acid dart, fire bolt, icicle, lightning arc, or storm burst. Your effective cleric level for this ability is equal to your character level. You can use this ability one additional time per day at 5th level and every 5 levels thereafter.
E9L1u8r9usirhmOu.name: Balanced Offensive (The Concordance)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against attacks that deal cold damage.
You may ignore the penalty for ice and can move across ice at normal speed.

ECSBmHx5MJrkJ38Q.description:
You spent years roaming the frozen tundra of the frigid north, and have adapted to its numbing effects.

Requirements: Kellid Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against attacks that deal cold damage. Furthermore, you may ignore the Acrobatics penalty for ice and can move across ice at normal speed.
ECSBmHx5MJrkJ38Q.name: Ice Walker (Human; Kellid)

EE6PFnHDYR8fcBRq.description:
Brought up in courtly environments and knowing little of violence, you have trouble getting accustomed to it.

Effects: Whenever you have less than half your maximum hit points, you are Shaken.
EE6PFnHDYR8fcBRq.name: Sheltered

contextNotes.text: -[[1]] penalty on all Charisma-based skill checks made when dealing with members of Brevic nobility. (The penalty aspect of this trait is removed if you ever manage to establish yourself as a true noble.)

EEN0uCMKVlSpHByD.description:
One of your parents was a member of one of the great families of Brevoy, perhaps even of the line of Rogarvia itself. Yet you have no substantive proof of your nobility, and you've learned that claiming nobility without evidence makes you as good as a liar. While you might own a piece of jewelry, a scrap of once-rich fabric, or an aged confession of love, none of this directly supports your claim. Thus, you've lived your life in the shadow of nobility, knowing that you deserve the comforts and esteem of the elite, even though the contempt of fate brings you nothing but their scorn. Whether a recent attempt to prove your heritage has brought down the wrath of a noble family's henchmen or you merely seek to prove the worth of the blood in your veins, you've joined an expedition into the Stolen Lands, hoping to make a name all your own.

Requirements: Human

Benefits: You take a –1 penalty on all Charisma-based skill checks made when dealing with members of Brevic nobility but gain a +1 trait bonus on Will saves as a result of your stubbornness and individuality. (The penalty aspect of this trait is removed if you ever manage to establish yourself as a true noble.)
EEN0uCMKVlSpHByD.name: Bastard (Kingmaker)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus to Caster level when casting illusions in the figment subschool.

EF4DhppMPz47ZYE8.description:
After realizing the great potential of illusions—particularly figments—for use in pranks, you became obsessed with studying their properties and better methods to cast them.

Requirements: Gnome

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus to your caster level when casting illusions in the figment subschool.
EF4DhppMPz47ZYE8.name: Illusion Obsession (Gnome)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus to convince someone that another person is actually at fault for your actions.
+[[1]] Trait bonus to convince someone that another person is actually at fault for your actions.

EH6yQKutyVkgRvjk.description:
You have learned many tricks to keep yourself from facing the consequences of your misdeeds.

Requirements: Spitespawn Tiefling Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff and Diplomacy checks made to convince someone that another person is actually at fault for your actions.
EH6yQKutyVkgRvjk.name: Shift the Blame (Tiefling; Spitespawn)

contextNotes.text: +[[3]] Trait bonus when you are using Craft (alchemy) to craft an alchemical item. (this trait provides +2 Trait bonus to Craft (alchemy) at all times)

EKFHTQbIXCxGvk7k.description:
Alchemy is a point of national pride in Thuvia, home of the famous sun orchid elixir. But resources are often hard to come by in the blasted desert landscape, so you have found creative ways to create many of the tools you need to survive.

Requirements: Thuvia

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Craft (alchemy) skill checks. This bonus increases to +3 when you are using Craft (alchemy) to craft an alchemical item.
EKFHTQbIXCxGvk7k.name: Resourceful Alchemy (Thuvia)

EMlQEPAusqxV4OpW.description:
The blood of outer dragons courses through your veins, and you’ve inherited a portion of their magic.

Benefits: You gain Draconic as a bonus language. In addition, if you are a sorcerer with the draconic bloodline, you can select one of the outer dragon types for your bloodline powers; this affects your resistances and the type of energy damage dealt by a number of your abilities.

Dragon Type

Energy Type

Breath Shape

Lunar

Cold

60-foot line

Solar

Fire

60-foot line

Time

Electricity

30-foot cone

Void

Cold

30-foot cone

Vortex

Fire

30-foot cone
EMlQEPAusqxV4OpW.name: Outer Dragon Blood

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to identify magical items.

EN1QL33d2CYjSz0Z.description:
Requirements: Lissala

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Spellcraft checks made to identify magical items.
EN1QL33d2CYjSz0Z.name: Loreseeker (Lissala)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against the spells, spell-like abilities, and supernatural abilities of evil arcane spellcasters.
+[[1]] Trait bonus to identify spells cast by evil arcane spellcasters.

EQD78rbySaVk2q49.description:
Sometime in your youth, you encountered a location, object, or being steeped in the power of evil witchcraft. Whether you were the victim of this force, were a conduit for it, or merely witnessed its effects, the event changed your life. You have tried to put the strange incident behind you and forget it, but nebulous premonitions of danger and eerie feelings of deja vu have dogged your steps ever since. For some inexplicable reason, you feel drawn to the lands of the North, though you fear another encounter with the evil witchcraft that touched you once before. Whether through your purity, the blessing of goodly spirits, an innate determination, or an intuitive and inexplicable familiarity with the ways of black magic, you have acquired a resilience against the power of the dark arts.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against the spells, spell-like abilities, and supernatural abilities of evil arcane spellcasters, and a +1 trait bonus on Spellcraft checks to identify spells cast by evil arcane spellcasters.
EQD78rbySaVk2q49.name: Warded against Witchery (Reign of Winter)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on your weapon damage roll whenever you use the charge action.

EUYOQWD2rlPqDFzy.description:
Your feline agility helps you inflict a devastating blow at the end of a charge.

Requirements: Weretiger-Kin Skinwalker Heritage

Benefits: Whenever you use the charge action, you gain a +1 trait bonus on your weapon damage roll.
EUYOQWD2rlPqDFzy.name: Tiger's Claw (Skinwalker; Weretiger-Kin)

contextNotes.text: -[[2]] penalty vs charm and compulsion effects if promised wealth or power by the source of the effect.

EWPbzQPXd4gNVkjk.description:
You’re addicted to power.

Effects: You take a –2 penalty on Will saving throws against charm and compulsion effects if the creature creating the effect promises wealth or power.
EWPbzQPXd4gNVkjk.name: Power-Hungry

EX6pRWyQWJshvt3V.description: Benefits: Once per day as a swift action, you can lose a single 1st-, 2nd- or 3rd-level magus spell to regain 1 arcane pool point. You can’t exceed the maximum number of arcane pool points in your arcane pool by using this trait.
EX6pRWyQWJshvt3V.name: Malleable Magic

contextNotes.text: Whenever you move at least 10 feet before making an attack with a thrown weapon, you add 10 feet to the range increment of the weapon thrown. You can only gain this benefit once per round.

EXe2Pn4t0KNeCVB2.description:
You have been trained in the javelin and the spear, and know how to make the best use of your momentum.

Benefits: Whenever you move at least 10 feet before making an attack with a thrown weapon, you add 10 feet to the range increment of the weapon thrown.

Restrictions

You can only gain this benefit once per round.
EXe2Pn4t0KNeCVB2.name: Strong Arm, Supple Wrist

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to send secret messages and to imply you serve a powerful sinister conspiracy, evil authority figure, or shadow government.
+[[2]] Trait bonus when interacting with a powerful sinister conspiracy, evil authority figure, or shadow government.

Ea7YFhkORjF6Dbzr.description:
You came of age in a place where fetchlings serve dark forces.

Requirements: Fetchling

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Bluff checks to send secret messages and to imply you serve a powerful sinister conspiracy, evil authority figure, or shadow government. You also gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks when interacting with such entities.
Ea7YFhkORjF6Dbzr.name: Murky Allegiance (Fetchling)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus on combat maneuver checks as long as you or your opponent is on sand or in water at least 6 inches deep.
+[[2]] Trait bonus on combat maneuver checks as long as you or your opponent is on sand or in water at least 6 inches deep.

EadqYpgiwAKfp5sh.description:
You were raised without many toys or possessions, but you made do exploring every detail of the nearby seashore, and know how to spot potential tools or obstacles.

Requirements: Wereshark-Kin Skwinwalker Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on combat maneuver checks as long as you or your opponent is on sand or in water at least 6 inches deep.
EadqYpgiwAKfp5sh.name: Shoreline Skirmisher (Skinwalker; Wereshark-Kin)

contextNotes.text: Once per day that you spend in Riddleport you can make a single check with a skill bonus of +15. ([[@resources.cyphermageBackerRiddleport.value]] remaining uses)
Once per day that you spend in Riddleport you can make a single check with a skill bonus of +15. ([[@resources.cyphermageBackerRiddleport.value]] remaining uses)

Efpl0C8xrS59nCpS.description:
You’ve sold relics to a Cyphermage in the past, and she’s agreed to assist you with future findings.

Requirements: Riddleport

Benefits: When in Riddleport, you can use your contact to gain information about artifacts and history. Treat this ability as a single Knowledge (arcana) or Knowledge (history) check with a skill bonus of +15. You may make this check once per day that you spend in Riddleport. You can make a new check every day. Each time you do so, you can choose whether to use Knowledge (arcana) or Knowledge (history).
Efpl0C8xrS59nCpS.name: Cyphermage Backer (Riddleport)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus while wielding signature masterwork item in starting equipment in one or both hands.
+[[1]] Trait bonus while wielding signature masterwork item in starting equipment in one or both hands.

EiOuEHwbjwXWIoWE.description:
You’re known for some unique item that has become your trademark.

Benefits: Your starting equipment includes a single masterwork item worth less than 900 gp, and you gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff and Intimidate checks while wielding this item in one or both hands.
EiOuEHwbjwXWIoWE.name: Signature Moves

Ekfuo8nna0m8mVVM.description:
Following the path of freedom has resulted in you being threatened by ruffians and bullies throughout your childhood, and it now takes a lot to rattle you.

Benefits: You increase the DC to demoralize you with an Intimidate check by 2.
Ekfuo8nna0m8mVVM.name: Undaunted

contextNotes.text: You can move at full speed without penalty while following tracks left by [creatureType] and [creatureType].

EoAt218C3b6JppeO.description:
You have made it your mission to bring down a fearsome beast.

Benefits: Choose two of the following: aberrations, animals, dragons, fey, magical beasts, oozes, and vermin. You can move at full speed without penalty while using Survival to follow tracks left by your chosen creature types.
EoAt218C3b6JppeO.name: Monster Challenger

EtGHJuDrcz9RSA9N.description:
You understand the importance of keeping the peace in your community and you have learned how to speak to the faithful in ways that they understand.

Requirements: Erastil

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks and Diplomacy is always a class skill for you.
EtGHJuDrcz9RSA9N.name: Erastil's Speaker (Erastil)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] bonus to damage on all attacks against creatures of the giant type.

EtUNYMr9ykH2XhZA.description:
Your home community prides itself on remaining independent from Varisia’s city-states.

Requirements: Varisia

Benefits: Choose one of Varisia’s unaffiliated settlements from this list below. You gain a +1 trait bonus on Survival checks and one of the following benefits.

Turtleback Ferry

Gain a +1 bonus to damage on all attacks against creatures of the giant type.


Special Note

This is one of five versions of this trait. Other versions can be found here:

Regional Recluse - Arsmeril or Crying Leaf (Varisia)

Regional Recluse - Ilsurian (Varisia)

Regional Recluse - Sanos Forest or Whistledown (Varisia)

Regional Recluse - Urglin (Varisia)
EtUNYMr9ykH2XhZA.name: Regional Recluse - Turtleback Ferry (Varisia)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on attacks made while flanking an opponent.

F26KrVQ5iHHS9QdU.description:
As part of Amanandar's militia, you have trained extensively with groups.

Requirements: Amanandar

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attacks made while flanking an opponent.
F26KrVQ5iHHS9QdU.name: Militia (Amanandar)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against the supernatural abilities of undead creatures.

F2HyQLf4zf4X3Dqn.description:
You have lived for a time deep inside the necropolises of the pharaohs. Your exposure to undead creatures and their necromantic energies has strengthened your ability to resist the powers of the unliving.

Requirements: Pahmet Dwarf Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against the supernatural abilities of undead creatures.
F2HyQLf4zf4X3Dqn.name: Deathkeeper (Dwarf; Pahmet)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus on checks related to lawful deities, their clergy, their mythology, and their tenets.

F2kamRzSb1xLQyGZ.description:
You worship the amalgamation of lawful deities known as the Godclaw.

Requirements: Lawful alignment

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge (religion) checks related to lawful deities, their clergy, their mythology, and their tenets. Additionally, Knowledge (religion) is a class skill for you.
F2kamRzSb1xLQyGZ.name: Godclaw Disciple (Lawful)

contextNotes.text: The DCs of any Heal checks to stop bleed damage you are suffering are reduced by 4.

F3F4eCxCM0m6UO9e.description:
In your youth, a Rahadoumi witch granted you a boon promoting your continued health and long life.

Requirements: Must hail from Rahadoum or have lived there for at least 1 year

Benefits: The DCs of any Heal checks to stop bleed damage you are suffering are reduced by 4.
F3F4eCxCM0m6UO9e.name: Patron's Boon (Rahadoum)

contextNotes.text: +[[5]] Trait bonus on opposed checks versus any creature trying to discern your true age using Perception or Sense Motive.
+[[2]] Trait bonus if your disguise makes you look at least one age category older.  You also ignore the check penalty for disguising yourself as a different age category while doing so.

FAk5SzHCavdFUPmc.description:
Your fragile flesh shows signs of years not yet lived.

Requirements: Ancient-Born Dhampir Heritage

Benefits: Any creature trying to discern your true age must make a Perception or Sense Motive check opposed by your Bluff check; you gain a +5 trait bonus on this check. You gain a +2 trait bonus on Disguise checks if your disguise makes you look at least one age category older, and ignore the check penalty for disguising yourself as a different age category while doing so.
FAk5SzHCavdFUPmc.name: Old Before Your Time (Dhampir; Ancient-Born)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus on weapon damage rolls, for the surprise round only, when you wield a masterwork version of any sword and if you act before your opponent during the surprise round. This additional damage is precision damage.

FElsW6WON7UIZKmU.description:
You have mastered the deadly fighting arts of your people.

Requirements: Tian Human Heritage

Benefits: When you wield a masterwork version of any sword if you act before your opponent during the surprise round, you gain a +2 trait bonus on weapon damage rolls for the surprise round only. This additional damage is precision damage.
FElsW6WON7UIZKmU.name: Master of the Sudden Strike (Human; Tian)

contextNotes.text: In any combat in which you act during the surprise round, you gain a +[[3]] Trait bonus on your initiative check.

FM5wR3p0Cxva47si.description:
When your weretiger heritage first manifested, you spent a period of time living off what you could catch, developing a sharp instinct to act when your foes were most vulnerable.

Requirements: Weretiger-Kin Skinwalker Heritage

Benefits: In any combat in which you act during the surprise round, you gain a +3 trait bonus on your initiative check.
FM5wR3p0Cxva47si.name: Feline Instinct (Skinwalker; Weretiger-Kin)

contextNotes.text: +[[1] Trait bonus on melee attacks when charging.

FMvSbPEpgXTLflm1.description:
Requirements: Angradd

Benefits: You hope to earn a place at Angradd’s side after death and are inspired to charge with all your might into any righteous battle. You gain a +1 trait bonus on all melee attack rolls when you charge.
FMvSbPEpgXTLflm1.name: Angradd's Valor (Angradd)

contextNotes.text: With at least 1 day of effort, you can attempt an appropriate Profession check to earn money or gain capital using the downtime rules (Ultimate Campaign 76) with a +[[2]] trait bonus. In the event of a failed check, your opportunity is discovered by rivals and you cannot employ this trait for 1 month while you look for a new opportunity.

Fb6CmqKkpWQ6q2fu.description:
You were raised under the Prophecies of Kalistrade, and were inspired to seize upon an untapped business opportunity.

Benefits: Up to once per week, when you work to advance this opportunity with at least 1 day of effort, you can attempt an appropriate Profession check to earn money or gain capital using the downtime rules (Ultimate Campaign 76) with a +2 trait bonus. In the event of a failed check, your opportunity is discovered by rivals and you cannot employ this trait for 1 month while you look for a new opportunity.
Fb6CmqKkpWQ6q2fu.name: Kalistocratic Prophecy

FbKbQqa4psU4LF1c.description:
Your forebears served in an Army of Exploration, and you retain that expansionist spirit.

Requirements: Taldan Human Heritage

Benefits: Select a terrain from the ranger’s list of favored terrains. Once selected, this choice cannot be changed. Once per day while in the selected terrain, you may move across nonmagical difficult terrain as though it were not difficult terrain until the end of your turn.
FbKbQqa4psU4LF1c.name: Destined Pioneer (Human; Taldan)

Fbs66mQ52knFD0ri.description:
Deep, compulsive greed gnaws at you.

Effects: Whenever monetary treasure is divided, you must end up with a greater share of that treasure than your companions or you’re wracked with feelings of jealousy and ill will. When treasure is divided, if you do not end up with at least 10% more treasure than any other individual companion does, you have a hard time being helpful to your allies. You become irritable, and can’t take the aid another action for the next week.
Fbs66mQ52knFD0ri.name: Avarice

FcfsRzZxg1vTnd5X.description:
From the moment you were old enough to walk, you learned how to ride the mighty warhorses of Lastwall.

Requirements: Lastwall

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Ride checks, and Ride is always a class skill for you.
FcfsRzZxg1vTnd5X.name: Lastwall Cavalry Rider (Lastwall)

FjYG3EwxKzKjv0GA.description:
You know how to guilefully weave words, sway hearts and minds, verbally destroy rivals, and pierce cunning lies.

Exemplar Type: Social Exemplar

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff, Diplomacy, Intimidate, and Sense Motive checks. This bonus increases by 1 for every two other social traits you have.

Exemplar Traits: A character can have only one exemplar trait, and selecting an exemplar trait takes the place of two regular traits. Each exemplar trait is tied to a trait category, such as combat traits or regional traits; a character with an exemplar trait is no longer restricted to a single trait of that category and can select any number of such traits when gaining further traits. In addition, a character with an exemplar trait can select the Additional Traits feat any number of times and use the feat to gain an exemplar trait of a valid trait category for which they qualify.
FjYG3EwxKzKjv0GA.name: Charming Smile, Cunning Soul

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus on melee weapon damage rolls made against foes that cannot see you.

FjwX14Fx8vw9AfRc.description:
An instinct for dishonorable conduct serves you well when fighting opponents who are blind, oblivious, or blundering around in the dark.

Requirements: Tiefling

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on melee weapon damage rolls made against foes that cannot see you.
FjwX14Fx8vw9AfRc.name: Shadow Stabber (Tiefling)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to confirm critical hits with axes.

FmphLnuxSDSMCOFh.description:
No one knows how to swing an axe better than a Bellisian!

Requirements: Bellis [in Andoran]

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on all rolls made to confirm critical hits with axes (battle axe, hand axe, or greataxe).
FmphLnuxSDSMCOFh.name: Bellis Axe Master (Bellis)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus to resist the effects of cold weather.

Fo3R2smFAwUr9CLP.description:
You are one of the brave travelers who have traversed the Path of Aganhei, a lucrative trade route from Tian Xia to Avistan that crosses the frigid Crown of the World.

Requirements: Crown of the World

Benefits: These voyages have left you hardier, granting you a +1 trait bonus on Fortitude saving throws to resist the effects of cold weather. Survival is a class skill for you, and you gain Hallit, Hon-La, Minkaian, Skald, or Tien as a bonus language.
Fo3R2smFAwUr9CLP.name: Footsteps of Aganhei (Crown of the World)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus vs disarm, steal, and sunder.
+[[1]] Trait bonus for your equipment only.

FoMfiYQaOpMhIOjY.description:
Some of the most powerful weapons are priceless and ancient, and you are vigilant in protecting your equipment as much as you protect yourself.

Requirements: Scarab Sages

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus to CMD against disarm, steal, and sunder combat maneuvers, and your equipment gains a +1 trait bonus on all saving throws.
FoMfiYQaOpMhIOjY.name: Reverent Wielder (Scarab Sages)

FoNMdhue2TKpAmdu.description:
Your ferocity is devastating, sometimes even to your own weapons.

Requirements: Rovagug

Benefits: Once per day, after successful hitting a foe with a melee weapon, you can add your Strength modifier to the damage roll a second time (your Strength Modifier is not doubled if you are using a two-handed weapon). Doing so has a 25% chance of giving your weapon the broken condition.
FoNMdhue2TKpAmdu.name: Wrecking Wrath (Rovagug)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against creatures of animal, fey, or plant types.

FpXMpLEpMy45EEYL.description: Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on all Intimidate checks against creatures of the animal, fey, or plant type, and Intimidate is always a class skill for you.
FpXMpLEpMy45EEYL.name: Unnatural Revenge

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on saves against fear. In addition, any allies adjacent to you receive a +1 morale bonus on Will saves against fear.

FqERCWtGmFztxMEL.description:
Requirements: Code of Valor

Benefits: If you follow this code, you gain a +1 trait bonus on Will saves against fear. In addition, any allies adjacent to you receive a +1 morale bonus on Will saves against fear.
FqERCWtGmFztxMEL.name: Contagious Mettle

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus during the surprise round.

Fw7TLNEbgDiLvx40.description:
Your family has long waged war against tyranny, and you learned a great deal about guerilla warfare in your youth.

Requirements: Liberty's Edge

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Stealth checks and a +1 trait bonus on attack rolls made during the surprise round.
Fw7TLNEbgDiLvx40.name: Freedom Fighter (Liberty's Edge)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on checks against or concerning goblinoids.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks against or concerning goblinoids.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks against or concerning goblinoids.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks against or concerning goblinoids.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks against or concerning goblinoids and such checks may be untrained.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks against or concerning goblinoids and such checks may be untrained.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks against or concerning goblinoids and such checks may be untrained.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks against or concerning goblinoids and such checks may be untrained.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks against or concerning goblinoids and such checks may be untrained.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks against or concerning goblinoids and such checks may be untrained.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks against or concerning goblinoids and such checks may be untrained.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks against or concerning goblinoids and such checks may be untrained.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks against or concerning goblinoids and such checks may be untrained.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks against or concerning goblinoids and such checks may be untrained.

G1D2anBuDSnhtCTY.description:
You’re a member of the Greenskin Stalkers. Due to your affiliation with this brotherhood of goblin slayers, you’ve learned to think and act like a goblin, as disturbing as that sounds.

Requirements: Isger, River Kingdoms, or Varisia

Benefits: You receive a +1 trait bonus on Bluff, Knowledge, Perception, Sense Motive, and Survival checks against or concerning goblinoids. You can also attempt Knowledge checks concerning goblinoids untrained.
G1D2anBuDSnhtCTY.name: Greenskin Stalker (Isger, River Kingdoms, Varisia)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against spells and spell-like abilities with the <choose from Disease or Cold when taking this trait> descriptor.

G8cgSzZtEpsj6nNt.description:
Your experience with one of the long Triaxian seasons has taught you much about the dangers of a long summer or winter.

Requirements: Triaxus

Benefits: Choose disease or cold. You gain a +2 trait bonus on saves against spells and spell-like abilities with the chosen descriptor. If you choose disease, you gain the bonus on Fortitude saves against nonmagical diseases as well.
G8cgSzZtEpsj6nNt.name: Triaxian Tradition (Triaxus)

contextNotes.text: The DC to detect forgeries you create increases by 2.
+[[2]] Bonus if you attempt to persuade someone via a written message.
+[[2]] Bonus if you attempt to persuade someone via a written message.
+[[2]] Bonus if you attempt to persuade someone via a written message.

G8mq4sMz2tnvCCa3.description:
You are a master of calligraphy, an art once highly valued in Lung Wa and still held in high esteem in Lingshen.

Benefits: The DC to detect forgeries you create increases by 2. If you attempt to persuade someone via a written message, you gain a +2 bonus on any Bluff, Diplomacy, or Intimidate check attempted for that communication. Linguistics is always a class skill for you.
G8mq4sMz2tnvCCa3.name: Excellent Penmanship

G9VCGvbhixzz5ocJ.description:
Growing up bordering the Mana Wastes and living within the Grand Duchy of Alkenstar has made you familiar with tools and practical objects. You rely on mechanics to solve problems and are familiar with basic engineering concepts.

Requirements: Alkenstar native

Benefits: Select one of the following skills: Craft (any), Disable Device, or Knowledge (engineering). You gain a +1 trait bonus on checks with that skill, and it is always a class skill for you.
G9VCGvbhixzz5ocJ.name: Mechanical Expertise (Alkenstar)

GGuEL8p72HaXLs8x.description:
Whether from the pages of a dusty scroll or at the feet of a master, you have learned to set your mind to adapt to the physical realm.

Requirements: Lantern Lodge

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Will saving throws.
GGuEL8p72HaXLs8x.name: Mind Over Matter (Lantern Lodge)

GHAlKlq17bbM6Qek.description:
Having grown up among headstrong sailors and bloodthirsty raiders, you learned to keep quiet and pay attention.

Requirements: Ulfen Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on initiative checks and Perception checks.
GHAlKlq17bbM6Qek.name: Gruff Watcher (Human; Ulfen)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against charm and compulsion effects.

GI2TDQqOEGNXfPTc.description:
When weaker wills falter, you keep a clear mind.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against charm and compulsion effects.
GI2TDQqOEGNXfPTc.name: Focused Disciple

GK6bsGYZmHqmeVIP.description:
Although you're a relative newcomer to Magnimar, you're not some naive stranger. You've been sent by the Pathfinder Society lodge in your home country to learn more about Varisia by experiencing the frontier firsthand. After arriving, you reported to the Magnimar lodge and placed your expertise at the venture-captain's disposal.

Benefits: To represent your experience in distant lands, choose a country other than Varisia as your homeland and gain one of the languages spoken in that country as a bonus language. Additionally, choose one of the following skills: Handle Animal, Knowledge (geography), Linguistics, or Survival. You gain a +1 trait bonus on checks made with this skill and it is always a class skill for you.
GK6bsGYZmHqmeVIP.name: Exchange Agent (Shattered Star)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus when in mountainous areas.

GMtjhKObcxyyMzjC.description:
You are skilled at getting along in the mountains, enabling you to find hidden trails and secret entrances into the caverns beneath mountains.

Requirements: Five Kings Mountains

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (geography) and Survival checks when in mountainous areas, and Knowledge (geography) is always a class skill for you.
GMtjhKObcxyyMzjC.name: Mountain Guide (Five Kings Mountains)

contextNotes.text: The cost of creating magic items is reduced by 5%.

GQCEDZxLNFsb5bFb.description:
You have always had a knack for making useful things, and your talent as an artisan was evident even at an early age.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Craft checks, and the cost of creating magic items is reduced by 5%.
GQCEDZxLNFsb5bFb.name: Spark of Creation

GQdQ5CoxHdT8KzC5.description:
Your intense familiarity with the tools of your trade allows you to use them in combat as if they were actual weapons and makes them more effective for that purpose than they would normally be.

Benefits: When you use a tool of your trade (requiring at least 1 rank in the appropriate Craft or Profession skill) as a weapon, you do not take the improvised weapon penalty and instead receive a +1 trait bonus on your attack. This trait is commonly used with shovels, picks, blacksmith hammers, and other sturdy tools—lutes and brooms make terribly fragile weapons.
GQdQ5CoxHdT8KzC5.name: Rough and Ready

GUR9XNoNhXzlFvid.description:
Sea trade is never safe, even on the highly trafficked waters of the Inner Sea, but the way to Eleder is more perilous still. The ever-present hurricane known as the Eye of Abendego blows hundreds of ships each year off course, into jagged rocks, or directly to the sea f loor. Pirates operating out of the Shackles Isles wait on the other side to take cargo from ships lucky enough to traverse or bypass the storm. Your job is to ensure a precious cargo aboard the Jenivere arrives safely in Eleder—what form this cargo takes and the nature of your relationship to it are up to you and your GM.

Benefits: Your character’s history as a merchant or mercenary has earned her a respectable living, and you begin the campaign with an additional 300 gp in starting wealth.

Characters with this trait likely boarded in Magnimar, Corentyn, Ilizmagorti, Port Peril, or Bloodcove.
GUR9XNoNhXzlFvid.name: Get the Cargo Through (Serpent's Skull)

GUapa7btsJMK65N3.description:
You spent most of your life moving through murky bogs and have grown acclimated to the terrain.

Requirements: Sodden Lands

Benefits: You move normally through shallow bogs (as long as the terrain hasn’t been magically manipulated) but are still affected by deep bogs as normal.
GUapa7btsJMK65N3.name: Sodden Child (Sodden Lands)

contextNotes.text: When you cast a spell that creates a loyal servant to fulfill a specific or mindless task (such as unseen servant, mount, or spiritual weapon, but not summon monster spells), you may choose to increase its duration by 50%. This does not stack with the Extend Spell feat. The effect weakens the spell, however; dispel checks against spells you cast in this manner gain a +[[4]] bonus.

GUibHufYqGA2C2Uo.description:
Your faith teaches you to push magical servants to the limit.

Requirements: Droskar

Benefits: When you cast a spell that creates a loyal servant to fulfill a specific or mindless task (such as unseen servant, mount, or spiritual weapon, but not summon monster spells), you may choose to increase its duration by 50%. This does not stack with the Extend Spell feat. The effect weakens the spell, however; dispel checks against spells you cast in this manner gain a +4 bonus.
GUibHufYqGA2C2Uo.name: Extended Toil (Droskar)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against spells with the cold descriptor and against the dangers of cold weather.

GUkTftSGiYXuGK8a.description:
Your life was spared in youth by the magic of a White Witch healer who was using your survival to perpetuate her agenda. Her magic was painful, but it made your body stronger.

Requirements: Must hail from Irrisen or have lived there for at least 1 year

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against spells with the cold descriptor and against the dangers of cold weather.
GUkTftSGiYXuGK8a.name: Debt to a Witch (Irrisen)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus while climbing trees.
+[[2]] Trait bonus while climbing trees.

GWSD6j7Baj5DJsOf.description:
You are adept at arboreal activity, and are more at home in the branches of a tree than you are on the ground.

Requirements: Goblin; Mediogalti

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Acrobatics and Climb checks while climbing trees.
GWSD6j7Baj5DJsOf.name: Monkey Goblin (Goblin; Mediogalti)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on attacks of opportunity when fighting aboard a ship.

GY5iz4JKPt4nzQeO.description:
You are accustomed to compensating for the pitch and yaw of ocean-going ships.

Requirements: Besmara

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attacks of opportunity when fighting aboard a ship.
GY5iz4JKPt4nzQeO.name: Deck Fighter (Besmara)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against illusions and charm effects.

Gd666a98MwjxYtG5.description:
You have seen many heroes in your time, but you see only their capacity for failure and the ways they fall short of being truly good. This practice in looking past facades has proven a useful skill.
