Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against illusions and charm effects.
Gd666a98MwjxYtG5.name: Cynical

Gdton2YzodPzvllC.description:
Thanks to your friendly mien and sly tongue, your lies are often believed.

Requirements: Asmodeus

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks, and Bluff is a class skill for you.
Gdton2YzodPzvllC.name: Liar's Tongue (Asmodeus)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against effects that would cause you to become dazzled or blinded. Once per day when you would be dazzled or blinded by an effect, you can reduce the duration of that effect by half (minimum 1 round). You cannot use this ability if you are already dazzled or blinded or if you have the light sensitivity or light blindness special quality.

GiGEJPMbZ5UQvgT3.description:
You are inured to the bright glare of the hot desert sun, and its dazzling rays pose little danger to you.

Requirements: Garundi Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against effects that would cause you to become dazzled or blinded, and once per day when you would be dazzled or blinded by an effect, you can reduce the duration of that effect by half (minimum 1 round). You cannot use this ability if you are already dazzled or blinded or if you have the light sensitivity or light blindness special quality.
GiGEJPMbZ5UQvgT3.name: Eyes of the Sun (Human; Garundi)

GjcsQvVR2RWIiKmR.description:
The faith of Holomog focuses on finding the good in unusual places and appreciating the nuances of virtue in the world.

Benefits: You may treat Asmodeus as if he were a lawful neutral deity for the purposes of determining your own alignment as a cleric, inquisitor, or other divine spellcaster. You may not select the evil domain unless your own alignment also contains an evil aspect.
GjcsQvVR2RWIiKmR.name: Pact Servant

contextNotes.text: When hiding a Medium or smaller creature from an opponent actively searching you or your cargo, both you and the creature to be smuggled can attempt Stealth checks and select the higher of the two results for your smuggled ally to use while hiding.

GlMgRS3XFGiSVtzs.description:
You know how to get contraband across borders.

Requirements: Halfling

Benefits: When hiding a Medium or smaller creature from an opponent actively searching you or your cargo, both you and the creature to be smuggled can attempt Stealth checks and select the higher of the two results for your smuggled ally to use while hiding.
GlMgRS3XFGiSVtzs.name: Slave Smuggler (Halfling)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus in the desert.

GpHwXEaZoCW7Jara.description:
You belong to one of the nomadic Mutabi-qi tribes that wander the wastes of Shaguang, and you are adept at navigating the seemingly endless desert wastes.

Requirements: Shanguang

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (geography) checks and Survival checks made in the desert.
GpHwXEaZoCW7Jara.name: Mutabi-qi Explorer (Shanguang)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against level-draining effects.

GqEv1skToaFjrnNS.description:
Your soul is pledged to one of the Horsemen.

Requirements: Any of the Four Horsemen

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Fortitude saving throws against level-draining effects.
GqEv1skToaFjrnNS.name: Covenant of Abaddon (any Four Horsemen)

GqdKtSvFPa7RMRPq.description:
Whenever you found yourself involved in a group effort in the past, be it working with siblings to handle a family emergency, conspiring with friends to orchestrate a prank, or throwing in with coworkers to take care of an unanticipated complication at work, you tended to end up in a position of leadership. It might be unclear to you why this is the case, or you might deliberately seek out such positions, knowing you can organize any group to be something greater than the sum of its parts, but your knack for managing groups has always pushed you to the front of any operation you’ve found yourself a part of.

Benefits: You excel in the role of manager. You treat your Charisma score as if it were 14 (or 2 points higher than its actual score if your actual Charisma is already 14 or higher) for the purposes of determining how many teams you can manage in the rebellion, and for the purposes of determining the bonus you add to your managed teams’ actions. In addition, you gain a +1 trait bonus to your Leadership score if you take the Leadership feat.
GqdKtSvFPa7RMRPq.name: Natural Born Leader (Hell's Rebels)

contextNotes.text: Whenever you succeed at a critical hit with a melee weapon against an evil outsider, you ignore an amount of the outsider's damage reduction (if any) equal to the critical multiplier of your weapon (this cannot reduce a creature's damage reduction to below 0).

Gr8sY8AcIb89eARY.description:
Ever since you were a child, you've experienced vivid dreams of cutting down hordes of shrieking, twisted demons.

Requirements: Angelkin Aasimar Heritage

Benefits: Whenever you succeed at a critical hit with a melee weapon against an evil outsider, you ignore an amount of the outsider's damage reduction (if any) equal to the critical multiplier of your weapon (this cannot reduce a creature's damage reduction to below 0).
Gr8sY8AcIb89eARY.name: Planetar's Visions (Aasimar; Angelkin)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus when part of a readied action.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on caster level checks when casting a spell as a readied action.

GxiCvbVs5t85WVTp.description:
Angradd teaches that a good offense can be the best defense.

Requirements: Angradd

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attack rolls made as part of a readied action, and a +1 trait bonus on caster level checks when casting a spell as a readied action.
GxiCvbVs5t85WVTp.name: Well-Prepared (Angradd)

Gzh4eniQZ1A8ccap.description:
You were raised, either wholly or in part, by a magical creature, either after it found you abandoned in the woods or because your parents often left you in the care of a magical minion. This constant exposure to magic has made its mysteries easy for you to understand, even when you turn your mind to other devotions and tasks.

Benefits: Pick a class when you gain this trait—your caster level in that class gains a +2 trait bonus as long as this bonus doesn't increase your caster level higher than your current Hit Dice.
Gzh4eniQZ1A8ccap.name: Magical Knack

H0rGJUxNI8SLZUSk.description:
Your time spent fighting and studying the greatest warriors of the Society has taught you new defensive skills while wearing armor.

Requirements: Fighter, Pathfinder Society

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus to Armor Class when wearing medium or heavy armor.
H0rGJUxNI8SLZUSk.name: Defender of the Society (Fighter, Pathfinder Society)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on all attacks made against undead.

H2Lr30WJpJLka8dd.description:
You have dedicated yourself to the destruction of undead.

Requirements: Pharasma

Benefits: You receive a +1 trait bonus on all attacks made against undead.
H2Lr30WJpJLka8dd.name: Corpse Hunter (Pharasma)

contextNotes.text:
Once per day as a free action, when you hit a creature with a melee weapon, you can convert an amount of damage dealt by your attack equal to your character level into the selected energy type.

You cannot convert this damage if any damage from the attack would normally deal a different type of energy damage (such as that of a flaming weapon).

H37GNsiXtvYuVCPd.description:
You spent your childhood in a region where the use of elemental magic is commonplace or the environment is heavily infused with elemental energies. Your time near raw elemental energies has inured you to taking damage from them.

Benefits: At character creation, select acid, cold, electricity, or fire (once chosen, this damage type can’t be changed).

Once per day as a free action, when you hit a creature with a melee weapon, you can convert an amount of damage dealt by your attack equal to your character level into the selected energy type.

You cannot convert this damage if any damage from the attack would normally deal a different type of energy damage (such as that of a flaming weapon).
H37GNsiXtvYuVCPd.name: Elemental Apprentice

contextNotes.text: If you fail, you can reroll the check 1 round later using your bonus for Knowledge (history, or religion).
If you fail, you can reroll the check 1 round later using your bonus for Knowledge (arcana, or religion).
If you fail, you can reroll the check 1 round later using your bonus for Knowledge (history, or religion).

H7i4EtbJV9iPi0td.description:
You believe there is much useful information to glean from the mark Aroden left on history, and learn all you can about his exploits and teachings. This has given you significant insights on how different kinds of information are interconnected.

Benefits: If you fail a Knowledge (arcana, history, or religion) check, you can reroll the check 1 round later using your bonus for one of the other two skills.
H7i4EtbJV9iPi0td.name: Arodenite Historian

H7q1YE1OaSYeyriq.description:
Your have a deep familiarity with the plants and animals of a variety of environments.

Requirements: Green Faith

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nature) and Survival checks, and one of these skills becomes a class skill for you.
H7q1YE1OaSYeyriq.name: Know the Land (Green Faith)

HCB5ZBZX9cOnGFG9.description:
You are blessed with an insight into architecture and artifice.

Requirements: Findeladlara

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (engineering) checks, and Knowledge (engineering) is a class skill for you.
HCB5ZBZX9cOnGFG9.name: Structural Knowledge (Findeladlara)

HEbFVhcHsZrLj270.description:
You have escaped from so many dangerous situations in your life that you've gotten quite good at not getting caught.

Requirements: Bellflower Network

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Stealth checks and Stealth is a class skill for you.
HEbFVhcHsZrLj270.name: Slippery (Bellflower Network)

HF99WVZ2z8QpQ55n.description:
You are well acquainted with the lore of fallen empires.

Requirements: Scarab Sages

Benefits: Choose either Knowledge (history) or Linguistics. That skill becomes a class skill for you, and you begin play able to speak and read one of the following languages: Ancient Osiriani, Azlanti, Cyclops, Jistkan, Tekritanin, or Thassilonian.
HF99WVZ2z8QpQ55n.name: Ancient Historian (Scarab Sages)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on all attack rolls against foes that threaten Koya.
+[[1]] Trait bonus as long as Koya remains alive.

HFNnVF0WCyghMSl5.description:
Your family has been close friends with the Mvashtis for as long as you've been alive. Old Niska Mvashti's recent death wasn't all that unexpected - she must have been over a hundred years old, as far as you know,but it was a sobering moment nonetheless. What no one else in your family knows, though, is that in the weeks before her death, Niska must have known that her days were numbered, because she called you to her house one day and made you make a promise: If her daughter Koya ever went on a long trip, you would go with her to ensure her safety. Although the chances of Koya going on a long trip seem remote (she must be at least 60 years old, after all), you've made a promise to Niska to accompany her daughter if such an event comes to pass. Ever since you made this promise, you've felt a strange sense of destiny looming in your future,you might even think that Niska is now watching over your shoulder, just as she asked you to watch over her daughter. As a result of this eerie sense of being watched over, you've been able to react to dangerous situations more quickly than ever.

Benefits: As long as Koya remains alive, you gain a +1 trait bonus on Perception checks, and Perception becomes a class skill for you. In addition, you gain a +1 trait bonus on all attack rolls against foes that threaten Koya.

NPC Choices Koya
HFNnVF0WCyghMSl5.name: Friend of the Family (Jade Regent)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on slippery surfaces.
You may trip or bull rush opponents two size categories larger than you.

HITjsjhDbfB3V9Th.description:
Requirements: Darklands, usually under cold mountains

Benefits: The wide stance and sure footing you developed while traipsing over ice-covered rock and frozen earth provides you with a +1 trait bonus on Acrobatics checks made on slippery surfaces and enables you to trip or bull rush opponents two size categories larger than you instead of just one.
HITjsjhDbfB3V9Th.name: Snowstride (Darklands)

contextNotes.text: Whenever you use the aid another action to aid an adjacent ally, increase the bonus you grant your ally by 1. This is a trait bonus.
Whenever you use the aid another action to aid an adjacent ally, increase the bonus you grant your ally by 1. This is a trait bonus.

HIygf8lVfFb4GDcZ.description:
You have prominent Azlanti features, which you can use to inspire confidence in your allies.

Requirements

Gillman

Benefits

Whenever you use the aid another action to aid an adjacent ally, increase the bonus you grant your ally by 1. This is a trait bonus.
HIygf8lVfFb4GDcZ.name: Azlanti Inheritor (Gillman)

HKRmTLqKb32dJKXV.description:
Your preferred means of doing business involves giving your clients a fair deal and winning their continued business and good will.

Requirements: The Exchange

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy and Sense Motive checks, and one of these skills (your choice) becomes a class skill for you.
HKRmTLqKb32dJKXV.name: Upstanding (The Exchange)

contextNotes.text: Once per day, you gain a +[[2]] bonus on a single attack roll against an evil-aligned creature. If the creature is not evil-aligned, this ability is wasted with no benefit.  ([[@resources.aSureThingSilverCrusade.value]] remaining uses)

HL6FH76UoieVqP1H.description:
Requirements: Silver Crusade

Benefits: Once per day, you gain a +2 bonus on a single attack roll against an evil-aligned creature. If the creature is not evil-aligned, this ability is wasted with no benefit.
HL6FH76UoieVqP1H.name: A Sure Thing (Silver Crusade)

contextNotes.text: -[[1]] penalty against spells with the emotion descriptor that do not also have the fear descriptor.

HMQbKZ3BgWAJ0oPq.description:
You have difficulty controlling your temper after living in inhuman conditions in Cheliax, Geb, Irrisen, Katapesh, or Qadira.

Effects: Whenever a foe provokes an attack of opportunity from you, you must take it unless you succeed at a Will save against a DC equal to 10 + your level. You take a -1 penalty on Will saving throws against spells with the emotion descriptor that do not also have the fear descriptor.
HMQbKZ3BgWAJ0oPq.name: Righteous Indignation

contextNotes.text: Once per day, if you fail a saving throw with your sibling within 30 feet, reroll using their modifier; twins receive a +2 bonus. Sibling's consent is required, and if the reroll fails, both are dazed for 1 round.

HNXWTcO5is6TLjTV.description:
The bond between you and a close sibling is nearly mystical.

Benefits: Choose a single sibling with whom to share this bond. Once per day when you fail a saving throw while your sibling is within 30 feet, you may reroll that saving throw using your sibling’s saving throw modifier. If you and the sibling are twins or otherwise part of a multiple birth, you gain a +2 trait bonus on the rerolled saving throw. Your sibling must be willing to grant you the reroll. If you fail the saving throw, you and your sibling are dazed for 1 round.
HNXWTcO5is6TLjTV.name: Kin Bond

HNgNFYQQqkuffC5N.description:
You were adopted and raised by someone not of your actual race, and raised in a society not your own.

Benefits: You picked up a race trait from your adoptive parents and society, and may immediately select a race trait from your adoptive parents' race.
HNgNFYQQqkuffC5N.name: Adopted

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against creatures one or more size categories smaller than yourself.
+[[1]] to DC of compulsion spells cast by you against creatures one or more size categories smaller than yourself.

HP85K4VFr0USpsiA.description:
Your upbringing has accustomed you to commanding those you deem inferior.

Requirements: Cheliax

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Intimidate checks against creatures one or more size categories smaller than yourself. The DC of compulsion spells cast by you against smaller creatures increases by 1.
HP85K4VFr0USpsiA.name: Social Slaver (Cheliax)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] trait bonus on concentration checks when within an allied spellcaster.

HQ5tBwm8QxPY1PJi.description:
You have belonged to a coven or magical cabal and know how to coordinate your spellcasting with others.

Benefits: When within 30 feet of an allied spellcaster, you both gain a +2 trait bonus on concentration checks.
HQ5tBwm8QxPY1PJi.name: Coven Casting

HROYDWl4RZZWAGen.description:
You learned how to bribe by watching Dusk Market merchants interact with Westcrown’s dottari guards.

Benefits: Reduce the amount of gold you must spend to bribe a guard or official or compensate a conjured creature by 5%.
HROYDWl4RZZWAGen.name: Dusk Market Bribery

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus when enforcing or pronouncing a lawful judgment that you’re legitimately deputed to enforce or pronounce.

HScC2i1LKGyrkobf.description:
When you speak with the full weight of law, your conviction lends you a terrible presence.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Intimidate checks when enforcing or pronouncing a lawful judgment that you’re legitimately deputed to enforce or pronounce.
HScC2i1LKGyrkobf.name: Inexorable Authority

HSzL4QzbRr2BtTjJ.description:
You are not from town; you’ve recently come from somewhere else and are hoping to make your fortune here. Pick one of the following reasons to be a newcomer to the area.

Benefits: Pick one of the following reasons to be a newcomer to the area:

Exile

For whatever reason, you were forced to flee your homeland. Chance or fate has brought you to town, and it’s here that your money ran out, leaving you stranded in this small town. You are also being pursued by enemies from your homeland, and that has made you paranoid and quick to react to danger.

You gain a +2 trait bonus on Initiative checks.

Special Note

This is one of three versions of this trait. Other versions can be found here:

Outlander - Lore Seeker (Any Campaign)

Outlander - Missionary (Any Campaign)
HSzL4QzbRr2BtTjJ.name: Outlander - Exile (Any Campaign)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] to counter a feint in combat.

HTp8gTJgYP17qh21.description:
You are hard to fool and harder to trick with a feint.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all Sense Motive checks. This trait bonus increases to +2 when used to counter a feint in combat.
HTp8gTJgYP17qh21.name: Vigilant Battler

contextNotes.text: The DCs of Acrobatics checks don’t increase for you when you’re moving through light undergrowth, and the DCs of Acrobatics checks you attempt while you’re moving through heavy undergrowth increase only by 2.

HU28nyWyZAodESG7.description:
You’ve trained yourself to move in and out of undergrowth with ease.

Benefits: The DCs of Acrobatics checks don’t increase for you when you’re moving through light undergrowth, and the DCs of Acrobatics checks you attempt while you’re moving through heavy undergrowth increase only by 2.
HU28nyWyZAodESG7.name: Undergrowth Specialist

contextNotes.text: Once per scenario, when you roll a natural 1 on any saving throw, you gain a +[[1]] Trait bonus on your next saving throw, which must be used before the end of the scenario.

HUDkxceysyTrxIEH.description:
You know the consequences of failure and strive never to make the same mistake twice.

Requirements: Grand Lodge

Benefits: Once per scenario, when you roll a natural 1 on any saving throw, you gain a +1 trait bonus on your next saving throw, which must be used before the end of the scenario.
HUDkxceysyTrxIEH.name: Teaching Mistake (Grand Lodge)

contextNotes.text: Once per day, when you are adjacent to a human ally of Chelish descent, you can reroll a Will saving throw before success or failure is known. You must take the results of the second roll, even if it is worse.

HXZdgvtdmiV1F84b.description:
Halflings are a common sight in Cheliax and make up the majority of that nation’s slave population. Known derisively as “slips,” halflings are almost universally treated with scorn and contempt, while paradoxically valued as the most precious slaves. You are a Chelish halfling, but unlike most of your race, you have embraced your role in Chelish society, and used it to your own advantage. People constantly overlook you or discount you as an inconsequential slip, but you know the truth—halflings are just as vital to the empire’s health as its nobles, priests, and warriors. You may have been born a free halfling who has never known the chains of slavery, or a slave who was later freed after a period of loyal servitude. Or perhaps you are still a slave, happy (or at least content) in your enslavement, and hoping for some eventual recognition of your contribution, however small, to Cheliax’s great and orderly society.

Requirements: Halfling

Benefits: You are skilled at prevaricating and dissembling, both to deflect blame away from yourself and to mislead others as to your true abilities and role. You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks, and Bluff is a class skill for you. In addition, your tacit support of Cheliax’s social structure, and the clear knowledge of your own place in society, strengthens your resolve. Once per day, when you are adjacent to a human ally of Chelish descent, you can reroll a Will saving throw before success or failure is known. You must take the results of the second roll, even if it is worse.
HXZdgvtdmiV1F84b.name: Good Slip (Hell's Vengeance; Halfling)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on attack rolls with weapons made of the <chosen material>.

HbExZf32FMpD2UdX.description:
You have inherited a sacred tribal weapon wielded by your forebears since the days before the Rain of Stars, and you were trained in its use from a young age.

Requirements: Numeria

Benefits: Select either cold iron or silver. You begin play with a masterwork melee weapon made of the material of your choice. You must be proficient with this weapon, and its combined cost cannot exceed 500 gp. You gain a +1 trait bonus on attack rolls with weapons made of the selected material.
HbExZf32FMpD2UdX.name: Ancestral Weapon (Numeria)

contextNotes.text: Whenever you have a morale bonus to weapon attack rolls, you also receive a +[[1]] Trait bonus on weapon damage rolls.

Hc0jgw8A9A1mjCuS.description:
Your greatest joy is being in the thick of battle, and smiting your enemies for a righteous or even dastardly cause.

Requirements: Dwarf

Benefits: Whenever you have a morale bonus to weapon attack rolls, you also receive a +1 trait bonus on weapon damage rolls.
Hc0jgw8A9A1mjCuS.name: Zest for Battle (Dwarf)

HdmuSpkIKOS1AKYo.description:
A close relative was an important player in the rebellions that led to the independence of Shokuro, and passed on her passion to you.

Requirements: Shokuro

Benefits: If you take the Leadership feat, you receive a +1 trait bonus to your Leadership score.
HdmuSpkIKOS1AKYo.name: Rebel Leader (Shokuro)

HgA24k6KAT0Xkb5u.description:
Your nomadic culture gives you a profound knowledge of and respect for the horses that roam your homelands.

Requirements: Shoanti Human Heritage

Benefits: You begin play with a combat trained light horse. While riding this horse bareback, you are treated as though you were riding it with a riding saddle (placing any actual saddle upon the horse negates this benefit). The horse can fend for itself outside of settlements in all but the most hostile environments. If whistled for outside of a community, the horse typically arrives within [[1d6]] minutes. If your horse is slain, you may receive a new horse by returning to your clan and performing a vigil for its spirit (a rite that costs 100 gp in rare herbs and incense).
HgA24k6KAT0Xkb5u.name: Shoanti Steed (Human; Shoanti)

HhRkiJqhqVFp5E9b.description:
Your sharp intellect and rapier-like wit bruise egos.

Benefits: Intimidate is always a class skill for you, and you may use your Intelligence modifier when making Intimidate checks instead of your Charisma modifier.
HhRkiJqhqVFp5E9b.name: Bruising Intellect

contextNotes.text: Once per day, gain a +[[2]] trait bonus to the save DC of one bomb you throw or extend the duration of one extract you imbibe by 2 rounds.

HkdSMUrQiad3D1R5.description:
Your meticulous carefulness makes your bombs and extracts more potent.

Benefits: Once per day, you can either add a +2 trait bonus to the save DC for one bomb you throw or extend the duration of one extract you imbibe by 2 rounds. Extracts with an instantaneous duration are not affected by this trait.
HkdSMUrQiad3D1R5.name: Meticulous Concoction

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus to AC against attacks made with thrown weapons.

HpIeTpd9CAK6p17M.description:
As a native of the Mwangi Jungle, you’ve had frequent encounters with the Charau-Ka and learned how to fight against these coldly calculating demon worshipers.

Requirements: Mwangi Expanse

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus to AC against attacks made with thrown weapons.
HpIeTpd9CAK6p17M.name: Charau-Ka Slayer (Mwangi Expanse)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on damage rolls against sharks and other animals with the aquatic subtype.

Hq7ceo0s3lvds36b.description:
One of your legs was bitten off below the knee by a shark when you were just a child, and was replaced with a wooden peg leg. You've long since gotten used to your prosthesis, however, and take none of the normal penalties from having a peg leg. Your balance always gets a bit shaky after a few drinks, and last night at the Formidably Maid a tavern in Port Peril,was no exception. That must be why you fell to the floor as soon as you tried to stand up. What happened next is hazy, but you're pretty sure you were dragged out of the bar and onto a ship at the docks. At least they didn't throw you to the sharks...

Benefits: You've had to learn to deal with the pain of your injury as well, and you gain a +1 trait bonus on Fortitude saves. Ever since your accident you've hated sharks, and you also gain a +1 trait bonus on damage rolls against sharks and other animals with the aquatic subtype.
Hq7ceo0s3lvds36b.name: Peg Leg (Skull and Shackles)

Hrn8A50dVWscbm2g.description:
You have learned how to work a crowd in Magnimar’s mock-gladiator fights.

Benefits: Choose one weapon. You take no penalty on attack rolls when dealing nonlethal damage with that weapon, and once per day if you score a critical hit with the weapon, you can immediately attempt an Intimidate check to demoralize your target.
Hrn8A50dVWscbm2g.name: Mock Gladiator

contextNotes.text: You roll twice and take the lower result to activate items blindly.
You roll twice and take the lower result against effects produced by magic items.

Hw4vvbqrWcWcCoVR.description:
You were born in a place with a plethora of strangely interacting magic, such as Geb, the Mana Wastes, or Nex, and magic is dangerously eager to surge into action around you.

Effects: You roll twice and take the lower result on Use Magic Device checks to activate items blindly and on Reflex saving throws against effects produced by magic items.
Hw4vvbqrWcWcCoVR.name: Magical Klutz

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus vs fear effects.

HyxtvcLDAldm8HPT.description:
You can stand strong against even the most terrifying foes.

Requirements: Gorum

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saves against fear effects, and the DC of Intimidate checks made against you increases by +2.
HyxtvcLDAldm8HPT.name: Strong Heart (Gorum)

contextNotes.text: In forest or plains terrain, you may reduce a single target’s effective level of concealment against you (from total concealment to concealment to not concealed) by studying your natural surroundings as a move action. This reduced concealment ends immediately once the target moves from its current location. At 10th level, you may study your terrain as a swift action instead.

I08LBEJ7vZ9mYH9o.description:
You’ve pledged your skills and your life to the Chernasardo rangers, studying to protect your homeland from foreign invaders. You currently remain a neophyte in this secretive guerrilla army. You have yet to be entrusted with many of their secrets, and spend a great deal of time training with the old ranger Aubrin in Phaendar to hone your skills of hunting and tracking.

Benefits: In forest or plains terrain, you may reduce a single target’s effective level of concealment against you (from total concealment to concealment to not concealed) by studying your natural surroundings as a move action. This reduced concealment ends immediately once the target moves from its current location. At 10th level, you may study your terrain as a swift action instead.
I08LBEJ7vZ9mYH9o.name: Chernasardo Hopeful (Ironfang Invasion)

I1OfmncrBrDNMrSu.description:
You are a repulsive little freak whose origins are unclear. Your head is small for a goblin and your mouth oddly narrow, allowing you to pass in urban environments as an unidentifiable mongrel, providing you keep a low profile. However, if examined closely, your goblin origins are revealed.

Requirements: Goblin

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Disguise checks, and Disguise is a class skill for you.
I1OfmncrBrDNMrSu.name: Ugly Swine (Goblin)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to confirm critical hits against any creature that has at least a faint evil aura.

I3PnfLlV1j8oLGcm.description:
You were slain by evil forces as a child, but a follower of Vildeis restored you to life. Now you live on in service to the Cardinal Martyr, battling the forces of evil so no other child will know the icy grip of death.

Requirements: Vildeis

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on attack rolls to confirm critical hits against any creature that has at least a faint evil aura (see detect evil).
I3PnfLlV1j8oLGcm.name: Bloody Vengeance (Vildeis)

I4x05JPbZJssJMuq.description:
You're not frightened of the old wives' tales of vampires and ghosts, and though you try to avoid the undead, you've learned how to deal with them.

Requirements: Ustalav

Benefits: You may cast disrupt undead once per day as a spell-like ability. This is cast at your highest caster level gained; if you have no caster level, it functions at CL 1st.
I4x05JPbZJssJMuq.name: Superstitious Ward (Ustalav)

I6NcRhYpij0daCF8.description:
Your skull is misshapen in a grotesque way.

Requirements: Half-Orc, Orc

Benefits: You receive a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate skill checks and it becomes a class skill.
I6NcRhYpij0daCF8.name: Amazingly Ugly (Half-Orc, Orc)

contextNotes.text: Once per day, you may reroll. You must decide to use this ability after the first roll is made but before the results are revealed. You must take the second result, even if it is worse.
Once per day, you may reroll. You must decide to use this ability after the first roll is made but before the results are revealed. You must take the second result, even if it is worse.
Once per day, you may reroll. You must decide to use this ability after the first roll is made but before the results are revealed. You must take the second result, even if it is worse.
Once per day, you may reroll. You must decide to use this ability after the first roll is made but before the results are revealed. You must take the second result, even if it is worse.
Once per day, you may reroll. You must decide to use this ability after the first roll is made but before the results are revealed. You must take the second result, even if it is worse.
Once per day, you may reroll. You must decide to use this ability after the first roll is made but before the results are revealed. You must take the second result, even if it is worse.
Once per day, you may reroll. You must decide to use this ability after the first roll is made but before the results are revealed. You must take the second result, even if it is worse.
Once per day, you may reroll. You must decide to use this ability after the first roll is made but before the results are revealed. You must take the second result, even if it is worse.
Once per day, you may reroll. You must decide to use this ability after the first roll is made but before the results are revealed. You must take the second result, even if it is worse.
Once per day, you may reroll. You must decide to use this ability after the first roll is made but before the results are revealed. You must take the second result, even if it is worse.

I8y9JHIViNQUwjFO.description:
You were initiated into a mystery cult in your youth, and learned secrets that turned your understanding of your faith and the world on its head. This experience has given you a knack for lateral thinking.

Benefits: Once per day, you may reroll any Knowledge skill check. You must decide to use this ability after the first roll is made but before the results are revealed. You must take the second result, even if it is worse.

Suggested Characters

Mystery cultists, Nethys worshipers, Norgorber worshipers.
I8y9JHIViNQUwjFO.name: Mystery Initiate

contextNotes.text: You can attempt checks with a DC of 15 or lower untrained.
You can attempt checks with a DC of 15 or lower untrained.
You can attempt checks with a DC of 15 or lower untrained.
You can attempt checks with a DC of 15 or lower untrained.
You can attempt checks with a DC of 15 or lower untrained.
You can attempt checks with a DC of 15 or lower untrained.
You can attempt checks with a DC of 15 or lower untrained.
You can attempt checks with a DC of 15 or lower untrained.
You can attempt checks with a DC of 15 or lower untrained.
You can attempt checks with a DC of 15 or lower untrained.

I9GjjApCwUtLVce4.description:
Though you haven’t been traditionally educated, you’re blessed with potent observation and discernment.

Requirements: Irori

Benefits: You can attempt Knowledge checks with a DC of 15 or lower untrained.
I9GjjApCwUtLVce4.name: Eternal Understanding (Irori)

IDXSiLuWc9bNBF5W.description:
You've sailed the treacherous waters of the Xidao Gulf in your past, and you can navigate their dangers adroitly.

Requirements: Xidao

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (geography) checks, and a +1 trait bonus on Profession (sailor) checks. One of these skills becomes a class skill for you.
IDXSiLuWc9bNBF5W.name: Trench Navigator (Xidao)

IDneMfUjWZVEoMPk.description:
You are a product of Hermea's breeding programs - either your parents were chosen to be citizens, or you were, but later failed to live up to the island's high standards.

Requirements: The Steaming Sea

Benefits: Whatever the case, you are quicker than normal members of your race, and gain a +2 trait bonus on Initiative checks.
IDneMfUjWZVEoMPk.name: Hermean Paragon (the Steaming Sea)

IEHpc0JWZpFaQZNR.description:
You grew up in the blasted badlands of the Mana Wastes, or have spent a lot of time there, and the harsh land has toughened your body.

Requirements: Mana Wastes

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Fortitude saves.
IEHpc0JWZpFaQZNR.name: Mana Wastes Survivalist (Mana Wastes)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on attack rolls while you are adjacent to a dying or disabled ally, animal companion, eidolon, familiar, or mount.
+[[1]] Trait bonus to overcome spell resistance while you are adjacent to a dying or disabled ally, animal companion, eidolon, familiar, or mount.

IEopkks2rWuXctxt.description:
When a companion is down, you fight harder.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attack rolls and on checks made to overcome spell resistance while you are adjacent to a dying or disabled ally, animal companion, eidolon, familiar, or mount.
IEopkks2rWuXctxt.name: Dedicated Defender

contextNotes.text: +[[3]] Trait bonus to get hunches about those who discuss matters of faith, mythology, morality, religion, or the Outer Planes with you.

IHQlzOmTVIwJzRJq.description:
You were inspired with the reverence offered by worshipers to priests and other spiritual leaders, so you assisted them.

Benefits: You gain a +3 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks to get hunches about those who discuss matters of faith, mythology, morality, religion, or the Outer Planes with you. Sense Motive is a class skill for you.
IHQlzOmTVIwJzRJq.name: Divine Confidante

contextNotes.text: If you have the alchemy class feature, your alchemist level is considered 1 higher when calculating the duration of your extracts.

IHbJ1eBqJI94yvUv.description:
Early on in your life, you showed significant promise in the sciences and alchemical arts, and received extensive tutoring from those seeking to maximize your potential.

Requirements: Thuvia

Benefits: If you have the alchemy class feature, your alchemist level is considered 1 higher when calculating the duration of your extracts.
IHbJ1eBqJI94yvUv.name: Alchemical Prodigy (Thuvia)

contextNotes.text: You can always take 10.

IJHgaOhnnemCFhXe.description:
You have a keen ear for the movements of thieves and monsters.

Benefits: You can always take 10 on Perception checks, even when stress and distractions would normally prevent you from doing so.
IJHgaOhnnemCFhXe.name: Wiscrani Ear

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus on checks involving orcs, half-orcs, and humans.
+[[2]] Trait bonus on checks involving orcs, half-orcs, and humans.

ITC6FSStaycf4Yoh.description:
You were raised by a mix of human and orc family members, or by accommodating half-orc parents, and many people expected you to act as a flawless peacemaker. Whether these hopes saw fruition or met with frustration, you learned a great deal about both cultures.

Requirements: Half-Orc

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge (local) checks involving orcs, half-orcs, and humans, and a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks against members of those races.
ITC6FSStaycf4Yoh.name: Promising Peacemaker (Half-Orc)

contextNotes.text: Whenever you fail a check, you can attempt the check again in 24 hours with a +[[2]] bonus. Additionally, you can attempt such checks untrained when they involve giants.
Whenever you fail a check, you can attempt the check again in 24 hours with a +[[2]] bonus. Additionally, you can attempt such checks untrained when they involve giants.

Ib68GXH0kbPqWPGx.description:
As a result of your attempts to understand a rare encounter with the unearthly divine magic or secretive movements of coast-dwelling giants, you have learned to carefully consider all facts related to a mystery and form deductions after taking time to mull over an unanswered question.

Requirements: Coast

Benefits: Whenever you fail a Knowledge (local) or Knowledge (religion) check, you can attempt the check again in 24 hours with a +2 bonus to represent your careful formation of a new deduction. Additionally, you can attempt such skill checks untrained when the checks involve giants.

Likely Regions

Katapesh, Lands of the Linnorm Kings, Mwangi Expanse, Rahadoum, the Shackles, Varisia
Ib68GXH0kbPqWPGx.name: Giant Investigator (Coast)

contextNotes.text: +[[3]] Trait bonus to identify any changes to a location that have occurred since you last visited it.

Icj3mBdmSq9oslRi.description:
Your ability to notice even the slightest change, and the discomfort it causes, made service to Abadar a logical choice.

Requirements: Abadar; Halfling

Benefits: You gain a +3 trait bonus on any Perception check made to identify any changes to a location that have occurred since you last visited it.
Icj3mBdmSq9oslRi.name: Sense of Order (Abadar; Halfling)

contextNotes.text: When you first encounter an illusion, you can attempt a Will saving throw with a –[[2]] penalty to disbelieve it. The GM rolls this saving throw in secret.

Ie85jOD60a9iCNv2.description:
Your experience with illusions allows you to discern them easily.

Requirements: Associated with the court of Kyonin

Benefits: When you first encounter an illusion, you can attempt a Will saving throw with a –2 penalty to disbelieve it, even if you don’t suspect the illusion. The GM rolls this saving throw in secret.
Ie85jOD60a9iCNv2.name: Inhabitant of Illusion (Kyonin)

contextNotes.text: +[[4]] Trait bonus on checks that oppose the Bluff checks of creatures that attempt to deceive you by winning your sympathy.

IeSkzHzfoymyaBI9.description:
You have endured many hardships throughout your life, and this has hardened you to the suffering of others to the point that you are not easily swayed by a sad story.

Benefits: You gain a +4 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks that oppose the Bluff checks of creatures that attempt to deceive you by winning your sympathy.
IeSkzHzfoymyaBI9.name: Callous

contextNotes.text: +[[4]] Trait bonus to influence creatures with at least 5 Hit Dice more than you possess

IfEYFSMdW3XMgtBy.description:
You exude confidence in the presence of those more powerful than you—sometimes unreasonably so.

Benefits: You gain a +4 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks made to influence creatures with at least 5 Hit Dice more than you possess.
IfEYFSMdW3XMgtBy.name: Ambitious

contextNotes.text: You do not provoke attacks of opportunity when performing a dirty trick combat maneuver while your smite evil bonus applies to combat maneuver checks. If you already do not provoke such attacks of opportunity (such as by having Improved Dirty Trick), you instead gain a +2 trait bonus on dirty trick combat maneuver checks against creatures that are the targets of your smite.

IfNnpob3EOFBYxDy.description:
You consider mischief a sacred rite in humbling enemies.

Requirements: Chaldira Zuzaristan

Benefits: You do not provoke attacks of opportunity when performing a dirty trick combat maneuver while your smite evil bonus applies to combat maneuver checks. If you already do not provoke such attacks of opportunity (such as by having Improved Dirty Trick), you instead gain a +2 trait bonus on dirty trick combat maneuver checks against creatures that are the targets of your smite.
IfNnpob3EOFBYxDy.name: Mischievous Smite (Chaldira Zuzaristan)

IgHnoX7ksguDXYV9.description:
As a Mendevian native, you have seen all manner of people claiming holy motives, and you have learned to judge them by their deeds, rather than their words.

Requirements: Mendev

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks, and Sense Motive is always a class skill for you.
IgHnoX7ksguDXYV9.name: Cynic (Mendev)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against spells and effects of <the chosen energy> type when you are wearing medium or heavy armor.

Ih46EC8VV0Dv205a.description:
Xa Hoi’s elite warriors are trained to deflect energy attacks. 

Benefits: Choose an energy type (acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic) when you acquire this trait.

When you are wearing medium or heavy armor, you gain a +2 trait bonus on Reflex saves against spells and effects of the chosen energy type.
Ih46EC8VV0Dv205a.name: Dragon Armor

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to avoid being blinded or dazzled.

IjvwPjzSqTGkWHab.description:
After a close call with snow blindness on the Crown of the World or the scouring winds of Hongal, you honed your instincts to protect your eyes.

Requirements: Tian Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws to avoid being blinded or dazzled.
IjvwPjzSqTGkWHab.name: Nearly Blinded (Human; Tian)

contextNotes.text: Once per day, when you would be reduced to 0 or fewer hit points as a result of a failed check on your part, you may invoke your Cheat Death ability to reroll the failed check. You must take the result of the second roll, even if it is worse.

Once per day, when you would be reduced to 0 or fewer hit points as a result of a failed check on your part, you may invoke your Cheat Death ability to reroll the failed check. You must take the result of the second roll, even if it is worse.

Once per day, when you would be reduced to 0 or fewer hit points as a result of a failed check on your part, you may invoke your Cheat Death ability to reroll the failed check. You must take the result of the second roll, even if it is worse.

IlvDg6IUWFRUPvTw.description:
Even Besmara's most faithful worshipers usually call upon her only in times of greatest need. Sometimes Besmara intervenes on behalf of her faithful; other times, she turns her face away as they sink beneath the waves.

Requirements: Besmara

Benefits: Once per day, when you would be reduced to 0 or fewer hit points as a result of a failed ability check, skill check, or saving throw on your part, you may invoke this ability in order to reroll the failed check. You must take the result of the second roll, even if it is worse than the original.
IlvDg6IUWFRUPvTw.name: Cheat Death (Besmara)

InDVqwcbcKmDM9as.description:
Your innate connection with the powers of darkness serves you well when evil zealots pray on your behalf.

Requirements: Tielfing

Benefits: Whenever a spellcaster capable of channeling negative energy casts a beneficial spell on you, she acts as if she were one level higher for the purpose of determining that spell's effects.
InDVqwcbcKmDM9as.name: Blessing of Darkness (Tiefling)

contextNotes.text: When you use your blood drain ability, you gain 7 temporary hit points instead of 5.

IrvQ5wDo1YjDleeL.description:
The ferocity of your hunger grants you the ability to draw life from your victims faster.

Requirements: Nosferatu Vampire Heritage

Benefits: When you use your blood drain ability, you gain 7 temporary hit points instead of 5.
IrvQ5wDo1YjDleeL.name: Rapid Drain (Vampire; Nosferatu)

IstR2czenXYHYQgm.description:
You have learned the secrets of an ancient prayer that wards off the attacks of demons.

Requirements: Mendev Crusaders

Benefits: As a standard action, you can recite a holy chant that affects demons as if you were under the effect of a sanctuary spell (caster level equal to 1/2 your Hit Dice + your Charisma modifier).
IstR2czenXYHYQgm.name: St. Clydwell's Ward (Mendev Crusaders)

ItmWYBOAQpP0IYdd.description:
You’re favored by the lightning shaman of your tribe, and he gifted you several sacred items as a reminder of your origins.

Requirements: Kobold

Benefits: You begin play with three vials of bottled lighting. These don’t count against your starting character wealth.
ItmWYBOAQpP0IYdd.name: Lightning Blessed (Kobold)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on attack and damage rolls against undead creatures that you have personally identified using the Knowledge (religion) skill.

IutVBuFD9dL7jong.description:
Your military service in Lastwall taught you how to identify undead creatures, changing them in your mind from mysterious terrors to concrete foes you know how to deal with.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attack and damage rolls against undead creatures that you have personally identified using the Knowledge (religion) skill.
IutVBuFD9dL7jong.name: Lastwall Defender

contextNotes.text: If you are able to act during the surprise round, you can draw a weapon (but not a potion or magic item) as a free action during that round.

Ivty2Hp3ABUDLkkV.description:
You have spent all of your adult life with eyes turned northward, waiting for the Taldan weaklings to give you an excuse to fight, ready to act at a moment's notice.

Requirements: Character from Qadira who have had family members, neighbors, or friends affected by Taldan aggression or who have fallen victim to this hatred themselves.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus to Initiative checks, and if you are able to act during the surprise round of an encounter, you can draw a weapon (but not a potion or magic item) as a free action during that round.
Ivty2Hp3ABUDLkkV.name: Watching Taldor (Qadira)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] bonus to influence those who might be romantically attracted to you

IxmTohfeXP7fUaom.description:
Your sign is of two lovers, intertwined as one.

Requirements: 17 Calistril - 11 Pharast

Benefits: You gain a +2 bonus on Diplomacy checks to influence those who might be romantically attracted to you, and Diplomacy becomes a class skill for you.
IxmTohfeXP7fUaom.name: The Newlyweds

contextNotes.text: +[[4]] Trait bonus to pass as human.

Izrqpqg5WFuHM6uH.description:
You have enough human features that it’s easy for you to pass for a pureblooded human.

Requirements: Half-orc

Benefits: You gain a +4 trait bonus on Disguise checks to pass as human and Disguise is always a class skill for you.
Izrqpqg5WFuHM6uH.name: Almost Human (Half-Orc)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus while wielding a two-handed melee weapon.

IzzzYZm1kVRYfnYF.description:
You learned from Shoanti champions to take advantage of the dramatic swings required by heavy weapons like the earth breaker.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Intimidate checks while wielding a two-handed melee weapon.
IzzzYZm1kVRYfnYF.name: Thunder and Fang Performer

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus vs fear effects whenever your eidolon is within 30 feet.

J5U0j6EiZqti5K23.description:
You are bolstered against fear when your eidolon is near.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on all saving throws against fear effects whenever your eidolon is within 30 feet.
J5U0j6EiZqti5K23.name: Perpetual Companion

JCIBCRUk8SCm46By.description:
Firearms you wield are especially dangerous to you and everyone nearby.

Benefits: Whenever a firearm you wield misfires or explodes, roll a d%. On a result of 1–25, the misfire or explosion is delayed; reroll the attack with a –5 penalty (penalties from the broken condition are not applied to this reroll, and a firearm that was already broken does not explode). After the reroll is resolved, apply the effects of the misfire or explosion as normal. (If the d% roll result is 26 or higher, the misfire or explosion happens as normal.) Whenever a firearm you wield explodes due to a misfire, increase the explosion’s damage by 1d6 plus 1d6 for every 4 character levels you have.
JCIBCRUk8SCm46By.name: Volatile Fuse

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to perform a dirty trick combat maneuver for the purpose of making your opponent sickened.

JGa60uiRcHhsvXuT.description:
You have learned how to exploit the natural disgust you provoke when in close proximity to others.

Requirements: The Motherless Tiefling Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on combat maneuver checks to perform a dirty trick combat maneuver for the purpose of making your opponent sickened.
JGa60uiRcHhsvXuT.name: Vile Kiss (Tiefling; The Motherless)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to move through threatened squares.

JI099zztZv0U0d9K.description:
You are particularly quick on your feet.

Requirements: Silver Crusade

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Acrobatics checks made to move through an enemy’s threatened squares.
JI099zztZv0U0d9K.name: Unorthodox Strategy (Silver Crusade)

contextNotes.text: +[[3]] Trait bonus on checks about demons.
+[[2]] Trait bonus against mind-affecting spells and effects from demons.

JIi4vWjyAEA2KxVv.description:
Raised in the church of Asmodeus (whether or not you are currently a follower), you've focused your indoctrinated fervor primarily on the elimination of demons.

Requirements: Asmodeus

Benefits: You gain a +3 trait bonus on Knowledge (planes) check about demons and a +2 trait bonus on Will saves against mind-affecting spells and effects from demons.
JIi4vWjyAEA2KxVv.name: Asmodean Demon Hunter (Asmodeus)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to forage for food in or near a river or stream.
+[[2]] Trait bonus on Swim checks in rivers or streams.

JKK1bw7AOaf4ilbd.description:
Your connection with the river and its tributaries has blended with your reverence for the gods of the river passages so much so that you seem divinely blessed while plying river waters.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Swim checks in rivers or streams, and a +2 trait bonus on Survival checks to forage for food in or near a river or stream.
JKK1bw7AOaf4ilbd.name: River Acumen

contextNotes.text: Take only a -[[2]] penalty on attack rolls when squeezing.
Take only a -[[2]] penalty to AC.when squeezing.

JKUjc2MZxH8BEq6K.description:
Requirements

Darklands

Benefits: Because of the frequent need to move through the tight tunnels and other narrow spaces surrounding your tribe’s lair, you’re able to move normally when squeezing and take only a –2 penalty on attack rolls and to AC.
JKUjc2MZxH8BEq6K.name: Suck in Your Gut (Darklands)

JKWXBpaxfQSPkwda.description:
You were raised with a daily regimen to keep your mind sharp and your words fluid.

Requirements: Vudrani Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on concentration checks and on Bluff checks.
JKWXBpaxfQSPkwda.name: Sharp Wits (Human; Vudrani)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to survive in a subterranean wilderness.

JOjJLmckTIt3hBKY.description:
You’ve regularly traversed Nar-Voth and know how to subsist in that lightless realm better than most surface dwellers.

Requirements: Nar-Voth

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Survival checks to survive in a subterranean wilderness, and Survival is a class skill for you.
JOjJLmckTIt3hBKY.name: Cavern Survivor (Nar-Voth)

JPDir28iBA15cfmU.description:
Requirements: Grungir Forest

Benefits: You gain Sylvan as a bonus language. Additionally, choose Bluff, Diplomacy, or Knowledge (nature). That skill is a class skill for you.
JPDir28iBA15cfmU.name: Fey Mediator (Grungir Forest)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on attack rolls when fighting abolitionists or those you have good reason to believe targeted you because of your slaver activities.

JSIZxoewhIc3lblg.description:
You hunt those who hunt slavers, whether as one of Captain Bhey’s special task forces, or independently.

Requirements: Okeno

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attack rolls when fighting abolitionists or those you have good reason to believe targeted you because of your slaver activities.
JSIZxoewhIc3lblg.name: Abolitionist Hunter (Okeno)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to pass along secret messages.

JSTmRQ37ThWpXO77.description:
It isn’t what you say—it’s how you say it.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Bluff checks to pass along secret messages.
JSTmRQ37ThWpXO77.name: Doublespeak

contextNotes.text: Once per day, you can cast a bloodline spell as if you had the Still Spell feat without increasing its level.

JSipk2rTNCT0nPNM.description:
Without a single gesture, you can unleash a bloodline spell.

Benefits: Once per day, you can cast a bloodline spell as if you had the Still Spell feat. Using this trait does not modify the spell’s level.
JSipk2rTNCT0nPNM.name: Unseen but Not Undone

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on rolls to confirm critical hits against favored enemies of your own subtype.
+[[1]] Trait bonus to track against favored enemies of your own subtype.

JTPR9WRh0YFpswch.description:
Your own people are your favored enemy.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on rolls to confirm critical hits against favored enemies of your own subtype and on Survival checks made to track such creatures.
JTPR9WRh0YFpswch.name: Scarred Descendant

contextNotes.text: You need twice as much food and liquid as normal for the purposes of preventing starvation and thirst.

JVm2TQpldUHQxyoN.description:
You have become so accustomed to binging on the finer things in life that you find going without such excess particularly strenuous.

Effects: Goods and services cost you 10% more (and can’t be paid for by allies), and you need twice as much food and liquid as normal for the purposes of preventing starvation and thirst.
JVm2TQpldUHQxyoN.name: Insatiable

JW189M8o6z6dtgDk.description:
As a former slave, you learned how to conceal your malice toward your owner behind a facade of clumsiness.

Requirements: Cheliax, Katapesh; Halfling

Benefits: The first time you attack someone with an attack that deals nonlethal damage, your target must make a Sense Motive opposed by your Bluff check minus the damage dealt to realize you actually intended to harm him; failure means he believe the injury was an accident on your part instead (though he may still want to punish you for it).
JW189M8o6z6dtgDk.name: Clumsy Slave (Cheliax, Katapesh; Halfling)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to detect when an underling is trying to hide something from you, and can attempt such checks instead of Perception checks to notice and react to a subordinate’s surprise attack against you.

JaYhtsJ6c2mkQ2Zo.description:
You have an uncanny ability to spot a mutiny brewing.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks to detect when an underling is trying to hide something from you, and can attempt such checks instead of Perception checks to notice and react to a subordinate’s surprise attack against you.
JaYhtsJ6c2mkQ2Zo.name: Detect Disobedience

JalH63VxUIp3urjY.description:
You strive to spread the Dawnflower’s message of kindness and compassion throughout the land, no matter how dangerous the road may be.

Requirements: Sarenrae

Benefits: Whenever you use channel energy, fervor, or lay on hands to heal a living creature, you can reroll any healing die roll that results in a natural 1 (you must use the new result).
JalH63VxUIp3urjY.name: Envoy of Healing (Sarenrae)

JbrjxqocwPIYYipy.description:
You've participated in the mock gladiatorial battles and athletic feats at the Serpent's Run, Magnimar's grand hippodrome, but the safe nature of those games leaves you bored. Seeking greater thrills and tests of your abilities, you've pledged your arms and skill to the local Pathfinder lodge.

Benefits: Choose one of the following benefits to represent the techniques you learned from your time at the Serpent's Run:

  • Choose a specific type of armor. When wearing armor of that type, you treat its armor check penalty as if it were –1 lower.
  • When fighting with two weapons, the penalty imposed on your primary weapon is reduced by 1.
  • You gain a +2 trait bonus on Intimidate checks to demoralize opponents.
JbrjxqocwPIYYipy.name: Serpent Runner (Shattered Star)

contextNotes.text: One additional piece of useful information, when creature is identified.

JhVRG8869a2Pnwga.description:
You have shown a significant talent for the magical arts, gaining the attention of the famed Acadamae of Korvosa.

Benefits: Whenever you succeed at a Knowledge (planes) check to identify a creature and its special powers or vulnerabilities, you gain one additional piece of useful information (as if your skill check result had been 5 higher).
JhVRG8869a2Pnwga.name: Acadamae Neophyte

JlK99yMeZoCHXg2I.description:
You were raised as a forest trapper, and are adept at moving quickly through underbrush.

Requirements: Kobold

Benefits: For 3 rounds per day, you can move through light or heavy undergrowth at full speed. This ability doesn’t work in terrain that has been magically manipulated to impede motion.
JlK99yMeZoCHXg2I.name: Slithering Stride (Kobold)

contextNotes.text: You can attempt checks untrained.

Jm0sTRVhoQOOOLZg.description:
You are experienced at facing off against spellcasters.

Benefits: You can attempt Knowledge (arcana) checks untrained; if you have ranks in that skill, you instead gain a +1 trait bonus on those checks. The concentration DC to cast a spell defensively in your threatened area increases by 1.
Jm0sTRVhoQOOOLZg.name: Practiced Disruptor

JmBTIrmBVO4MQUy3.description:
The murky tunnels of your tribal home were infested with voracious oozes, which were a constant threat to your tribe. To protect yourselves, you and your tribespeople never strayed far without anti-ooze acid.

Requirements: Kobold

Benefits: You begin play with three alkali flasks. These don’t count against your starting character wealth.
JmBTIrmBVO4MQUy3.name: Ooze Defense (Kobold)

JoqjHM3bTDGm0FmD.description:
Your skin is an odd tint that somehow absorbs background colors. Maybe because your mother drank a lot of potions when you were still inside her belly. Maybe because you've been blessed by the barghests. Maybe because you're just better than the other boring goblins.

Requirements: Goblin

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Stealth checks, providing you wear only light armor or no armor.
JoqjHM3bTDGm0FmD.name: Color Thief (Goblin)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against divine spells.

JrogPgpAWxonEGh0.description:
Your faith was stifled while you lived in the religiously oppressive slums of Changdo, and the persecutions against you only spurred your own beliefs and made your convictions stronger.

Requirements: Po Li

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against divine spells.
JrogPgpAWxonEGh0.name: Passionate Believer (Po Li)

contextNotes.text: -[[2]] penalty vs sleep effects.

JrvHgoKC1DcEVbQA.description: Effects: You must sleep or rest for at least 12 hours each night to get the benefits of a full night’s rest. You take a –2 penalty on saving throws against sleep effects.
JrvHgoKC1DcEVbQA.name: Sleepy

contextNotes.text: Whenever you damage an opponent that is casting a spell with a melee attack that deals fire damage (such as a flaming weapon or a torch), the DC of the concentration check for your opponent to cast the spell is equal to 10 + the non-fire damage dealt + double the fire damage dealt + the spell’s level (instead of just 10 + the damage dealt + the spell’s level).

JtUXjI4p8c1tzzXZ.description:
Requirements: Ifrit

Benefits: Whenever you damage an opponent that is casting a spell with a melee attack that deals fire damage (such as a flaming weapon or a torch), the DC of the concentration check for your opponent to cast the spell is equal to 10 + the non-fire damage dealt + double the fire damage dealt + the spell’s level (instead of just 10 + the damage dealt + the spell’s level).
JtUXjI4p8c1tzzXZ.name: Expert Distractor (Ifrit)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to gather information in your chosen home port.

JtxtWVSlyHRNuuFD.description:
You have a fondness for a particular port, and the people who live and do business there return the sentiment.

Requirements: The Shackles

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks to gather information in your chosen home port.
JtxtWVSlyHRNuuFD.name: Home Port (The Shackles)

JxJr7ofe0yC95eDJ.description:
You were raised in one of the numerous clans of Xa Hoi, and learned a valuable trade in your early years.

Requirements: Xa Hoi

Benefits: Pick one Craft skill. You gain a +2 trait bonus on checks with that skill, and it becomes a class skill for you.
JxJr7ofe0yC95eDJ.name: Clan Artisan (Xa Hoi)

K0MJg1va6kwSGclx.description:
You have studied at Vigil's Crusader War College, and are skilled in both heraldry and siege tactics.

Requirements: Lastwall

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (engineering) and Knowledge (nobility) checks, and one of these skills is always a class skill for you.
K0MJg1va6kwSGclx.name: Crusader Tactician (Lastwall)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to pass secret messages to <the chosen character>.

K0xZgSeafJLuD8nc.description:
Intrigued by the travels of one of your long-time acquaintances, you’ve convinced her to teach you one of the exotic languages she picked up in her journeys.

Benefits: Choose one of the following characters. You may select one of that character’s languages as a bonus language. Additionally, you gain a +2 trait bonus on Bluff checks made to pass secret messages to the chosen character (see the description of the Bluff skill).

NPC Choices

Ameiko: Tien, Varisian

Koya or Sandru: Varisian

Shalelu: Elven, Goblin
K0xZgSeafJLuD8nc.name: Foreign-Tongued (Jade Regent)

K7N6hhUR8DfdLUTP.description:
The eternal winter of Irrisen is as much a part of you as it is the land.

Requirements: Irrisen

Benefits: You may cast ray of frost once per day as a spell-like ability. This is cast at your highest caster level gained; if you have no caster level, it functions at CL 1st.
K7N6hhUR8DfdLUTP.name: Winter's Soul (Irrisen)

K9jDY7MNr8t7Lcue.description:
The vaults of the Grand Lodge in Absalom contain many secrets of the divine powers of the gods, and you have studied your god extensively.

Requirements: Cleric, Pathfinder Society

Benefits: You may channel energy 1 additional time per day.
K9jDY7MNr8t7Lcue.name: Exalted of the Society (Cleric, Pathfinder Society)

contextNotes.text: When you successfully use the Heal skill to treat an ally’s poison or disease, you grant the ally an additional +1 trait bonus on their saving throw against the disease or poison.

KDLMtcFlc3jgjmYv.description:
With the help of a druidic healer, you narrowly escaped death by disease or poisoning while on the run from Molthuni militias, whether contracting the ailment was an accident or you were the victim of more sinister forces.

Requirements: Must hail from Nirmathas or have lived there for at least 1 year

Benefits: Whenever you successfully use the Heal skill to treat an ally’s poison or disease, you grant the ally an additional +1 trait bonus on the saving throw against the disease or poison. Heal is a class skill for you.
KDLMtcFlc3jgjmYv.name: Guerrilla Mender (Nirmathas)

KEGPf1ZtVGGdRfbV.description:
Either from inborn talent, whimsy of the gods, or obsessive study of strange tomes, you have mastered the use of a cantrip.

Benefits: Choose a 0-level spell. You may cast that spell once per day as a spell-like ability. This spell-like ability is cast at your highest caster level gained; if you have no caster level, it functions at CL 1st. The spell-like ability's save DC is Charisma-based.
KEGPf1ZtVGGdRfbV.name: Magical Talent

contextNotes.text: You reduce any foe’s cover bonus to AC from water by 2.

KFBjlcTCWtruzltX.description:
At a vulnerable age, you survived an encounter with a monstrous sea creature.

Requirements: Tengu

Benefits: You reduce any foe’s cover bonus to AC from water by 2.
KFBjlcTCWtruzltX.name: Seafaring Slayer (Tengu)

contextNotes.text: At the start of each day, pick one of the following skills: Appraise, Bluff, Craft (pick one craft skill), Diplomacy, Intimidate, or Knowledge (local). You gain a +2 trait bonus on that skill until the start of the next day.

At the start of each day, pick one of the following skills: Appraise, Bluff, Craft (pick one craft skill), Diplomacy, Intimidate, or Knowledge (local). You gain a +2 trait bonus on that skill until the start of the next day.

At the start of each day, pick one of the following skills: Appraise, Bluff, Craft (pick one craft skill), Diplomacy, Intimidate, or Knowledge (local). You gain a +2 trait bonus on that skill until the start of the next day.

At the start of each day, pick one of the following skills: Appraise, Bluff, Craft (pick one craft skill), Diplomacy, Intimidate, or Knowledge (local). You gain a +2 trait bonus on that skill until the start of the next day.

At the start of each day, pick one of the following skills: Appraise, Bluff, Craft (pick one craft skill), Diplomacy, Intimidate, or Knowledge (local). You gain a +2 trait bonus on that skill until the start of the next day.

At the start of each day, pick one of the following skills: Appraise, Bluff, Craft (pick one craft skill), Diplomacy, Intimidate, or Knowledge (local). You gain a +2 trait bonus on that skill until the start of the next day.

KGc2A7GyfOwiiv1K.description:
Your knowledge of the dwarven pantheon tells you precisely which gods have jurisdiction over which aspects of your life, and you can call upon their help even if they are not your patron.

Requirements: Any dwarven deity

Benefits: At the start of each day, pick one of the following skills: Appraise, Bluff, Craft (pick one craft skill), Diplomacy, Intimidate, or Knowledge (local). You gain a +2 trait bonus on that skill until the start of the next day.
KGc2A7GyfOwiiv1K.name: Propitiation (any dwarven deity)

contextNotes.text: When you’re wielding a broken early firearm, the amount your misfire value increases by is reduced by 1.

KJrtCwUEBcPo2px6.description:
Your extensive experience with firearms allows you to get the most out of those unique weapons.

Benefits: When you’re wielding a broken early firearm, the amount your misfire value increases by is reduced by 1.
KJrtCwUEBcPo2px6.name: Alkenstar Engineer

KMOGaXPob6AyZo7p.description: Benefits: You can select a magnetic compass for your arcane bond class feature; this compass is nonmagical, but you can later spend 250 gp to upgrade it into a wayfinder. Choosing this trait allows you to upgrade this wayfinder to a variant or unique wayfinder per the normal rules for improving magic items on page 553 of the Pathfinder RPG Core Rulebook. A bonded wayfinder must be held in your hand to grant the benefits of being a bonded object.
KMOGaXPob6AyZo7p.name: Pathfinder's Focus

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Competence bonus on check made regarding the Mwangi Expanse, as long as you remain able to consult the detailed map of the Mwangi Expanse you began play with.

KNugVhFr4gu14ORB.description:
While you aren't necessarily a native of Cheliax, you boarded the Jenivere at one of that country's port cities. As the people of Cheliax generally know the Mwangi Expanse as a near legendary land home to strange beasts and exotic treasures, your views of the region have a distinctly romantic tinge, and the desire for fame, wealth, and adventure likely motivate your travels.

Benefits: You begin the campaign with a detailed map of the Mwangi Expanse (this grants +2 competence bonus on all Knowledge (geography) checks made regarding this region) and 200 gp worth of mundane equipment to aid your exploration of the jungle.
KNugVhFr4gu14ORB.name: Boarded in Cheliax (Serpent's Skull)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus on saving throws against fear, when wielding a firearm

KOkzyLZ5Zn4x6GW6.description:
You make an impression during a standoff.

Benefits: As long as you have a firearm drawn, you gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against fear and the DCs of Intimidate checks to demoralize you increase by 2.
KOkzyLZ5Zn4x6GW6.name: Armed Grit

KQOcLTeWu57NjXZW.description:
You were trained to use shields as weapons.

Requirements: Gorum

Benefits: Heavy and light shields are considered simple weapons rather than martial weapons for you. Heavy shields are considered light weapons for you.
KQOcLTeWu57NjXZW.name: Shield-Trained (Gorum)

KQtPocPHi0X5nizE.description:
You attempt to maintain older traditions, despite changing social norms, and find great value in the trappings and codes of the aristocracy.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nobility) checks, and Knowledge (nobility) is a class skill for you.
KQtPocPHi0X5nizE.name: Traditionalist (Divine Anthology)

KRwH7QDMRRM6ezEp.description:
The icy breath of a white dragon fills your lungs.

Requirements: Kobold

Benefits: Once per day, you can quickly exhale to produce a frigid cloud of dense fog that quickly sinks to the ground. This freezing mist covers a 10-foot-square area with slippery ice that’s as difficult to traverse as an ice sheet (Core Rulebook 430).
KRwH7QDMRRM6ezEp.name: Frost Spitter (Kobold)

KVPPo8NoEqjK3SYe.description:
The sorcerers of your tribe are adept at summoning and binding outsiders from the Elemental Plane of Fire. In order to communicate with their thralls, many in your tribe learned the rudiments of the outsiders’ language.

Requirements: Kobold

Benefits: In addition to speaking Draconic, you begin play with the ability to speak Ignan.
KVPPo8NoEqjK3SYe.name: Fire-Tongued (Kobold)

KVXZlBpGnO8dyAsG.description:
Growing up in a city has broadened your philosophy, and helped you interpret your patron’s divine will in a novel way.

Benefits: You gain Knowledge (local) as a class skill.

Additionally, you can select one of the following subdomains using the normal rules for subdomains so long as your deity grants access to its associated domain: Competition, Duels, Espionage, Fortifications, Industry, Legislation, Plague, or Riot.
KVXZlBpGnO8dyAsG.name: Urban Acolyte

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against spells from the necromancy school or any effect that deals negative energy damage.

KVpQIaJ5o0SlyKhz.description:
Your exposure to the necromantic arts has strengthened your defenses against its vile rot.

Requirements: Whispering Way

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against spells from the necromancy school or any effect that deals negative energy damage.
KVpQIaJ5o0SlyKhz.name: Necrotic Aura (Whispering Way)

KVrNf7eTgJbtA8gl.description:
You are not from town; you’ve recently come from somewhere else and are hoping to make your fortune here. Pick one of the following reasons to be a newcomer to the area.

Benefits: Pick one of the following reasons to be a newcomer to the area:

Lore Seeker

The secrets of an ancient fallen civilization intrigue you, particularly the magical traditions of its highly mystical culture. You’ve studied magic intensely, and hope to increase that knowledge by adding ancient lore. You’ve come to the region to pursue that study, and chose the town as your base because it was out of the way of bigger cities—meaning less competition to study the ancient monuments in the region, you hope!

You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (arcana) checks, and Knowledge (arcana) is a class skill for you.

If you cast arcane spells, pick three spells on your spell list. You are particularly adept at casting these spells, so they function at +1 caster level when you cast them, and their save DCs (if any) gain a +1 bonus.
KVrNf7eTgJbtA8gl.name: Outlander - Lore Seeker (Any Campaign)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on Wild Empathy checks.

KWXtfaPkGWdg3Azr.description:
You grew up with an affinity for predatory animals, and whispers amid your clan suggest somewhere in the past, lycanthropy afflicted an ancestor. Whether or not you share this affliction, you often have animalistic urges.

Requirements: Ulfen Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Handle Animal and Wild Empathy checks.
KWXtfaPkGWdg3Azr.name: Animalistic Affliction (Human; Ulfen)

KXeFCTFD1sMKDp6C.description:
Whether you are a commoner who has come to despise the haughty upper crust or a holier-than-thou noble who can’t stand being around the unwashed masses, your contempt drives you to study carefully, making sure you always have the upper hand in social exchanges with them.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (local) checks and Knowledge (nobility) checks, and one of these skills becomes a class skill for you.
KXeFCTFD1sMKDp6C.name: Contemptuous

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] bonus to your AC against attacks of opportunity
+[[1]] Trait bonus on all attack rolls against foes that threaten, (Ameiko or Shalelu),  your hero.

Ka04bvc1PcMxl8uW.description:
Everyone in town seems to admire Ameiko and Shalelu,they're heroes, after all, and played key roles in the recent troubles that plagued Sandpoint. You, though, take this admiration to a new level,you practically worship one of these two. This could be because you saw one of them perform a particularly impressive act of bravery at some point in the past, or maybe they just happened to give you the exact right words of encouragement or a kind gift at some point a few years ago when you were young and impressionable. In any case, you've done your best to emulate your hero's talents at spellcasting or combat.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all attack rolls against foes that threaten your hero as well as one of the following:

If your hero is Ameiko, you gain a +2 bonus on concentration checks. If your hero is Shalelu, you gain a +1 bonus to your AC against attacks of opportunity.

NPC Choices Ameiko, Shalelu
Ka04bvc1PcMxl8uW.name: Hero Worship (Jade Regent)

contextNotes.text: +[[5]] Trait bonus when attempting to convince someone an honest answer is a falsehood. (This trait already provides +1)

KakUVlrrmzxYCrIj.description:
Straightforward answers bore you, for they only encourage people to depend on others rather than find out for themselves. You have grown adept over the years at convincing people of falsehoods and couching your honest answers in so much doublespeak they may as well be lies.

Requirements: Ganzi

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks, which increases to +5 when attempting to convince someone an honest answer is a falsehood.
KakUVlrrmzxYCrIj.name: Creative Reality (Ganzi)

contextNotes.text: +[[3+floor(@attributes.hd.total /2)]] Trait bonus, once per day, when you attempt to predict the weather.
+[[1]] Trait bonus against the effects of cold and hot weather.

KbUs4n95TQD782w4.description:
As a Transitional Triaxian, you are attuned to the weather no matter what world you stand upon.

Requirements: Triaxian

Benefits: Once per day when you attempt a Survival check to predict the weather, you can add a trait bonus equal to 3 + 1/2 your character level. In addition, you gain a +1 trait bonus on Fortitude saves against the effects of cold and hot weather.
KbUs4n95TQD782w4.name: Transitional (Triaxian)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to perform the Aid Another action
+[[2]] Trait bonus to perform the Aid Another action

Kd5nFqu5VHibvkpp.description:
Your birth sign aligned significantly with Bretheda on the day you were born, granting you a knack for cooperation in the heat of battle.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on attack rolls to perform the aid another action.
Kd5nFqu5VHibvkpp.name: Born under the Cradle

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on weapon damage rolls made against objects and constructs.

KdYqyO6M4lk61XgZ.description:
You have a talent for striking objects at their weakest points.

Requirements: Pitborn Tielfling Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on weapon damage rolls made against objects and constructs.
KdYqyO6M4lk61XgZ.name: Flair for Destruction (Tiefling; Pitborn)

KlwS1tJ7WyRBohli.description:
Your time spent as a Pathfinder has taught you new truths about the origins of the your rage ability.

Requirement(s) Barbarian, Pathfinder Society

Benefits: You may use your rage ability for 3 additional rounds per day.
KlwS1tJ7WyRBohli.name: Berserker of the Society (Barbarian, Pathfinder Society)

contextNotes.text: -[[4]] Penalty against creatures with an attitude toward you of indifferent or better

KrFtj5k6jm8XnrIZ.description:
You received something through trickery that you did not deserve, and your guilt for the misdeed distracts you from dangers around you.

Effects: You take a -4 penalty on Bluff checks against creatures with an attitude toward you of indifferent or better.
KrFtj5k6jm8XnrIZ.name: Guilty Fraud

KrS1cl6OghLDpbWl.description:
You've always loathed serpents and other slithering monsters, ever since you can remember, and have studied them extensively.

Requirements: Plumekith Aasimar Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge (dungeoneering) checks and Knowledge (dungeoneering) is always a class skill for you.
KrS1cl6OghLDpbWl.name: Snake Hater (Aasimar; Plumekith)

Ks4sYAlnpuUIZVv4.description:
As a parting gift, the shaman of your tribe gave you an alchemical concoction as a reminder of your icy home.

Requirements: Kobold

Benefits: You begin play with three bottles of liquid ice. These don’t count against your starting character wealth.
Ks4sYAlnpuUIZVv4.name: Icy Mementos (Kobold)

KtNx7EHNi8lcrKLz.description:
Requirements: Shelyn

Benefits: Once per day when you manifest your faith in your goddess, you gain a +4 trait bonus on a single Bluff, Craft, Diplomacy, or Perform skill check. You must choose to use this trait immediately after rolling the skill check but before the results are revealed by the GM.
KtNx7EHNi8lcrKLz.name: Inner Beauty (Shelyn)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus with those who find you attractive.

Kv6pIahyHoJmOxDL.description:
