As a former slave of the hobgoblins, you were forced to make many of the weapons and shields that your captors used in war.

Requirements: Kaoling

Benefits: Choose either Craft (armor) or Craft (weapons). You gain a +1 trait bonus on the chosen skill, and it becomes a class skill for you.
sIKYG512BdRbtROD.name: Indentured Blacksmith (Kaoling)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to improve the attitude of oppressed, enslaved, or imprisoned subjects, and, unless they have reason to distrust you, their starting attitude toward you is at least indifferent.

sLoSea2slKZujT9E.description:
Others recognize that you are filled with the Andoren spirit of liberty and equality.

Requirements: Eagle Knight

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks to improve the attitude of oppressed, enslaved, or imprisoned subjects, and unless they have reason to distrust you, their starting attitude toward you is at least indifferent, if not better.
sLoSea2slKZujT9E.name: Confidante to the Oppressed (Eagle Knight)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against mind-affecting effects.

sNBwHQ1IvOvP1A82.description:
At some point you were tainted with the corruption of the undead, and you have gained some of their defenses.

Requirements: Any race

Benefits: You gain either a +1 trait bonus on Fortitude saving throws or a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against mind-affecting effects (your choice).
sNBwHQ1IvOvP1A82.name: Deathtouched (Any)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on opposed checks.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on opposed checks.

sOp5mGcos8QiNBgS.description:
You survived an assassination attempt once. 

Requirements: Daggermark

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on opposed Perception and Sense Motive checks. One of these skills is always a class skill for you.
sOp5mGcos8QiNBgS.name: Wary (Daggermark)

contextNotes.text: Once per day, when you fail a saving throw against a charm or compulsion effect that would cause you to act differently than you normally would, you can immediately reroll that saving throw as a free action. You must take the second result, even if it’s worse. ([[@resources.setMindRuinsOfAzlant.value]] remaining uses)

sOr4h4De6aaiDw8z.description:
Every time that you’ve said you’d do something, you’ve made sure to follow through. You can’t remember a time when you weren’t this way. People have a hard time making you change your mind once you’ve set yourself on a certain path. You might be exceptionally stubborn or you may just have a particular determination. Either way, you’re going to keep doing what you set your mind to. The Bountiful Venture Company recognized this useful trait of yours and selected you for the second wave of colonists because of your great resolve and unswerving dedication to what you set your mind upon.

Benefits: Once per day when you fail a saving throw against a charm or compulsion effect that would cause you to act differently than you normally would, you can immediately reroll that saving throw as a free action. You must take the second result, even if it’s worse.
sOr4h4De6aaiDw8z.name: Set Mind (Ruins of Azlant)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] on checks opposed by religious authorities’ Sense Motive checks.

sPsB67DupYlnX932.description:
You were raised in a faith that did not center on a traditional god or that followed a heretical interpretation of a traditional deity. You learned to deflect attention, especially from ecclesiastical figures.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks. This bonus increases to +3 on Bluff checks opposed by religious authorities’ Sense Motive checks.
sPsB67DupYlnX932.name: Heretic's Caution

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against injury poisons.

sQ1P04eirsWi3I75.description:
In the River Kingdoms’ Daggermark, odds are good that any given blade is coated in some kind of poison, and people there are used to both poisoning and being poisoned.

Requirements: River Kingdoms

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Fortitude saving throws against injury poisons.

Additionally, you are immune to one specific nonmagical injury poison. You must choose this poison when you choose this trait and cannot change it.
sQ1P04eirsWi3I75.name: Poisoned Blade Resistance (River Kingdoms)

sTM7hh33pjbqX6sv.description:
Words and letters say more to you than their writers ever intended.

Requirements: Ru-Shi Dhampir Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Linguistics checks, and learn to speak and read one additional language from your list of racial languages. Linguistics is always a class skill for you.
sTM7hh33pjbqX6sv.name: Linguistic Genius (Dhampir; Ru-Shi)

sTWAFCP3OLSeHGHJ.description:
You are used to fighting in hilly environments.

Requirements: Sargavan

Benefits: You may run or charge downhill on a steep slope (moving up to your base speed) without making an Acrobatics check to avoid stumbling but if you travel farther than this distance, the normal rules for steep slopes apply.
sTWAFCP3OLSeHGHJ.name: Hill Fighter (Sargavan)

sUshfdsjoqMcHI40.description:
When you, like all other young gnomes, were taught the hodgepodge Gnome language, you became curious about the original meaning of each word and what language it was derived from. Anytime you come across a new language, you are immediately absorbed by both how it works and what words you can co-opt from it for the Gnome language.

Requirements: Gnome

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Linguistics checks, know one additional bonus language, and treat Linguistics as a class skill.
sUshfdsjoqMcHI40.name: Etymologist (Gnome)

sVo2dxtFjXWlqrKx.description:
One of your ancestors was an infamous Free Captain of the Shackles, whose very name struck fear in the hearts of those who sailed the seas in search of an honest living. Piracy is in your blood, and you’ve always longed to follow in your forebear’s footsteps and plunder the shipping lanes. You went to a tavern called the Formidably Maid, a notorious pirate hangout in Port Peril, eager to start your career as a buccaneer. While you were there, however, a dashing and flirtatious corsair caught your eye, and after a whirlwind night of booze and romance, you found yourself beaten senseless and stuffed in a sack, carried off to who knows where.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate and Profession (sailor) checks. In addition, you gain a one-time +1 trait bonus to your Disrepute and Infamy scores (see “The Life of a Pirate” in Pathfinder Adventure Path #55 for details on the Infamy system).
sVo2dxtFjXWlqrKx.name: Buccaneer's Blood (Skull and Shackles)

sZAlsj8LP1LLuuNa.description:
You have spent years handling magic items and know how to test their functions while avoiding catastrophic results.

Requirements: Dark Archive

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Use Magic Device checks, and this skill becomes a class skill for you.
sZAlsj8LP1LLuuNa.name: Arcane Archivist (Dark Archive)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against curse, fear, and emotion effects, when wielding a firearm

sbHxc4ckKOiyUNAf.description:
You have little to fear when there’s a gun in your hand.

Benefits: As long as you are wielding a firearm, you gain a +2 trait bonus on all saving throws against curse, fear, and emotion effects.
sbHxc4ckKOiyUNAf.name: Black Powder Fortune

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to confirm critical hits made as part of a charge. +[[3]] Trait bonus if the critical hit is made against a creature with the orc subtype.

sbVotPuY2KDY4BSU.description:
Requirements: Lastwall, Knight of Ozem

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on rolls to confirm critical hits made as part of a charge. This bonus increases to +3 if the critical hit is made against a creature with the orc subtype.
sbVotPuY2KDY4BSU.name: Orc Impaler (Lastwall; Knight of Ozem)

sdBzU71pPH68dwWg.description:
You studied various Analects of Aroden from a young age and became skilled at using magic written by others.

Benefits: You can cast read magic as a spell-like ability three times per day, using your character level as your caster level.
sdBzU71pPH68dwWg.name: Scholar of the Analects

siQa8WM4FIv6ENRx.description:
Although you might prefer life on board a ship, you often end up in the water for some odd reason.

Requirements: Goblin; The Shackles

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Profession (sailor) and Swim checks, and Swim is always a class skill for you. You might also have a peg leg or a hook for a hand, but that's not so helpful.
siQa8WM4FIv6ENRx.name: Goblin Pirate (Goblin; The Shackles)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against confusion, insanity, madness, and Wisdom damage and drain.

sj62IVPvBQE0s4c0.description:
Your direct involvement with supernatural and alien forces has left you less vulnerable to the insanity they cause.

Requirements: Old Cults

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on any saving throws against confusion, insanity, madness, and Wisdom damage and drain.
sj62IVPvBQE0s4c0.name: Defy Madness (Old Cults)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to move through another creature’s space and to avoid attacks of opportunity for leaving a threatened square

sl4WtUhB1kzG2wNF.description:
You spent much of your youth on crowded streets, dodging quickly around and under others.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Acrobatics checks to move through another creature’s space and to avoid attacks of opportunity for leaving a threatened square.

Suggested Characters

Absalom natives, Chelaxians, Lion Blades
sl4WtUhB1kzG2wNF.name: Crowd Dodger

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against mind-affecting effects.

snZMLrrtcmNH4hrJ.description:
Kintargo is a tough place to live if you count yourself as a law-abiding citizen. While you likely agree with most others of Kintargo that many of the laws put in place by House Thrune seem excessive, you always respected the law and honored it as best you could. You likely worship a deity such as Abadar or Iomedae —a lawful neutral or perhaps lawful good power allowed to practice within Cheliax, but only under restrictions. Yet despite this, Thrune has always made Cheliax a safer place to live. But with recent events, enough is enough. As much as it pains you to admit, the law of the land is now manifestly and obviously not correct, and something must be done to oppose this misuse of power. If that means aligning yourself to a rebel faction such as the Silver Ravens, so be it.

Notes

This trait works particularly well for paladins or other characters who wish to venerate lawful causes but still oppose the government. Your GM should be open to allowing lawful characters to perform actions out of character for someone of lawful alignment, provided the end goal is a new and better government for Kintargo, but with this feat, characters tied strongly to law (such as lawful clerics, monks, or paladins) can hide those ties in ways that help them perform as rebels without giving up their actual convictions.

Benefits: You’re good at hiding your true colors and faith to avoid attracting the wrong kind of attention. You gain a +1 bonus on Disguise checks, and Disguise is always a class skill for you. In addition, when someone uses detect good or detect law on you, your effective Hit Dice are 4 lower than their actual total when someone discerns the strength of your aura. If you are a cleric, paladin, or similar divine spellcaster, you treat yourself as if you were a standard-aligned creature rather than a divine spellcaster for these purposes. This means that until you become 9th level, you won’t radiate an aura of good or law at all when someone casts one of these detection spells. Finally, your internal convictions that you’re on the actual right of law help bolster your mindset, and you gain a +1 trait bonus on all saving throws against mind-affecting effects.
snZMLrrtcmNH4hrJ.name: Fed-Up Citizen (Hell's Rebels)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against fear effects.

sqLfoModAthxaCFZ.description:
You have an unusually sunny spirit and it takes serious doing to dampen your mood.

Requirements: Cayden Cailean

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on all saving throws against fear effects.
sqLfoModAthxaCFZ.name: Good-Natured (Cayden Cailean)

contextNotes.text: +[[4]] Trait bonus to keep others from noticing your aggressive actions.

sqqzR5gD7RX9CdG4.description:
You are adept at keeping witnesses from noticing that anything is wrong.

Benefits: You gain a +4 trait bonus on Bluff checks to keep others from noticing your aggressive actions.
sqqzR5gD7RX9CdG4.name: Nonchalant Thuggery

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on melee damage rolls when you attack a target from higher ground.

srTso5T5UJKENCiP.description:
Aroden taught the people of Absalom to survive any siege with proper preparation and cooperation, and those teachings were passed on to you.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on melee damage rolls when you attack a target from higher ground.
srTso5T5UJKENCiP.name: Siege Defender

st7jCOWVZl2ZIdXU.description:
You grew up in Absalom, and as a child you learned trivia about people and places from all across the world.

Requirements: Absalom

Benefits: Choose Knowledge (geography), Knowledge (local), or Sense Motive; that skill is a class skill for you. In addition, you know one additional bonus language.
st7jCOWVZl2ZIdXU.name: Sophisticated Citizen (Absalom)

stEGVAsBCoaY5Ifk.description:
You claim a tangential but legitimate connection to one of Brevoy’s noble families. If you aren’t human, you were likely adopted by one of Brevoy’s nobles or were instead a favored servant or even a childhood friend of a noble scion. Whatever the cause, you’ve had a comfortable life, but one far from the dignity and decadence your distant cousins know. Although you are associated with an esteemed name, your immediate family is hardly well to do, and you’ve found your name to be more of a burden to you than a boon in many social situations. You’ve recently decided to test yourself, to see if you can face the world without the aegis of a name you have little real claim or care for. An expedition into the storied Stolen Lands seems like just the test to see if you really are worth the title “noble.”

Benefits: Choose one of the following noble families and associated benefits:

Lodovka

Your family has made a living off the coasts of the Lake of Mists and Veils since before Brevoy existed. You gain a +1 trait bonus on Swim checks, and Swim is always treated as a class skill for you. Your family motto is “The Waters, Our Fields.”

Special Note

This is one of six versions of this trait. Other versions can be found here:

Noble Born - Garress (Kingmaker)

Noble Born - Lebeda (Kingmaker)

Noble Born - Medvyed (Kingmaker)

Noble Born - Orlovsky (Kingmaker)

Noble Born - Surtova (Kingmaker)
stEGVAsBCoaY5Ifk.name: Noble Born - Lodovka (Kingmaker)

contextNotes.text: When you make a Bluff check to tell a lie, your target always wants to believe you, granting you the standard +5 bonus on your Bluff check. This bonus only applies if the lie you tell is either believable or unlikely.

stFLtPgLdVgzDn9B.description:
No one can believe someone as pure as you could be deceptive in any way. You have an air of innocence about you, and people have a hard time believing you could ever do anyone harm.

Requirements: Aasimar

Benefits: When you make a Bluff check to tell a lie, your target always wants to believe you, granting you the standard +5 bonus on your Bluff check. This bonus only applies if the lie you tell is either believable or unlikely.
stFLtPgLdVgzDn9B.name: Innocent (Aasimar)

contextNotes.text: If your eidolon is summoned and within 30 feet, and its size exceeds your own, use its size modifier on any Intimidate checks you make.

svNDbySisCjsUKNT.description:
Your eidolon—and your connection to it—makes others ill at ease.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate checks, and Intimidate is always a class skill for you. In addition, if your eidolon is summoned and within 30 feet, and its size exceeds your own, use its size modifier on any Intimidate checks you make.
svNDbySisCjsUKNT.name: Twinned Presence

contextNotes.text: Once per day when you roll damage on a successful critical hit, reroll any 1s and take the new roll (even if it is another 1).  ([[@resources.meridianStrikeLanternLodge.value]] remaining uses)

t1bX3tDIuB34M2NL.description:
Energy flows through channels in the body, like rivers through the land.

Requirements: Lantern Lodge

Benefits: Once per day when you roll damage on a successful critical hit, reroll any 1s and take the new roll (even if it is another 1).
t1bX3tDIuB34M2NL.name: Meridian Strike (Lantern Lodge)

contextNotes.text: Once per adventure, you can retroactively apply a +[[20]] Trait bonus against a mind-affecting effect after you learn the outcome of the roll. A result of a natural 1 still automatically fails.

t2KYxMzNxZBmzu2L.description:
Adventuring has been in your blood for as long as you can remember, and this urge to go out and explore the world left you recently in over your head when you (foolishly or bravely, depending on how you look at it) decided to explore an old Thassilonian ruin near your home town. The adventure ended in tragedy when you set off a devastating trap while investigating a statue of a beautiful woman—someone you believed to be one of the ancient runelords of Thassilon. The trap slaughtered your entire party—including you.

You woke from death some time later, your memories intact but your body transformed. No longer did you resemble your previous self—you instead looked like the woman depicted in the statue. Now, you’ve joined up with a new group of adventurers; despite your tragic first attempt at dungeon delving, your thirst for adventure has returned stronger than ever. You’re sure that this time you’ll be able to keep your fellow explorers alive, and the strange dreams you’ve been having ever since you came back to life in your new body—a body that your research has revealed was originally intended to be a clone of none other than Sorshen, the Runelord of Lust—have only further solidified in your mind the fact that you and your companions are destined for greatness.

Requirements: Your character must be human if you take this trait (though you may retain your previous gender identity). Your ethnicity is Azlanti, but you are not pure-blooded—you have the standard human ability score adjustments.

Unless the GM approves, only one PC in the group can have the Accidental Clone trait.

Benefits: Your resemblance to Sorshen may have unexpected side effects as the campaign progresses, for good or for ill. In any event, you gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff and Diplomacy checks, and these skills are always class skills for you.

Once per adventure, you can retroactively apply a +20 trait bonus to a saving throw against a mind-affecting effect after you learn the outcome of the roll. A saving throw result of a natural 1 still automatically fails, but if the +20 bonus adjusts the save so that it is successful, you treat the failed saving throw as a successful one.
t2KYxMzNxZBmzu2L.name: Accidental Clone (Return of the Runelords)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus in crowds.
+[[1]] Trait bonus in city streets.

t4Jz0OjE41qzauQ8.description:
You can sense an ugly mood brewing in a crowd, and know how to dodge wrathful mobs when they seek victims for their anger.

Requirements: Galt

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks in crowds, and a +1 trait bonus on Stealth checks in city streets.
t4Jz0OjE41qzauQ8.name: Silent Watcher (Galt)

t4L3d69bDFFx76IW.description:
After suffering terribly for not being tightlipped enough as a child, such as when you accidentally exposed your family to enemy inquisitors, you developed a habit of being overly cautious with your words.

Effects: You take a –2 penalty on Diplomacy checks and must speak slowly due to the concentration required. Unless stated otherwise, you are assumed to not be speaking at a volume above a whisper.
t4L3d69bDFFx76IW.name: Anxious

t79M5Jk8Gk5LGEzb.description:
Growing up with no one to rely on but yourself, you learned to keep a realistic view of your situation and avoid falling into the trap of cynicism with a healthy dose of wit.

Benefits: As a standard action, you can joke about a troublesome situation to lighten the load of dealing with it for yourself and others. You and all allies within 30 feet who can hear you gain a +2 morale bonus on saving throws against fear and pain effects for 1d4 rounds. A character cannot benefit from this effect more than once in 24 hours.

Suggested Characters

Galtans, Rahadoumi, Ustalavs.
t79M5Jk8Gk5LGEzb.name: Grim Optimism

t9BjJ7foMQK7nmv8.description:
Your celestial ancestor was a lantern archon for centuries before ascending to a higher rank.

Requirements: Lawbringer Aasimar Heritage

Benefits: You feel a strange sense of nostalgia whenever you use your continual flame spell-like ability, and can use it as a move action instead of a standard action.
t9BjJ7foMQK7nmv8.name: Lantern Spirit (Aasimar; Lawbringers)

contextNotes.text: -[[2]] Penalty when rolling initiative as part of a surprise round
+[[2]] Luck bonus to AC during all surprise rounds

t9hy0grYA8rYe2MO.description:
With his head in the clouds, the Stargazer sees far-off events, but misses the pitfalls directly before him.

Requirements: 31 Lamashan - 20 Neth

Benefits: When rolling initiative as part of a surprise round, you take a –2 penalty on initiative checks, but you gain a +2 luck bonus to AC during all surprise rounds.
t9hy0grYA8rYe2MO.name: The Star Gazer

tAf7ITsOT477BwUx.description:
You can modify old clothing to make it effective in new circumstances.

Benefits: With a basic sewing kit or disguise kit, you can make a Disguise check to change one outfit into another outfit (see page 159 of the Pathfinder RPG Core Rulebook, or page 13 of this book). The DC of this check is equal to 10 + the gp difference between costs of the outfits. The alteration takes 10 minutes per 1-gp difference in the cost of the outfits.
tAf7ITsOT477BwUx.name: Thrown-Together Fashion

tC1jgXompHf2x9MF.description:
You have studied the history of ancient Osirion, and may have even ventured inside one of the great pyramids.

Requirements: Osirion

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (engineering) and Knowledge (history) checks, and one of them is always a class skill for you. In addition, you may choose Ancient Osiriani as one of your bonus languages.
tC1jgXompHf2x9MF.name: Osirionologist (Osirion)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to influence hostile or unfriendly creatures and, if you fail such an attempt, you may retry once.

tFdOy1B5QDTgUJua.description:
You know that all things pass in time, and are used to having to repeat arguments multiple times to convince even the most stubborn believer.

Requirements: Erastil

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks to influence hostile or unfriendly creatures and, if you fail such an attempt, you may retry once.
tFdOy1B5QDTgUJua.name: Patient Optimist (Erastil)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus when in a forest.
Once per day, when in a forest, you can designate yourself or an ally to roll twice for initiative and take either result. ([[@resources.fangwoodInsurgentNirmathas.value]] remaining uses)

tJKiz80YYgojxJOS.description:
You have spent many years living under the canopy of the Southern Fangwood, during which you and your comrades clashed regularly with the soldiers of imperialist Molthune. After years of guerrilla warfare, you’ve learned to interpret the sounds of the forest to detect signs of enemies.

Requirements: Nirmathas

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on initiative checks when in a forest. Once per day when in a forest, you can designate yourself or an ally to roll twice for initiative and take either result.
tJKiz80YYgojxJOS.name: Fangwood Insurgent (Nirmathas)

contextNotes.text: You can train mindless vermin as if they were animals with an Intelligence score of 1.

tJqP5OTFR0hcIgF3.description:
Requirements: Duergar

Benefits: You were instructed in the subtle magic of enslaving vermin, and can train mindless vermin with the Handle Animal skill as if they were animals with an Intelligence score of 1.
tJqP5OTFR0hcIgF3.name: Vermin Driver (Duergar)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] when using an appropriate alchemical item solely to enhance the performance.

tKrx8VnGk4xg6o5p.description:
You have put in many hours practicing with flashy alchemical items that enhance your Perform skill.

Benefits: When you use an attention-getting alchemical item such as a flask of alchemist’s fire, smokestick, thunderstone, or another appropriate alchemical item (GM’s discretion) as part of a performance, you gain a +2 trait bonus on your Perform check for the duration of that performance. The item is expended without its normal effects and only serves to make your performance more impressive; for example, you could pretend to ignite yourself with alchemist’s fire as part of a Perform (comedy) check or make a dramatic appearance with a smokestick as part of a Perform (act) check, but you would not actually take fire damage or gain concealment from smoke.
tKrx8VnGk4xg6o5p.name: Stage Magic

tL954MZqLT9104WR.description:
After years of soulnumbing obedience to the schedules of others, you find synchronizing your actions with an ally second nature.

Requirements: Oregent in Andoran

Benefits: Once per day when you take a readied action in combat, you gain a +3 trait bonus on the d20 roll for that action if it was triggered by an ally’s action.
tL954MZqLT9104WR.name: Oregent Timing (Andoran; Oregent)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus made during the surprise round of combat.

tLU7ok13nN3iJFwc.description:
Your reactions to combat beginning aren’t what people expect.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attack rolls made during the surprise round of combat.
tLU7ok13nN3iJFwc.name: Unpredictable Reactions

contextNotes.text:
+[[2]] Trait bonus to confirm critical hits against a creature that has a template affiliated with some kind of communicable condition,
 such as a blighted fey or a fungal creature

tMck0Jg2uf4dbutB.description:
You are trained in the destruction of blights.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus to confirm critical hits against a creature that has a template affiliated with some kind of communicable condition, such as a blighted fey or a fungal creature.
tMck0Jg2uf4dbutB.name: Blight’s Bane

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to identify vermin.
+[[2]] Trait bonus against vermin’s extraordinary abilities.

tO2WFSgggZiIaMPV.description:
In gathering ingredients necessary for mind-altering drugs and other concoctions, you have become intimately familiar with the desert’s many-legged pests.

Requirements: Gnome

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge (dungeoneering) checks to identify vermin and on saving throws against vermin’s extraordinary abilities.
tO2WFSgggZiIaMPV.name: Vermin Wrangler (Gnome)

contextNotes.text:
You can swim through a deep bog at up to half your speed as a move action, instead of the normal quarter speed. 

Failing a swim check while in a deep bog doesn’t cause you to go underwater, even if you fail by 5 or more, though such a failure still results in a lack of progress.

tT0hVQDqriCIrMqH.description:
You were raised in the sludgy swamps, and are used to moving through boggy terrain.

Requirements: Kobold

Benefits: You can swim through a deep bog at up to half your speed as a move action, instead of the normal quarter speed.

Failing a swim check while in a deep bog doesn’t cause you to go underwater, even if you fail by 5 or more, though such a failure still results in a lack of progress.
tT0hVQDqriCIrMqH.name: Bog Scamp (Kobold)

tWMyVsF3mgInbYH9.description:
Requirements: Keleshite Human Heritage

Benefits: The blood of the early horse tribes is strong in your family. Breeding, riding, selecting, and training the best horses are all part of your legacy, and you know how to pick out the best of the lot when selecting a suitable mount. If you gain a horse as an animal companion or mount as one of your class abilities, its base speed increases by 5 feet and it gains a bonus trick that does not count against the normal limit of tricks known by the animal.
tWMyVsF3mgInbYH9.name: Thoroughbred (Human; Keleshite)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus while touching the ground or unworked stone.

tY8jV7WQLJD8ZSzR.description:
You are able to tap into the living energy of the world to shatter lesser magic.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on caster level checks while touching the ground or unworked stone. This includes dispel checks and checks to overcome spell resistance.
tY8jV7WQLJD8ZSzR.name: Strength of the Land (Dwarf)

tcVTjbd9IzRKoB8c.description:
You have moved contraband relics from Osirion's elder days for years, and have learned some tricks.

Requirements: Osirion

Benefits: Choose one of the following skills: Appraise, Bluff, or Sleight of Hand. You gain a +1 trait bonus on that skill, and it is always a class skill for you.
tcVTjbd9IzRKoB8c.name: Antiquities Smuggler (Osirion)

tdU3HzCZBz3Bx48D.description:
Since birth you have had an intimate connection with a certain number.

Requirements: Ru-Shi Dhampir Heritage

Benefits: When you select this trait, roll 3d6. The resulting number becomes your numerological totem and can never be changed. Once per day, when you roll your totem number on a d20 (such as an attack roll, save, or skill check), you may treat that roll as if you had rolled a natural 20 on the die.
tdU3HzCZBz3Bx48D.name: Numerological Gift (Dhampir; Ru-Shi)

te9KbWNyrDevBZRl.description:
You believe you are destined for an afterlife of service as part of King Huang's terra-cotta army, so you do not fear death as others do.

Requirements: Lingshen

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Fortitude saves.
te9KbWNyrDevBZRl.name: Heart of Clay (Lingshen)

thzH17AC7fScEvE9.description:
You know how to avoid a blow while still maintaining your offensive posture.

Benefits: When you use Combat Expertise, reduce the number you subtract from your melee attack rolls by 1.
thzH17AC7fScEvE9.name: Threatening Defender

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to confirm critical hits against creatures of the animal, magical beast, and vermin types.
+[[1]] Morale bonus while wearing a trophy from an animal, magical beast, or vermin whose CR was higher than your current class level.

tpke6Xv57Ml6YPpL.description:
You are part of Nirmathas’s informal network of hunters and scouts known as the Foxclaws, and study the secret vulnerabilities of those dangerous beasts that prey upon your fellow settlers.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus to confirm critical hits against creatures of the animal, magical beast, and vermin types, and while wearing a trophy from an animal, magical beast, or vermin whose CR was higher than your current class level, you gain a +1 morale bonus on Will saves.
tpke6Xv57Ml6YPpL.name: Foxclaw Scout (Ironfang Invasion)

contextNotes.text: Take -[[2]] penalty instead of -[[4]] when using a melee weapon that deals lethal damage to instead deal nonlethal damage.

tzVonlQEPJ3BUl0W.description:
Even though you are a trained combatant, proficient with any number of weapons, you don’t relish killing your enemies. It’s not that you’re afraid of seeing blood, but rather that disabling a foe is superior to killing someone capable of admitting defeat.

Benefits: When using a melee weapon that deals lethal damage to instead deal nonlethal damage, you take only a –2 penalty instead of –4.
tzVonlQEPJ3BUl0W.name: Weapon of Peace

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus regarding other planets.
+[[1]] Trait bonus regarding other planets.
+[[1]] Trait bonus regarding other planets.

u0MCiWbAWOoxiO7J.description:
You take every opportunity to learn about or visit far-off planets.

Requirements: Elf

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (geography), Knowledge (local), and Knowledge (nature) checks regarding other planets.
u0MCiWbAWOoxiO7J.name: Planetary Traveler (Elf)

u3L1ADAdBmSVVR49.description:
You are touched by the supernatural essence of nature, marking you since birth as something other than purely mortal.

Benefits: Choose a single 0-level druid spell. You can cast this spell once per day as a spell-like ability with a caster level equal to your character level.
u3L1ADAdBmSVVR49.name: Green-Blooded

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against humanoids from beyond Golarion, including androids, kasathas, Triaxians, and Vercites, among others.

u42WuPEkjlTeyN2d.description:
You were attacked by Vercite space pirates in your youth, inspiring you to find ways to deal with the alien interlopers should they return.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attack rolls against humanoids from beyond Golarion, including androids, kasathas, Triaxians, and Vercites, among others.
u42WuPEkjlTeyN2d.name: Scarred by Space Pirates

u78xhK79nXmr9FKK.description:
You were once delighted to discover an object that could be the crown jewel of your collection, only to be thwarted by its weight. Thereafter, you trained yourself to pack items in the most efficient ways possible.

Requirements: Gnome

Benefits: Treat your Strength score as 2 points higher when calculating your carrying capacity.
u78xhK79nXmr9FKK.name: Efficient Packer (Gnome)

contextNotes.text: –[[1]] Penalty on Will saves and a –[[2]] Penalty on saves against fear effects whenever the object of your attachment is either threatened, in danger, or in someone else’s possession

u9yI8vdwJEbgqovd.description:
You have a strong emotional attachment to a person or object that you’re terrified of losing.

Effects: The GM chooses the object of your attachment. Whenever the object of your attachment is either threatened, in danger, or in someone else’s possession, you take a –1 penalty on Will saves and a –2 penalty on saves against fear effects. If the person or object to which you’re attached is ever lost, killed, or destroyed, exchange this drawback for the Doubt drawback.
u9yI8vdwJEbgqovd.name: Attached

contextNotes.text: Creatures searching you for objects hidden on your body don’t gain the usual +4 bonus on their Perception checks.

u9yVXpe9U8Ysxaiv.description:
You’re going to win the Golden Goblin ’s upcoming “Cheat the Devil and Take His Gold” tournament one way or the other.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Profession (gambling) checks, and creatures searching you for objects hidden on your body don’t gain the usual +4 bonus on their Perception checks. Additionally, you begin play with a “fixed” six-sided die (it has two “6s” and no “1”) and a dagger.
u9yVXpe9U8Ysxaiv.name: Fixer of Odds (Second Darkness)

uAHuvl1KiZzcohQ7.description:
Growing up along the border between Belkzen and Lastwall has taught you how to storm enemy battle lines and quickly overwhelm them.

Requirements: Belkzen

Benefits: When charging, add 10 feet to your base speed.
uAHuvl1KiZzcohQ7.name: Linebreaker (Belkzen)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus on damage rolls for attacks of opportunity.

uC8j5uveUkL8EiBj.description:
Those who open themselves to your attacks feel your wrath.

Requirements: Lamashtu

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on damage rolls against those you hit with attacks of opportunity.
uC8j5uveUkL8EiBj.name: Opportune Slayer (Lamashtu)

contextNotes.text:
+[[2]] Trait bonus 
on opposed checks.

uDkhG1YxzYMENKuP.description:
You are in some way tied to the mysterious alien monument known as Silver Mount in Numeria , but you have forgotten an important piece of your past. Perhaps you were a metallurgist’s experiment gone awry, a rediscovered automaton that escaped the mountain’s confines, or the result of some equally enigmatic phenomenon. Regardless, your unusual origins mark you as somehow different from others, and you know the gaps in your memory hold the key to your past.

Requirements: Silver Mount

Benefits: You start play with a unique compass that doesn’t point north and is riddled with indecipherable alien markings—the only object you have that you know to be tied to your home. In addition, your inscrutable mannerisms give you a +2 trait bonus on opposed Bluff checks.

Suggestions

Consider being a member of the android race from Pathfinder Campaign Setting: Inner Sea Bestiary.
uDkhG1YxzYMENKuP.name: Alien Origins (Silver Mount)

contextNotes.text: Any transmutation spell you cast upon yourself has its duration increased by 2 rounds.

uERIcyepTlmmvXTB.description:
You’ve discovered the secret of stable transmutations.

Benefits: Any transmutation spell you cast upon yourself has its duration increased by 2 rounds. Transmutation spells with an instantaneous duration are not affected by this trait.
uERIcyepTlmmvXTB.name: Tenacious Shifting

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on opposed checks against the Bluff and Disguise skills.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on opposed checks against the Bluff and Disguise skills.
+[[1]] Trait bonus against illusion effects.

uHhL9V8GNofWBUDP.description:
You see through deception and lies.

Requirements: Dwarf

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on opposed checks against the Bluff and Disguise skills, and a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against illusion effects.
uHhL9V8GNofWBUDP.name: Clearheaded (Dwarf)

uKcGyEuuKCwnXUoA.description:
You possess strong ties to Minkai, and spread flattering words regarding your empire.

Requirements: Minkai

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks, and Bluff becomes a class skill for you.
uKcGyEuuKCwnXUoA.name: Minkai Advocate (Minkai)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on checks associated with any creature who shares your type and at least one of your subtypes.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks associated with any creature who shares your type and at least one of your subtypes.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks associated with any creature who shares your type and at least one of your subtypes.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks associated with any creature who shares your type and at least one of your subtypes.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks associated with any creature who shares your type and at least one of your subtypes.

uL1GXmNtwAumM7mW.description:
Through your detailed study of your own lineage, you can better understand and honor even your most distant relatives.

Requirements: Myr

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy, Knowledge (history), Knowledge (local), Knowledge (nobility), and Sense Motive checks associated with any creature who shares your type and at least one of your subtypes. One of these skills becomes a class skill.
uL1GXmNtwAumM7mW.name: Shared Ancestors (Myr)

uM2ZQj1uiE99c8nL.description:
You are an elite soldier in one of Lingshen's numerous armies, and your discipline has made you a truly deadly foe.

Requirements: Lingshen

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all rolls to confirm critical hits.
uM2ZQj1uiE99c8nL.name: Lingshen's Finest (Lingshen)

contextNotes.text: When attempting a check to gather information using <Chosen Language>, you can do so in 1d6 × 10 minutes, rather than the normal 1d4 hours.

uMUqtFon5tVOxdwv.description:
You grew up speaking multiple languages.

Requirements: Any City

Benefits: You learn one additional language. Additionally, when attempting a Diplomacy check to gather information using this language, you can do so in 1d6 × 10 minutes, rather than the normal 1d4 hours.
uMUqtFon5tVOxdwv.name: Cultivated (Any City)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on opposed Dexterity-based skill checks against outsiders with the evil subtype.
When your initiative is tied with outsiders with the evil subtype, you always act first.

uMcLKfpHDn3jAVCN.description:
You can read subtle clues in the body language of fiends, allowing you to react just a bit faster than normal when dealing with such beings.

Requirements: Tiefling

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on opposed Dexterity-based skill checks against outsiders with the evil subtype.

In addition, when your initiative is tied with such creatures, you always act first regardless of which of you has a higher initiative modifier.
uMcLKfpHDn3jAVCN.name: Anticipate Evil (Tiefling)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against the extraordinary abilities of plants.
+[[1]] Trait bonus to locate or identify plants.

uPUe3jS4sGd5GiLO.description:
You are familiar with beneficial and dangerous plants.

Requirements: Elf

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nature) checks to locate or identify plants and on saving throws against the extraordinary abilities of plants.
uPUe3jS4sGd5GiLO.name: Tropical Botanist (Elf)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on weapon damage rolls against giants, goblins, and orcs.

uRJWDJEEOzyEXOvs.description:
Desperate battles have honed your fighting skills against the ancient enemies of the dwarves.

Requirements: Mindspin Mountains

Benefits: You receive a +1 trait bonus on weapon damage rolls against giants, goblins, and orcs.
uRJWDJEEOzyEXOvs.name: Blooded (Mindspin Mountains)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus on checks that pertain to your own religion or spiritual practice.
+[[2]] Trait bonus against spells cast by others who worship your god or adhere to your philosophy.

uRbMwQRG7ElI5NfX.description:
You have spent many years studying the tenets of your faith, and now believe that the dominant factions within the church have deviated from its true meaning and purpose. Rather than breaking with your misguided church, you’ve decided to stand up and fight to reform the organization you love. You have fervently studied scripture and steeled your will to combat the divergent beliefs of your peers

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge (religion) checks that pertain to your own religion or spiritual practice, and you gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against spells cast by others who worship your god or adhere to your philosophy.
uRbMwQRG7ElI5NfX.name: Religious Reformer

contextNotes.text: Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.

uSgzV5jZUwTKCY7s.description:
You were exposed to vision-granting caustic vapors by the oracles of the Brimstone Haruspex, whether because you had a pressing question or because a parent or chieftain considered you an expendable proxy.

Requirements: Orc

Benefits: The vapors left scars that impose a –1 penalty on Charisma-based checks but, once per day, you gain a flash of insight that allows you to roll twice on a Knowledge skill check or Intelligence check and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
uSgzV5jZUwTKCY7s.name: Brimstone Seer (Orc)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to identify divs.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on weapon damage rolls against divs.

uTtpBAmyHoN5FpPl.description:
Divs have tormented you and your loved ones for as long as you can remember. You’ve improved your skills to better oppose the creatures.

Requirements: Thuvia

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge checks to identify divs (and their special powers and weaknesses) and a +1 trait bonus on weapon damage rolls against divs.
uTtpBAmyHoN5FpPl.name: Div Hunter (Thuvia)

contextNotes.text: For you, checks only start increasing in difficulty at a range of 20 feet or farther, as opposed to the normal 10. This has no effect on checks made to perceive things within 10 feet.

uaxknDLDC20sWuib.description:
You’ve come (or been sent) to Riddleport to observe the strange Blot that has appeared in the city’s sky. You’ve decided to put your keen senses to the test at the Golden Goblin’s upcoming gambling competition while you’re here. Your sharp eyesight makes it easier for you to notice things at a distance.

Benefits: For you, Perception checks only start increasing in difficulty at a range of 20 feet or farther, as opposed to the normal 10. This has no effect on checks made to perceive things within 10 feet.
uaxknDLDC20sWuib.name: Portentous Perception (Second Darkness)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to identify outsiders with the water subtype.
+[[1]] to caster level when casting conjuration (summoning) spells to summon outsiders with the water subtype.

uewJpjE8NNzIDJ0u.description:
our long years of studious research into the drifting trade city of Vialesk, a neutral ground for planar travelers on the Elemental Plane of Water, has made you an expert on all manner of aquatic creatures.

Requirements: Plane of Water

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge (planes) checks to identify outsiders with the water subtype. In addition, you treat your caster level as 1 higher when casting conjuration (summoning) spells to summon outsiders with the water subtype.
uewJpjE8NNzIDJ0u.name: Vialesk Historian (Plane of Water)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on checks regarding the jungle.

ugMDDJ8KxUAwRb2t.description:
You boarded the Jenivere in the Mwangi Expanse, where you've lived or recently traveled through. You harbor no illusions regarding the deadliness of the jungles, the creatures that inhabit it, or the peoples that make their home therein.

Benefits: You gain Polyglot as a bonus language and receive a +1 trait bonus on all Knowledge (nature) checks regarding the jungle.
ugMDDJ8KxUAwRb2t.name: Boarded in the Mwangi Expanse (Serpent's Skull)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against native outsiders.
+[[2]] Trait bonus against native outsiders.

ugYSLIo9MMIeCbUi.description:
You have traversed the Forest of Spirits numerous times, and have learned how best to communicate with its otherworldly inhabitants.

Requirements: Forest of Spirits

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy and Intimidate checks made against outsiders that have the native subtype.
ugYSLIo9MMIeCbUi.name: Kami Talker (Forest of Spirits)

uhahix6rvZjyKQrD.description:
You worked in Goka's Undermarket for a time, and have learned how to dodge the city's tax collectors and the port inspectors.

Requirements: Goka

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff and Sleight of Hand checks.
uhahix6rvZjyKQrD.name: Undermarket Smuggler (Goka)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus when prone in desert terrain.
You take only a -[[2]] penalty on attack rolls (rather than -4) when attacking from prone.

ui7qDavOhuXFM9to.description:
You are skilled at blending in with the desert terrain and attacking creatures as they pass by.

Requirements: Oread

Benefits: When prone in desert terrain, you gain a +2 trait bonus on Stealth checks and take only a –2 penalty on attack rolls (rather than –4) when attacking from prone.
ui7qDavOhuXFM9to.name: Sandy Ambush (Oread)

ukQyPIHeww9luIKq.description:
Your belief in Irori has honed your ability to recognize when someone lies or dissembles.

Requirements: Irori; Halfling

Benefits: Sense Motive is a class skill for you, and you gain a +1 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks.
ukQyPIHeww9luIKq.name: Sensing Imperfection (Irori; Halfling)

contextNotes.text: -[[1]] penalty on attack rolls instead of the normal -2, when wielding a firearm that has, or is treated as if it has, the broken condition.

ul1gUxpyXgk7E9lm.description:
Broken firearms are not problems—they are challenges.

Benefits: Your first attempt to remove the broken condition from your starting firearm and to upgrade it to a masterwork weapon costs 150 gp instead of 300 gp.

In addition, when wielding a firearm that has the broken condition or is treated as if it had the broken condition, you take a –1 penalty on attack rolls made with it instead of the normal –2.
ul1gUxpyXgk7E9lm.name: Just Like New

contextNotes.text: +[[5]] Trait bonus to determine whether a creature is acting under the effects of a charm or compulsion.

umoAWIET2e38UPjt.description:
Your heritage gives you an understanding of the powers of domination.

Requirements: Ancient-Born Dhampir Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +5 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks made to determine whether a creature is acting under the effects of a charm or compulsion.
umoAWIET2e38UPjt.name: Thrall Spotter (Dhampir; Ancient-Born)

contextNotes.text: When you are the target of an attack by an opponent that is flanking you, as an immediate action once per day you can foil that opponent’s attack. For that attack, the opponent does not gain any of the bonuses or effects that are associated with flanking.

unMsCo1sskiz9Tuv.description:
Requirements: Milani

Benefits
When you are the target of an attack by an opponent that is flanking you, as an immediate action once per day you can foil that opponent’s attack. For that attack, the opponent does not gain any of the bonuses or effects that are associated with flanking.
unMsCo1sskiz9Tuv.name: Split-Second Defense (Milani)

unv2smjzMnDXHpcr.description:
You were forced into hiding or willingly went on the run at a young age, and learned to reading others’ interests to inform your lies.

Requirements: Any City

Benefits: You can use your Intelligence or Wisdom modifier in place of your Charisma modifier on Bluff checks.
unv2smjzMnDXHpcr.name: Cunning Liar (Any City)

contextNotes.text: You may use Knowledge (nobility) or Knowledge (religion) in place of Knowledge (planes) to identify outsiders.
You may use Knowledge (nobility) or Knowledge (religion) in place of Knowledge (planes) to identify outsiders.
You may use Knowledge (nobility) or Knowledge (religion) in place of Knowledge (planes) to identify outsiders.
Non-evil outsiders you encounter begin with an attitude that is one step better than normal.

uqlCp3osskRIzylH.description:
When you were young, your parents presented you to the oracles of Po Li, claiming a divine sign showed you were the reincarnation of Lung Wa’s Eternal Emperor. The oracles did not support the claim, but you are not untouched by celestial influence.

Benefits: You may use Knowledge (nobility) or Knowledge (religion) in place of Knowledge (planes) to identify outsiders, and nonevil outsiders you encounter begin with an attitude that is one step better than normal.
uqlCp3osskRIzylH.name: Rejected Emperor

contextNotes.text: You take no penalty when using improvised tools. At the GM’s discretion, you can attempt certain Craft checks even when no tools are available, though you take a –2 penalty.

urRn3p01CDFswdIW.description:
You know how to work with your hands and aren’t dependent on complex tools.

Benefits: When attempting Craft checks, you take no penalty when using improvised tools. At the GM’s discretion, you can attempt certain Craft checks even when no tools are available, though you take a –2 penalty.
urRn3p01CDFswdIW.name: Self-Reliant

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on attack rolls against arcane spellcasters.

usdCAlZtvR2pEcvm.description:
You see arcane magic as untrustworthy and its use as a calamity waiting to happen.

Requirements: Dwarf

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attack rolls against arcane spellcasters.
usdCAlZtvR2pEcvm.name: Spellcaster's Anathema (Dwarf)

uuC76sH2BLdP32hu.description:
As a youth, you were involved with the avant garde theater scene of Oppara. Your performance skills have been known to bring even the toughest crowd to their feet.

Requirements: Taldor Faction

Benefits: Choose one type of Perform skill. You gain a +1 trait bonus on Perform checks of the chosen type and this skill becomes a class skill for you.
uuC76sH2BLdP32hu.name: Performance Artist (Taldor Faction)

contextNotes.text: +[[3]] Trait bonus to influence anyone with at least one level of Aristocrat.

uw4qCo0nCBJIBEzX.description:
Your training as a maid or valet has left you with unconscious mannerisms that seem to put members of the upper class at ease.

Requirements: Halfling

Benefits: You gain a +3 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks made to influence anyone with at least one level of Aristocrat.
uw4qCo0nCBJIBEzX.name: Perfect Servant (Halfling)

uzuSS0DupPafO99Y.description:
You believe that someone or something is always out to get you, so you have a hard time truly trusting anyone.

Effects: Anyone who attempts an aid another action of any type to assist you must succeed at a DC 15 check instead of the normal DC 10 check.
uzuSS0DupPafO99Y.name: Paranoid

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against fear and compulsion effects, when serving a leader you think is legitimate.

v5PRR6jG0HOfx0P7.description:
You spent much of your youth helping the clergy of your chosen faith perform their duties, and learned from them respect for authority.

Benefits: As long as you are acting in the service of a liege or leader you recognize as legitimate, you gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against fear and compulsion effects.

Suggested Characters

Abadarans, Hellknights, Hermeans.
v5PRR6jG0HOfx0P7.name: Authoritarian

v78e3hJ9Z9P3njB8.description:
Often forced to go without food or stimulation for days at a time, you have learned to use prolonged sleep as a means of escape and a way to heal your wounds.

Benefits: You heal temporary ability damage at a rate of 3 points per day of complete bed rest. A normal night of rest (8 hours) still heals you at a rate of only 1 point of temporary ability damage per night of rest.
v78e3hJ9Z9P3njB8.name: Rest for the Wicked

vDAYTCQP5hf3NTPY.description:
Mercenary League

The bodyguards to Druma’s ruling Kalistocrats, Mercenary League members are more commonly called Blackjackets for the armored coats that are part of their uniforms.

Benefits: You can treat an armored coat as light armor. This choice must be made when you don the armor, and can’t be changed until you remove and redon the armor.

You must still be proficient in wearing medium armor to avoid adding the armor’s check penalty on all attack rolls and skill checks that involve moving.
vDAYTCQP5hf3NTPY.name: Jacket Training

contextNotes.text: When you take 20 to treat deadly wounds, you restore an additional [[1d4]] hit points to those you aid.

vDkADrnxhynaYxnH.description:
Raised in the company of skilled healers, you were always encouraged to devote your time and energy to the welfare of others.

Benefits: Whenever you take 20 on a Heal check to treat deadly wounds, you restore an additional 1d4 hit points to those you aid.

Suggested Characters

Battle clerics, Iomedaeans, Kellids.
vDkADrnxhynaYxnH.name: Devoted Healer

contextNotes.text: +[[4]] Trait bonus when casting spells with the darkness, pain, or shadow descriptors.

vI2os9Zx4DgR3KJT.description:
Requirements: Zon-Kuthon

Benefits: You gain a +4 trait bonus on Concentration checks when casting spells with the darkness, pain, or shadow descriptors.
vI2os9Zx4DgR3KJT.name: Kuthite Caster (Zon-Kuthon)

contextNotes.text: The penalty on attack rolls for using inappropriately large-sized weapons is reduced by half. (see page 140 of core rulebook)
+[[2]] Trait bonus to your CMD against awesome blow combat maneuvers. If you’re a dwarf, your stability racial trait applies to awesome blow combat maneuvers as well.

vLd9mNn5wsJBvkgq.description:
Your family has always been dogged by rumors that a bit of giant blood got into the family’s veins at some point. Whether this was through alchemical or magical experimentation, or because your great-great-grandfather married a giant, it has made you big for your race, and may have given you other minor cosmetic features of giants, such as flaming red hair, a bluish tinge to your skin, or oversized hands.

Benefits: When you wield a weapon that is larger than your size, the penalty on attack rolls for using inappropriately sized weapons is reduced by half. In addition, you gain a +2 trait bonus to your CMD against awesome blow combat maneuvers. If you’re a dwarf, your stability racial trait applies to awesome blow combat maneuvers as well.
vLd9mNn5wsJBvkgq.name: Giant-Blooded (Giantslayer)

contextNotes.text: When escaping restraints (but not grapples) you may make a Sleight of Hand check instead of Escape Artist check. if you succeed, you gain +[[2]] to Bluff to pretend to still be bound
When escaping restraints (but not grapples) you may make a Sleight of Hand check instead of Escape Artist check. if you succeed, you gain +[[2]] to Bluff to pretend to still be bound
When escaping restraints (but not grapples) you may make a Sleight of Hand check instead of Escape Artist check. if you succeed, you gain +[[2]] to Bluff to pretend to still be bound

vMphD6zY7wsMKzpg.description:
You are adept at escaping from confinement in an unobtrusive manner.

Benefits: When trying to escape manacles, rope, or other similar restraints (but not grapples or similar attacks), you may make a Sleight of Hand check instead of your Escape Artist modifier. If you free yourself, you gain a +2 trait bonus on Bluff checks to pretend that you are still bound.
vMphD6zY7wsMKzpg.name: Stealthy Escape

vN3YJFsMD6ugNLuy.description:
As you were born in Dtang Ma and possess one of the favored bloodlines, your sorcerous powers are particularly potent.

Requirements: Dtang Ma

Benefits: Select one of the following sorcerer bloodlines: fey, maestro, starsoul, or stormborn. Once per day, you may use one of your bloodline powers as if your sorcerer level were 1 higher than normal. This trait does not give you access to bloodline powers whose level requirements you do not yet meet.
vN3YJFsMD6ugNLuy.name: Dtang Ma Bloodline (Dtang Ma)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against confusion, insanity, and fear effects.

vPIo7Y3RDKmVzQ0E.description:
You have goddess-granted madness.

Requirements: Lamashtu

Benefits: This madness gives you a +2 trait bonus on saves against confusion, insanity, and fear effects.
vPIo7Y3RDKmVzQ0E.name: Unhinged Mentality (Lamashtu)

contextNotes.text: Once per day, when you ready an action to make a ranged or melee weapon attack, you can add a +[[4]] Trait bonus on the attack.

vS8ETig2gmH8N0sq.description:
You had to learn to control your attention to survive in the wilds.

Requirements: Kellid Human Heritage

Benefits: Once per day, when you ready an action to make a ranged or melee weapon attack, you can add a +4 trait bonus on the attack.
vS8ETig2gmH8N0sq.name: Weathered Patience (Human; Kellid)

vSu5qB6TTcJiGeOS.description:
Shame and horror fill your subconscious, and you never stop looking for ways to grant yourself the peace of the grave.

Requirements: Tiefling

Benefits: Once per day, as an immediate action, you can make yourself the target of any attack originally directed against a creature occupying an adjacent square.
vSu5qB6TTcJiGeOS.name: Suicidal (Tiefling)

vSxbq1ezwpv5moGg.description:
You were born with a blessing of the Dawnflower.

Requirements: Sarenrae

Benefits: Once per day, you can use light as a spell-like ability. Your caster level is equal to your character level.
vSxbq1ezwpv5moGg.name: Light-Bringer (Sarenrae)

contextNotes.text: Once per day, you can add your Wisdom modifier ([@abilities.wis.mod]) to an initiative check.

vSyjO3K00IinuElv.description:
Your years of meditation and mindfulness allow you to act correctly on a moment’s notice.

Benefits: Once per day, you can add your Wisdom modifier to an initiative check.
vSyjO3K00IinuElv.name: Heedful Readiness

vTHcp7L9Qd3qgKeP.description:
Because of special training, your unique body chemistry, or the uncovering of an alchemical secret, your mutagens last longer.

Benefits: The bonuses and penalties granted by your mutagens last for 1 additional minute per alchemist level.
vTHcp7L9Qd3qgKeP.name: Enduring Mutagen

contextNotes.text: Your [trait] bonus on checks increases by 1 in underground or mountain environments.

vTqnBVOkGvSYagq7.description:
Feeling harried by flighty non-oreads, you chose to embrace the life of a hermit with few contacts beyond your rocky home.

Requirements: Oread

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Heal and Survival checks. Your bonus on Survival checks increases by 1 in underground or mountain environments.
vTqnBVOkGvSYagq7.name: Loner of the Rocks (Oread)

contextNotes.text:
+[[2]] Trait bonus 
to convince others that their allies have wronged them .
+[[2]] Trait bonus to persuade others to betray their allies’ trust.

vU4U6i6nFbRPJmGf.description:
You witnessed or were part of a feud that turned close friends into hateful enemies.

Requirements: Hobgoblin

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Bluff checks to convince others that their allies have wronged them and on Diplomacy checks to persuade others to betray their allies’ trust.
vU4U6i6nFbRPJmGf.name: Inciter (Hobgoblin)

contextNotes.text: When using a longbow, if only a single creature is providing soft cover to your target, your target does not receive the +4 bonus to AC.

vYjuAECxx381Ryz7.description:
Requirements: Erastil

Benefits: When you are using a longbow, if only a single creature is providing soft cover to your target, your target does not receive the +4 bonus to AC.
vYjuAECxx381Ryz7.name: Deadeye Bowman (Erastil)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against diseases and poisons.
+[[1]] Trait bonus in jungle terrain.

vZKFL8BM3kID6Qtd.description:
Your people have called the jungles home for generations, and they are extremely proficient in moving about in that terrain.

Requirements: Grippli native to the Mwangi Expanse

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against diseases and poisons, a +1 trait bonus on initiative checks attempted in jungle terrain, and Survival is a class skill for you.
vZKFL8BM3kID6Qtd.name: Jungle Native (Mwangi Expanse; Grippli)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against charm and compulsion effects

vZM5tf9Nbe7LA3Ev.description:
Some disagree with your choice to wield a firearm, and their scorn has only hardened your resolve in battle.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all saving throws against charm and compulsion effects. Also, once per day when you succeed at a saving throw against such an effect, you regain 1 grit point.
vZM5tf9Nbe7LA3Ev.name: Resolve of the Rejected

vZafrMKzif1TvYeI.description:
You have studied with the feared shadowcasters of Nidal.

Requirements: Nidal

Benefits: Choose one spell with the shadow descriptor - from this point on, whenever you cast this spell, its effect manifest at +1 caster level.
vZafrMKzif1TvYeI.name: Nidalese Shadowcaster (Nidal)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against divine spells.

vbJuktoIOOCGMgd6.description:
Your contempt for the gods and their sad little priests makes it easier to shake off the effects of their prayers.

Requirements: Foulspawn Tiefling Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against divine spells.
vbJuktoIOOCGMgd6.name: God Scorn (Tiefling; Foulspawn)

vcYVP78WA0HORFpF.description:
You were one of the mithral miners of Jinin, and learned how to extract the delicate ore as well as determine its value.

Requirements: Jinin

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Appraise checks, and a +1 trait bonus on Profession (miner) checks. In addition, Profession (miner) becomes a class skill for you.
vcYVP78WA0HORFpF.name: Conscientious Miner (Jinin)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against mind-affecting effects for 1 hour whenever you imbibe any alcoholic beverage.

vcnecnJ3ATYzXh1q.description:
Cayden Cailean's holy brews invigorate your mind, making you less susceptible to mental attacks.

Requirements: Cayden Cailean

Benefits: Whenever you imbibe any alcoholic beverage, you gain a +2 trait bonus on saves against mind-affecting effects for 1 hour.
vcnecnJ3ATYzXh1q.name: Fortified Drinker (Cayden Cailean)

vcxXn1UJsH0lmdxx.description:
Since you were young, you've been a member of one River Kingdoms bandit gang or another.

Requirements: River Kingdoms

Benefits: Choose one of the following skills: Escape Artist, Intimidate, or Stealth. You gain a +1 trait bonus on that skill, and it is always a class skill for you.
vcxXn1UJsH0lmdxx.name: Bandit (River Kingdoms)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on attacks of opportunity made with daggers, swords, and similar bladed weapons.

veKL6VfyY6a2hoYE.description:
You trained long hours as a youth with blades, either taking lessons in the genteel art of fencing from tutors paid for by your parents or by being taken under the wing of a disenfranchised fencer who may have turned to a life of crime.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attack of opportunity attack rolls made with daggers, swords, and similar bladed weapons.
veKL6VfyY6a2hoYE.name: Fencer

vg0fuC1HG7PGMwQ1.description:
You are well versed in the local laws, customs, and politics.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nobility) checks and Knowledge (local) checks. Knowledge (local) is always a class skill for you.
vg0fuC1HG7PGMwQ1.name: Civilized

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus on attack rolls made to confirm critical hits with bows.

vgzOHYFqO6WCmq4A.description:
You've inherited some of your celestial ancestor's prowess with the bow.

Requirements: Plumekith Aasimar Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on attack rolls made to confirm critical hits with bows.
vgzOHYFqO6WCmq4A.name: Toxophilite (Aasimar; Plumekith)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on checks related to the Irrisen aristocracy.

viCBlSBIF4VVUGkv.description:
You come from a family that commands respect.

Requirements: Jadwiga Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate checks, and Intimidate is always a class skill for you. In addition, you gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nobility) checks related to the Irrisen aristocracy.
viCBlSBIF4VVUGkv.name: Jadwiga Scion (Human; Jadwiga)

viVmgRVsADeEfvnb.description:
Requirements: Any Elemental Lord

Benefits: Add 1 to the DC of saving throws made to resist the effects of spells cast by you that have either the air, earth, fire, or water descriptor, depending on which elemental lord you worship. You must choose a single elemental lord when you take this trait; once chosen, it cannot be changed.
viVmgRVsADeEfvnb.name: Affinity for the Elements (any Elemental Lord)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against transmutation spells and effects.
Transmutations you willingly accept affect you as though they were cast at 1 caster level higher for the purpose of determining duration.

vidToDgzdQDf9dSc.description:
Your body responds strongly to transmutations because you were exposed to fleshwarping magic.

Requirements: Drow

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against transmutation spells and effects. Transmutations you willingly accept affect you as though they were cast at 1 caster level higher for the purpose of determining duration.
vidToDgzdQDf9dSc.name: Fleshwarp Exposure (Drow)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses. You are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat for all checks.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.

vo9ATig4nAIbteKk.description:
They say the strange technological ruins scattered throughout Numeria came from the skies several thousand years ago. The concept of life on other planets far beyond Golarion has always fascinated you, and you’ve long hoped to learn more about what life on those other planets may have been like. You’ve heard stories about the strange alien creatures found in Numerian dungeons and hope to learn all you can about them—perhaps some of these aliens can be found in the caverns below Torch!

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge checks to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses. In addition, you gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (geography) checks, and this skill is a class skill for you. You are treated as if you possessed the Technologist feat for the purposes of resolving checks to identify an alien creature using a Knowledge skill and for all Knowledge (geography) checks. If you already possess the Technologist feat, then your trait bonus on Knowledge (geography) checks increases to +3.
vo9ATig4nAIbteKk.name: Stargazer (Iron Gods)

voGJA6dnOzOoclSP.description:
You are always on the lookout for reward and danger.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Perception checks, and Perception is always a class skill for you.
voGJA6dnOzOoclSP.name: Seeker

vq0F94J2ViL4M4hJ.description:
During your studies of The Majestic Book of the Prime Ascended, you learned some minor magical tricks.

Benefits: Select a single 0-level spell from the sorcerer/ wizard spell list. You can cast this spell 1 time per day as a spell-like ability.
vq0F94J2ViL4M4hJ.name: Apprentice

vq2aSRrMyluMDGHK.description:
As a native of the North, you have acquired the ability to tread lightly on snow.

Requirements: Gnome

Benefits: You ignore difficult terrain caused by snow, and it costs you only 2 squares of movement to enter a square covered in heavy snow, rather than 4 squares of movement. This benefit only applies when you are not carrying a medium or heavier load.
vq2aSRrMyluMDGHK.name: Snowstepper (Gnome)

contextNotes.text: You reduce your armor check penalty by [[max(1, floor(@attributes.hd.total/3))]].
You reduce your armor check penalty by [[max(1, floor(@attributes.hd.total/3))]].
You reduce your armor check penalty by [[max(1, floor(@attributes.hd.total/3))]].

vu5DPmp9Rhtsv4L7.description:
You have always had a knack for physical activity. You either grew up in a rural area and had an active childhood where you were always climbing trees, swimming in lakes and rivers, and clambering up rocky hillsides, or you competed in and excelled at contests or sports while growing up in a larger settlement. Due to this background, little can slow you down or inhibit your movements. When the Bountiful Venture Company interviewed you, they noticed your stature and physicality, and they chose you for the colonial expedition knowing that a strong back is always helpful in a growing colony.

Benefits: You reduce your armor check penalty by a number equal to one-third your character level (minimum 1) for purposes of Acrobatics, Climb, and Swim checks, and you gain a +1 trait bonus to one of these three skills, chosen when you take this trait.
vu5DPmp9Rhtsv4L7.name: Athletic (Ruins of Azlant)

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus toward outsiders.

vwNrscHqopeUqRKv.description:
Your relationship with your eidolon gives you some clout with other outsiders.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks toward outsiders, and Diplomacy is always a class skill for you.
vwNrscHqopeUqRKv.name: Destined Diplomat

contextNotes.text: Any small object you attempt to hide on your body is treated as an extraordinarily small object. (normally a +4 bonus). .

vxOZxaRgqWOTILhM.description:
You have a knack for hiding goods on your person.

Requirements: Ostenso

Benefits: Any small object you attempt to hide on your body is treated as an extraordinarily small object for the purpose of Sleight of Hand checks.
vxOZxaRgqWOTILhM.name: Gifted Smuggler (Ostenso)

contextNotes.text: As long as you are conscious, +[[1]] Trait bonus against mind-affecting effects you are not already suffering from.   All allies within 10 feet gain a +[[1]] Morale bonus against these same effects.

vy7NaDgxDSKLuuKR.description:
You are an unmoving rock for those who see you as an authority figure.

Requirements: Oread

Benefits: As long as you are conscious, you and all allies within 10 feet gain a +1 bonus on saving throws against mind-affecting effects you are not already suffering from. This is a trait bonus for you and a morale bonus for your allies.
vy7NaDgxDSKLuuKR.name: Stoic Dignity (Oread)

contextNotes.text: Once per day, if an effect would compel you to harm an ally, abandon an ally, or break your word, you can attempt a Will save at the usual DC to end the effect. If the effect normally allows a Will save at this point, you can roll twice and take the better result.

w2opOBvUxIqNJ3iP.description:
You draw strength from adhering to the Ichimeiyo honor code in combat.

Benefits: Once per day, if an effect would compel you to harm an ally, abandon an ally, or break your word, you can attempt a Will save at the usual DC to end the effect. If the effect normally allows a Will save at this point, you can roll twice and take the better result.
w2opOBvUxIqNJ3iP.name: Ichimeiyo Champion

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on damage rolls when you are the only one threatening your opponent.

w4ZGWz34zZtvfH9X.description:
Your training in Aldori sword fighting included several bouts in the Sevier, which has taught you how to inflict further punishment in one-on-one fights.

Requirements: Mivon

Benefits
You gain a +1 trait bonus on damage rolls when you are the only one threatening your opponent.
w4ZGWz34zZtvfH9X.name: Mivoni Duelist (Mivon)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus with class skills if you spend twice as long as it normally takes to make that check.
+[[1]] Trait bonus with class skills if you spend twice as long as it normally takes to make that check.
+[[1]] Trait bonus with class skills if you spend twice as long as it normally takes to make that check.
+[[1]] Trait bonus with class skills if you spend twice as long as it normally takes to make that check.
+[[1]] Trait bonus with class skills if you spend twice as long as it normally takes to make that check.
+[[1]] Trait bonus with class skills if you spend twice as long as it normally takes to make that check.

w6sstMDbprjLYght.description:
Though others think you merely waste time, you know that those extra flourishes and ceremonial touches actually make your work just that much better.

Requirements: Halfling; Taldor

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Acrobatics, Diplomacy, Handle Animal, Intimidate, Perform, and Ride checks with class skills if you spend twice as long as it normally takes to make that check.
w6sstMDbprjLYght.name: Pomp and Pageantry (Halfling; Taldor)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus to lawfully and nonlethally restrain a creature you’ve witnessed commit a crime

w8zZFYREyMAGcNgF.description:
Struggle as they might, ne’er-do-wells and vagrants are hard pressed to evade the law once in your clutches.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on combat maneuver checks to lawfully and nonlethally restrain a creature you’ve witnessed commit a crime.
w8zZFYREyMAGcNgF.name: No Escape

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against illusions.
Reduce any miss chance you would take from concealment by 10%.

wCRZAyjbEScwWQuN.description:
You have experienced visions of the unseen spirit world, and bear the marks of the spirits upon your flesh.

Requirements: Erutaki Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saves against illusions, and reduce any miss chance you would take from concealment by 10%.
wCRZAyjbEScwWQuN.name: Spirit Lodge Dreamer (Human; Erutaki)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on opposed checks to influence creatures you have charmed.

wCcnmdballByudcZ.description:
The blood of crafty, bargain-making fiends runs in your veins, and you have a talent for brokering deals of your own.

Requirements: Tiefling

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks and on opposed Charisma checks to influence creatures you have charmed (such as with charm person).
wCcnmdballByudcZ.name: Tempter's Tongue (Tiefling)

contextNotes.text: +[[4]] Trait bonus to resist the effects of cold environments.
+[[1]] Trait bonus against cold effects.

wDzaFZIKWcw9YOn5.description:
Long nights in the frigid winters of the north have inured you to cold.

Requirements: Lands of the Linnorm Kings

Benefits: You gain a +4 trait bonus on any savings throws made to resist the effects of cold environments, as well as a +1 trait bonus on all saving throws against cold effects.
wDzaFZIKWcw9YOn5.name: Frostborn (Lands of the Linnorm Kings)
